Name: BLP Beauty

Through its slogan "Be Adored," BLP wants every woman to be able to increase her self-confidence and love herself. Currently, BLP Beauty has 3 main makeup lines, namely #FaceIt, #InYourEyes, and #OnTheLips, with offline stores called Beauty Space BLP in Jakarta, Bekasi, Bandung, and Surabaya.

Name: European Wax Center

Name: Unpaid Care Work
Description:
WE ARE MANY:
Care work is a valuable pillar of our society. It takes willpower, strength, empathy and perseverance to take responsibility for those who urgently need our support. Without this unpaid care work, our economy would collapse. Our initiative makes the expertise behind unpaid care work visible - because there are many of us.

 26.04.2024: LAUNCH OF THE INITIATIVE
On this day, an idea was given a name and a place in the CVs of all those who have had to hide care-related gaps until now. This was the day the Unpaid Care Work company page went live on LinkedIn. We, Franziska Büschelberger and Katrin Fuchs from Germany, could never have imagined what would happen next:

 AN IDEA BECAME A HUGE MOVEMENT - A WAVE, CARRIED BY PEOPLE
Within just a few days, thousands of people had already listed Unpaid Care Work as an employer in their work experience and the number keeps growing every day. This wave makes visible how many of us there truly are.

 SEIZE THE OPPORTUNITY: SHOW THE WORLD WHAT YOU CAN DO!
Recognition and appreciation start with ourselves. So: do good and talk about it! The Unpaid Care Work initiative encourages all mothers, fathers and caregivers of relatives to proudly list their unpaid care work in their CV. Together, we can make care work visible as an unpaid yet indispensable contribution to our economy.

Name: SÆTHER
Description:
As the leading and experienced beauty distributor in the Nordics, SÆTHER represents a diverse array of well-known international brands within fragrance, makeup, haircare and skincare. 

SÆTHER operates across four Nordic countries; Denmark, Sweden, Norway and Finland and is organized into five divisions; Luxury & Niche, Prestige, Consumer, Haircare and Clarins Group. Each division is dedicated to identifying and leveraging opportunities for growth and expansion, developing tailored strategies that align with the specific trends and requirements of each market, while always meeting the demands and needs of our different brand owners. Our five divisions collaborate closely to ensure we deliver a seamless and comprehensive service to all our partners.

We provide our retailers with valuable insights, training, and support to drive sales and enhance customer engagement. By working closely with our retailers, we understand their target markets, and develop customized marketing and promotional strategies to help them achieve their goals. We strive to be a reliable and trusted partner, believing strong relationships are key to mutual success. 

At SÆTHER, we strongly believe that a personal approach helps us better understand our local markets and the need of their customers as well as challenges and opportunities – this is crucial in the dynamic Nordic markets where customer preferences and trends can vary significantly.

SÆTHER builds on a heritage of success and impressive growth, founded on respect, integrity, and loyalty – as we are deeply convinced that success is achieved through cooperation.

We are proud to be a dynamic company offering numerous career opportunities for those passionate about the beauty industry – and we are always seeking talented individuals who share our philosophy. Whether you are starting your career or looking to advance, we have exciting opportunities across our organization.

Our Vision

Nourish your skin effortlessly in the best possible way with DERMATOUCH!

Name: HAIR RAP BY YOYO
Description:
HAIR RAP BY YOYO is not just a brand, it is a spirit and name that expresses the entire delightful experience of the salon and YoYo itself develops its brand in the industry by providing unimaginable creative services to its clients.

Consistency in anything with devotion makes you the most powerful person in anything and this is the strength of YoYo that he started his journey in this industry with zero experience and he learned the creative skills of the salon industry from various experts in India.

It has been many years since YoYo worked as a professional service provider in India, but after spending a few years in London, he realised that the arts and skills are extremely valuable and that he should learn one when he returned to India. And today Yoyo is one of the most reputed names amongst the hair industry and many great people have been continuously taking his services over the years and sharing their pleasant experience of taking services from YoYo with their friends and family.

YOYO started his hairdressing career at the age of 27, training in several different academies like Mounir, Vipul Chudasama and Up2Date. After qualifying, YoYo traveled to Mumbai to crack interviews at London base international brand Tony & Guy and worked as a Creative Hairstylist in top hair salons in Ahmedabad. He is a constant learner and now aims to travel to Asia, including Japan and Indonesia, and many other countries where he can develop his knowledge and experience in the art and methods of holistic hairdressing.

The process he followed to become the most successful hairstylist in the industry is the real secret that helps him become successful and finally in 2022 he named his salon Hair Rap By YoYo and continues to offer his clients the best salon experience through his salon.

His creative talent and high standards have now propelled him to become a leading face within his profession.

HAIR RAP BY YOYO

Name: Dovida Nederland
Description:
Bij Dovida ondersteunen we mensen met aandacht en zorg aan huis, zodat zij het leven kunnen blijven leiden op hun eigen manier. We bieden persoonlijke hulp en ondersteuning voor senioren die zo lang mogelijk thuis willen blijven wonen, in verbinding met hun naasten en op een manier die bij hen past.

Onze naam zegt het al: Dovida staat voor ‘thuis’ (Domus) en ‘leven’ (Vida). We geloven in zorg die niet alleen praktisch ondersteunt, maar ook recht doet aan wie iemand is.

Onze caregivers en zorgcoördinatoren werken vanuit de overtuiging dat iedere klant uniek is. Daarom stemmen we onze hulp af op jouw wensen, gewoontes en ritme. 

Goede zorg is nooit eenrichtingsverkeer. Daarom werken we met de Cirkel van Zorg: een samenwerking waarin klanten, mantelzorgers, professionals en verwijzers samen optrekken voor zorg die past.

In alles wat we doen staat de klant centraal. Dat zie je terug in onze aanpak, ons logo en in de manier waarop we samenwerken.

Ontdek hoe wij jou kunnen ondersteunen op www.dovida.nl/onze-diensten

Name: The Maggie Oliver Foundation
Description:
Maggie Oliver is best known as the Detective-turned- whistleblower who resigned from Greater Manchester Police in late 2012 in order to expose the now infamous Rochdale Grooming Scandal. Her ability to connect with people and encourage them to speak out against injustice paired with her grit and determination to expose the truth eventually led to her becoming Programme Consultant on the multi award-winning dramatisation of the case entitled Three Girls (BBC One) which brought some of the issues to public attention for the first time. Maggie was also a key contributor for The Betrayed Girls documentary (BBC One)

Maggies relationship with the victims of child grooming continues to this day, still fighting for justice for survivors of sexual abuse. This has now led to The Maggie Oliver Foundation being set up with the focus on helping survivors to Transform Pain into Power

Maggie has set her vision in motion by beginning to build an amazingly caring, supportive and understanding team. A team who all share the same values and a fierce determination to make a real difference in the lives of survivors of childhood sexual abuse. Values such as kindness, empathy, honesty, fairness, trust, human decency, and justice are what drive us. In addition, by sharing our stories and experiences we also intend to expose and address injustice, misuse of power and corruption wherever we find it.

Due to COVID 19 we had to close our pilot centre in Rochdale a few weeks after opening and this has forced us to evaluate this brave new world we are now in and make decisions about the future. We decided we had no choice but to put the centre on hold due to social distancing and the new regulations and focus instead on setting up our sexual abuse phone line called “Pain into Power”.

Name: STUDIO W
Description:
A parceria profissional entre um renomado especialista em beleza e uma educadora é uma parte importante da história da nossa marca. Nosso time é composto por profissionais de beleza altamente talentosos e atualizados, e por uma equipe administrativa competente. Essa dedicação foi reconhecida ao sermos certificados como o primeiro salão do mundo dentro das Normas ISO 9001 e também ao sermos eleitos um dos dezesseis melhores salões de beleza do mundo pela conceituada Revista Harper's Bazaar.

_______________________________

The professional partnership between a renowned beauty expert and an educator is an important part of our brand story. Over its 24 years of existence, Studio W has stood out for its connection and ability to develop excellent professionals. With efficient management focused on delivering high-quality beauty services, through the work of talented and constantly updated professionals, our brand has become a reference and relevant over many decades.
We are proud to be an ethical company, whose DNA is marked by the search for knowledge and human development. Name: Truefitt & Hill London
Description:
Recognized by the Guinness Book of World Records as the world’s oldest male grooming brand providing both products and services, Truefitt & Hill was founded in 1805 by William Francis Truefitt and is located in the historic enclave of St. James’s, London.
 
With its roots deeply immersed in London society, it is perhaps inevitable that the company’s past encompasses historic touchpoints throughout history. Truefitt has served nine reigning monarchs, was endorsed by Queen Victoria, received an enthusiastic nod by Charles Dickens in ‘The Uncommercial Traveller’, made a presence on the Titanic and hosted a clientele including Oscar Wilde, Sir Winston Churchill, Alfred Hitchcock, David Niven and Frank Sinatra. 
 
Whilst acknowledging its historic past, Truefitt & Hill is very much focused on its future, offering a full range of shaving, fragrance, hair and bath products to provide a traditional and comprehensive daily grooming regimen for the modern man.

Name: MdeMaria Consultoria de Imagem Corporativa
Description:
Eu sou Liliam C. consultora de imagem corporativa para mulheres que querem ser vistas pelo que realmente entregam e não apenas pelo que está escrito no crachá.

Se tem uma coisa que eu aprendi depois de anos dentro de grandes empresas e bancos é que, no mundo corporativo, ninguém te oferece um manual decente sobre como se vestir, se posicionar ou se apresentar. Mas te cobram como se tivessem entregado.

E foi aí que eu percebi:
A imagem não é o “detalhe bonito”. É a estratégia invisível por trás das mulheres que chegam mais longe.

Trabalhando em instituições financeiras, eu vi mulheres brilhantes sendo colocadas de lado porque “não tinham postura”, “não tinham presença”, “não pareciam prontas”. Mais tarde, entendi que esses códigos não são sobre beleza, são sobre comunicação visual. E ninguém nos ensina isso.

Então eu fiz o caminho inverso. Li diversos livros, estudei colorimetria, estilo pessoal, visagismo, psicologia das cores, etiqueta e dress code corporativo.
Apliquei tudo em mim, e na minha carreira. E descobri que imagem não serve para te deixar parecida com alguém. Serve para te aproximar da mulher que você já é, mas que o mundo ainda não consegue enxergar.

Hoje, ajudo profissionais, especialmente mulheres, a construírem uma presença que comunica competência, solidez, carisma e autoridade sem abrir mão da essência.

Meu trabalho é te mostrar que:

* A cor certa abre conversas.
* A modelagem certa aumenta sua credibilidade.
* A imagem certa te lembra, todos os dias, de quem você é e para onde está indo.

Eu acredito que toda mulher pode ocupar espaços maiores quando se vê, se veste e se apresenta como a protagonista da própria história.E, se você sente que trabalha demais, mas é reconhecida de menos… a sua imagem pode ser o elo que está faltando.

Eu sou Liliam C.
E estou aqui para te ajudar a vestir o seu próximo nível.

Name: Disaster Recovery Chaplaincy Network NSW/ACT
Description:
The Disaster Recovery Chaplaincy Network (DRCN) is a faith-based network of chaplains established to assist people in NSW and the ACT who have been affected by disasters and major emergencies within their communities. 

The network was established in 2009 by the Uniting Church (Synod of NSW and ACT) when it was recognised that there was a need for chaplaincy to provide pastoral and spiritual care as a complement the other welfare services within evacuation and recovery centres following major emergencies.

Since 2009 the DRCN has grown to a network of 400 trained disaster chaplains who are from 16 different faith groups and diverse backgrounds. With the increasing regularity of natural disasters our services are increasingly needed.   

While much of our work involves evacuation and recovery centres, we regularly start long term recovery support to disaster impacted communities. 
For general inquiries please email DRCN@nat.uca.org.au

Vi brenner for å øke kunnskapen og bevisstheten rundt inkontinens, og jobber aktivt for å bryte ned stigmaet som fortsatt omgir temaet.

Som en del av Attindas Hygiene Partners, en global leder innen absorberende hygieneløsninger, er vi stolte av å bidra til helse, verdighet og velvære for mennesker over hele verden – støttet av mer enn 2 000 engasjerte ansatte.

 Bærekraft står sentralt i alt vi gjør.
Hos Attends tar vi ansvar – ikke bare for enkeltmennesker, men også for samfunnet og planeten. Vår fabrikk i Sverige drives med 100 % klimavennlig vannkraft, noe som har redusert våre CO₂-utslipp med hele 95 %.

Description:
Als Beersjamane help ik jou online en bij mij thuis in de Franse Pyreneeën om je te bevrijden van ballast uit het verleden, zoals jeugdtrauma's en narcistische en andere toxische relaties. Ik heb ruim 30 jaar ervaring in het begeleiden van vrouwen en mannen met ervaring met seksueel, huiselijk en narcistisch misbruik en geweld. 
De online trajecten van zes sjamanistische coachingsbijeenkomsten met huiswerk zijn gericht op een transformatie van opgeslagen pijn die scriptmatig en ondoelmatig handelen veroorzaakt naar vrije energie en een nieuwe opening naar jouw zelfstandige toekomst. Je stapt, zoals de Zuidamerikaanse sjamanen zeggen,  van El Mundo Malo (de negatieve, nare wereld) in El Mundo Bueno (de goede, positieve wereld). Dit betekent dat weliswaar je situatie niet plotseling verandert, maar dat jij het zondagskind wordt dat altijd geluk heeft, in plaats van degene die geblokkeerd is en die alles altijd tegen zit. Van hieruit kun je dan vrij en onafhankelijk van jouw negatieve imprints verder!
Zoek jij een sjamanistische coaching die jou uit je huidige, vastgelopen situatie brengt naar een vrije, zelfstandige toekomst waarin je je (opnieuw) kunt verbinden met je vitale energie, je hartsenergie en je universele creatieve energie? Name: Hunter Valley Supports
Description:
At HVS we believe that every member of the community deserves to have the same chances to live a dignified, happy, and fulfilling life. We want to support you to live your best life, respecting your choices and creating pathways to your goals. 

At Hunter Valley Supports we deliver personalised care and support for NDIS participants of all ages, races, religions, and disabilities from all walks of life. We regularly support clients with varying abilities ranging from physical to mental and psychological difficulties, disorders, and disabilities. Complex Mental Health support is one of our specialities, and as such we have highly experienced support workers equipped to deal with people who may have become disadvantaged and marginalised due to their conditions.
When we say we're committed locals, we mean it! We have taken the time to explore the available supports that could enhance your life IN OUR LOCAL AREA. What this means for you or your loved one is that less of your funding is eaten up in travel and often people prefer to attend activities and therapies that are in a familiar, safe area.
Hunter Valley Supports can help with:
- Navigating the NDIS
- Daily Supports
- Support with living
- Support Coordination
So how are the HVS Support Workers different to other support workers within the industry? Every one of our support workers has been carefully chosen for their ability to communicate with a wide range of personalities from all walks of life with respect, compassion, and integrity. There are no clients that are too complex for us. We won't give up easily and our team will ensure we exhaust every available option to cater to your or your family's support needs.
Sadly, some of the people in our community that need support the most don't know how to access the available supports. We are strong advocates for those slipping through the cracks!
If you're not on the NDIS, we can help you find out if you're eligible for financial support and even help you prepare

Name: Upwards Care Group
Description:
At Upwards Care Solutions and Upwards Residential Care Services, we are committed to offering high-quality care and support to Young People and Service Users. 

Our purpose is to equip the Young People with the skills and tools to enable them to achieve a seamless transition into independent living and their own tenancy. And to support Service Users within our CQC service to remain in their own homes with a sympathetic and dignified support package around them. 

We recognise that every Young Person and Service User is an individual who will come to us with their own lived experiences, which is why we pride ourselves on providing a person-centered approach to every aspect of our support. Within our group homes, we provide a safe and family-orientated environment where our support staff lead by example in order to maximise the input we have into the Young Person's acquisition of life skills.

We provide 24-hour staffed accommodation developed around offering a targeted and sustainable support service for vulnerable young people. We work in conjunction with local authorities and other identified professionals to aid in the assessment, planning, intervention, monitoring and support of all young people including those at significant risk.

Our houses accommodate both long- and short-term placements including any emergency placements. We currently have provisions located in Crewe, Hull, Greater Manchester, Oldham, Sheffield, Derby and Preston. All of our provisions house between one to a maximum of four young people aged between 16-25 years to ensure we create a ‘family setting’ environment.
We work in conjunction with training and education providers as well as therapeutic intervention professionals to complement our services. We work with local organisations who offer apprenticeship opportunities for our young people and refugee services for our Unaccompanied Asylum Seeking Children. 

Our staff are well trained and experienced.

Name: Eyes, Lids, and Face
Description:
Dr Maeve O’Doherty is an Irish and UK trained General Ophthalmologist, with a subspeciality interest in oculoplastic surgery. Maeve has a special interest in facial aesthetics and has trained with some of the leaders in this area in the United Kingdom.
Dr. O’Doherty completed her undergraduate training at University Hospital Galway, Ireland and obtained her medical doctorate there. She did two years general medical training in internal medicine and became a member of the Irish College of Physicians (MRCPI). She continued her Ophthalmic training at The Eye and Ear hospital and The Mater Hospital, Dublin. She became a Fellow of the Royal College of Surgeons, Ireland in 2010 (FRCSI).
When she relocated to London, she underwent three Oculoplastic fellowships at Imperial College NHS Trust, Chelsea Westminster NHS Trust and Moorfields Eye Hospital, London. She further complimented her general ophthalmic training by completing a fellowship in cataract surgery.

Name: Compass Rose Divorce Coaching
Description:
Better Than Before Divorce is a system specifically designed for full-service family law firms that want to offer clients critical, trusted support through ALL aspects of a divorce, without dipping into the retainer or using ANY billable time.

How Does It Work?
You gift your clients access to the four, content-rich modules, workbook and bonus content, all focused on navigating the emotional aspects of divorce. They work through it at their own pace, on their own time, and you focus on their legal needs, knowing they are also getting the emotional support that's so critical to a positive outcome.

You choose how many licenses you want to purchase today, and your clients have access to the program tomorrow. It's that simple.

Better Than Before Divorce covers the essential elements of a client's emotional journey through divorce: communication, boundaries, confidence, goal setting, stress, problem solving, co-parenting and much more. 

They get personalized support, practical tools and a comprehensive workbook to help them stay organized and efficient throughout their process, and you get credible clients deeply grateful for the support. 

The program is 100% designed and facilitated by me: a collaboratively trained mediator, Certified Divorce Coach and former communications VP working with anxious and overwhelmed clients to create and utilize intentional communication throughout the divorce process.   

Check out client testimonials, program details and more at https://betterthanbeforedivorce.com/ 

Contact me for details on package pricing and customization. You can add your firm's logo to the workbook and we can offer a webinar just for your audiences if you'd like. 

Schedule a call today!

Name: Carex Group
Description:
Carex Group is a nationally recognized care provider that offers a wide range of services to meet the diverse needs of individuals and families. We are proud to be CQC approved and have undergone rigorous inspections to ensure the quality and safety of our services. Our commitment to excellence has been recognized by the CQC, as we have been rated as "good" in their assessments.

At Carex Group, we understand that each person has unique care requirements. That's why we offer a comprehensive range of services to cater to different age groups and specific needs. 

For adults requiring care and support, we provide Adult Care services that are tailored to promote independence and enhance overall well-being. Our dedicated and compassionate caregivers are trained to assist with daily activities, medication management, companionship, and more.

For families with children, we offer Child Care services that prioritize the safety and development of young individuals. Our team of childcare professionals ensures a nurturing and stimulating environment, focusing on age-appropriate activities, educational support, and emotional well-being.

We also provide Supporting Living services for individuals who require assistance and guidance to live independently in their own homes. Our trained staff offers support in managing household tasks, personal care, and accessing community resources, empowering individuals to lead fulfilling lives.

Personal Care services are available for individuals who require support with personal hygiene, grooming, and dressing. Our compassionate caregivers ensure dignity and respect while assisting with these essential activities.

Additionally, we specialize in Dementia Care to support individuals living with dementia and their families. Our team of experienced caregivers undergoes specialized training to provide personalized care, promote cognitive stimulation, and maintain a safe and comfortable environment.

Name: Oxido Yachting
Description:
Al sinds we in contact gekomen zijn met de watersport merken wij dat veel booteigenaren zich storen aan de vele handelingen die zij moeten verrichten voordat ze daadwerkelijk kunnen genieten van het varen met hun gasten. Denkt u bij deze handelingen aan voorbeelden als:
-	Schoonmaak van de boot na een vaartocht
-	Regelen van reparaties
-	Voortijdig vullen van de koeling voor gekoelde dranken
-	Aanvullen van de handdoeken
-	Regelen van winterstalling- en onderhoud
-	Regelen van een kapitein

Kortom, allerlei randzaken waarmee u als booteigenaar niet bezig wilt zijn. Zonde van uw vrije tijd én van de zorgen die het hebben van een boot met zich meebrengt. Wij van Oxido Yachting zien het als onze plicht om deze zorgen van u over te nemen. Wij nemen de zorg voor uw boot voor onze rekening, zodat u kunt genieten van dat waar het hebben van een boot om draait: het varen. 

Wij zorgen ervoor dat uw boot perfect onderhouden is en de koeling altijd gevuld is met de lekkerste dranken. Daarnaast zorgen we voorafgaand en na gebruik van de boot voor een grondige reiniging, we houden de brandstof op peil én we onderhouden de motor. Nadat u de gehele zomer van uw boot heeft genoten, zorgen wij ervoor dat hij in perfecte conditie gestald wordt voor de winter. Ultiem genieten van varen met uw gasten? Dan regelen wij ook nog een kapitein die de boot voor u bestuurt. 

Oxido Yachting gaat voor de ultieme vaarbeleving. Onze klanten hoeven niets te doen, dan enkel en alleen te genieten van het leven op het water. Eén berichtje aan ons, en wij regelen de rest. Dat noemen wij pas echt ontspannen. 

Vooralsnog zijn we alleen actief in Saint-Tropez, Port Grimaud en Saint-Maxime.

Name: INPRIMOPIANO Hair Boutique
Description:
Chi è Gianni Fuschi? Gianni Fuschi è un Hair Stylist, imprenditore e titolare della catena dei saloni In Primo Piano,  che contano  più  di 40 collaboratori. Sentendo il richiamo per questo lavoro ad un certo punto della  sua vita, con determinazione, decide di imparare quest’arte, cominciare ad applicarla e studiare in continuazione, cercando quel ramo specifico che potesse più adattarsi ai suoi obiettivi, portando nuovi metodi, nuove soluzioni e tecniche innovative che gli avrebbero permesso un giorno di farsi breccia in questo mercato saturo di concorrenza.
Con spirito e determinazione, nel 1996 apre il suo primo salone a Pineto, una piccola cittadina sulla costa Adriatica, in provincia di Teramo. Sviluppandosi sempre di più e raffinando la sua tecnica nasce la sua prima filiale a Roseto degli Abruzzi, anch’essa cittadina sulla costa Adriatica nel 2012.
 
In Primo Piano comincia così a consolidarsi nel tempo, la tecnica di lavorazione del brand comincia a distinguersi, e nasce la voglia di divulgarla, è da qui che nasce, nel 2015 la “In Primo piano Hair Academy”, dove ancora oggi, Gianni e altri professionisti del settore divulgano la tecnica che ha temprato lo stile di In Primo piano.

I clienti si affezionano a questo brand e acquisendo ancora esperienza, saggezza e sicurezza nel campo, nasce il suo nuovo salone a Pescara, nel 2018.
Ora  In Primo Piano, ha tantissimi progetti  da mettere in porto, e lo fa con passione e determinazione, ambendo, grazie all’aiuto dei suoi fedeli clienti, a prendere posto nella nicchia generale nel campo dell’Hair Cut.
 
LA FILOSOFIA 
“Ho sognato un salone che avesse il fascino intramontabile della  vecchia  bottega,  dove la tecnica si trasmetteva e si migliorava dall’artigiano all’apprendista. In una società in cui l’immagine è tutto, il ruolo del parrucchiere è più che mai In Primo Piano e rappresenta una realtà in continua evoluzione”

Name: Spécialiste de la coloration
Description:
Maison de coiffure familiale depuis 3 générations. Créé en 1974 avec Cris Armelle, ayant une expertise unique de la coiffure depuis très jeune, grâce à sa formation meilleur ouvrier de France.

Laurence Armelle a très vite rejoint l'univers de sa mère: "J’ai commencé à faire un préapprentissage à 14 ans, à 16 ans je faisais des concours avec l’Oréal, à 18 ans je travaillais à l’international et puis j’ai pris les rennes du commerce familial et ça n’a pas cessé."

Aujourd'hui, c'est une génération de trois femmes qui font évoluer le salon sur leur trois spécialisations de fondatrice, d'artiste et de digitale. Le coté familial de mère en fille y est une des valeurs les plus fortes.

Le salon met en lumière le respect du travail et la qualité de la prestation à travers un réel accompagnement des clients. L'amour du métier de Cris et Laurence leur permet aujourd’hui d’avoir des client(e)s fidèles depuis plus de 40 ans.

Médaillées de la ville de Paris en 2008, cette différence se joue sur le service sur mesure, d’une expérience de coiffure unique.

Cette aboutissement est extraordinaire grâce à l'ensemble de leurs client(e)s, les anciennes comme les nouvelles, ainsi que toutes les personnes qui ont croisé leur chemin depuis tout ce temps.
Alors MERCI.

Name: Visiting Angels Warwickshire
Description:
Visiting Angels Warwickshire prides itself on our holistic approach to person-centred care. Our unique approach of listening, understanding, and responding to our client’s needs and preference will help relieve pressure and provide support which is centred around individual lifestyles. We believe quality care is deliberate and cannot be rushed.
Our caregivers will go above and beyond to support you to continue living independently by providing continuous, consistent and premium care in the comfort of your own home.
Our care packages are individually tailor-made, affordable, flexible and range from a few hours, respite to long-term care. Our clients are given the choice to select their own caregivers, a crucial part of our business which helps them nurture and build trusting relationships.
We are carer-centric, which means we put our caregivers at the very core of our business by supporting, celebrating and training them to be the best versions of themselves; in turn they provide the best care available to our clients.
I have spent the majority of my adult working life in health and social care, providing support and guidance to a number of home care businesses. My career to date has seen me working in many management roles including recruitment, training, compliance, quality assurance, regional management and registered manager. I have seen some very good care provision and some not so good inspiring me to provide a high-quality service to my local community in Warwickshire which is where I have lived and brought up my family for the last 20 years.
I have seen the high turnover of care staff and the impact this has on the people receiving care, constantly being cared for by different people, not knowing who is going to turn up and how much they will know about the support that needs to be provided and unable to build any meaningful relationship with the caregivers. I want to provide a consistent, caring and safe service to the individuals we are supporting.

Name: Fachpflegedienst Weserbergland GmbH
Description:
Der Fachpflegedienst Weserbergland GmbH mit Sitz in Bodenwerder bietet ambulante Pflege und Betreuung für ältere sowie psychisch erkrankte Menschen. Das Unternehmen legt besonderen Wert auf eine respektvolle, individuelle Versorgung, bei der die Würde und Selbstbestimmung der Klient:innen im Mittelpunkt stehen.

Zum Leistungsspektrum gehören die häusliche Grundpflege, hauswirtschaftliche Versorgung, Betreuung im Alltag sowie Pflegeberatung nach §37.3 SGB XI. Auch psychosoziale Betreuung und Unterstützung bei psychischen Erkrankungen sind Teil des Angebots. Darüber hinaus werden Klient:innen zu Vorsorgevollmachten und Patientenverfügungen beraten.

Ein zentrales Anliegen ist die persönliche Beziehung zwischen Pflegekraft und Klient: Die Mitarbeitenden arbeiten in festen Teams und betreuen möglichst kontinuierlich dieselben Personen. Dies schafft Vertrauen und Sicherheit im Alltag. Das Fachpersonal ist fachlich qualifiziert und zeichnet sich durch Empathie und Verlässlichkeit aus.

Der Pflegedienst arbeitet eng mit Ärzten, Krankenhäusern und weiteren sozialen Einrichtungen in der Region zusammen, um eine umfassende Versorgung sicherzustellen. Mit einem 24-Stunden-Bereitschaftsdienst ist der Fachpflegedienst auch in Notfällen erreichbar.

Kontakt:
Große Straße 45, 37619 Bodenwerder
Telefon: 05533–93150

 Fazit
Der Fachpflegedienst Weserbergland GmbH in Bodenwerder wirkt wie ein vertrauenswürdiger Partner für Menschen, die Unterstützung im Alltag brauchen – mit Fachberatung, Pflege bei psychischen Betreuungsbedarfen, hauswirtschaftlicher Hilfe, und dem Fokus auf persönliche Beziehungen und Achtung der Klient:innen. Für Angehörige und Betroffene bietet der Anbieter eine vertrauensvolle, fachkompetente und emotionale Unterstützung in schwierigen Lebenssituationen.

Wenn du noch mehr zu Team, Ausbildung, Tagespflege oder Betreutem Wohnen wissen möchtest, sag einfach Bescheid!

Name: HOMECARE - die Alltagshelfer in Freiburg
Description:
Unser Schwerpunkt liegt auf einer intensiven und umfassenden Betreuung, bei der stets der Mensch im Vordergrund steht. Unsere Dienstleistungen sind sorgfältig auf die persönlichen Wünsche und Bedürfnisse abgestimmt, damit unsere Hilfsbedürftigen oder Ihre Angehörigen ein langes und zufriedenes Leben führen können.

Wir von HOMECARE – die Alltagshelfer in Freiburg wollen, dass Sie z.B. in Freiburg und Umgebung möglichst lange ein eigenständiges Leben außerhalb eines Pflegeheimes führen können. Damit das möglich ist, bieten wir passgenaue Betreuungsleistungen. Zugleich haben wir gute Lösungen, um Angehörige zu entlasten.

Unsere Betreuungsleistungen:

- Betreuung zu Hause
- Begleitung außer Haus
- Hauswirtschaftliche Hilfe
- Unterstützung bei der Grundpflege
- Hauswirtschaftliche Unterstützung für schwangere Frauen
- Familienbetreuung
- Entlastung Angehöriger
- Betreuung von Demenzkranken
- Unterstützung bei Anträgen und Abrechnungen
- Beratungsbesuche nach §37 Abs. 3 SGB XI
- Hauswirtschaftliche Unterstützung auf Verordnung

Das Angebot von HOMECARE – die Alltagshelfer in Freiburg richtet sich an hilfs- und pflegebedürftige Menschen, die Unterstützung im Alltag benötigen. Mit Leistungen, die genau auf die Wünsche und Bedürfnisse der Kunden abgestimmt sind, sorgen wir dafür, dass diese lange und glücklich zu Hause wohnen bleiben können.

HOMECARE – die Alltagshelfer in Freiburg unterstützt nicht nur Senioren, die möglichst lange in den eigenen vier Wänden wohnen bleiben wollen, sondern entlastet auch Familien oder pflegende Angehörige. Nach einer Operation, einem Unfall oder auch während und nach der Schwangerschaft können die HOMCARE – die Alltagshelfer Dienste in Anspruch genommen werden.


Sie suchen als Arbeitgeber einen verlässlichen und menschlichen ambulanten Betreuungs- und Pflegedienst in Freiburg ? Einen Dienst mit umfassenden Leistungen, bei dem Kompetenz und Mitmenschlichkeit Hand in Hand gehen? Dann sind Sie bei uns genau richtig. Bewerben Sie sich jetzt!

Chcesz gładkiej skóry bez kompromisów? Z nami to możliwe.
W Time for Wax od ponad 18 lat robimy to, co wychodzi nam najlepiej:
profesjonalną depilację woskiem i komfortową epilację laserową – szybko, higienicznie i niemal bezboleśnie.
Jesteśmy siecią salonów wyspecjalizowaną wyłącznie w depilacji.
Dziś to 19 salonów w całym kraju, setki tysięcy zadowolonych klientów i ponad 100 specjalistek, które naprawdę znają się na depilacji.
Wyróżnia nas: 
 naturalny wosk Magic Wax – autorska receptura dla maksymalnego komfortu
 zasada jednej szpatułki – u nas higiena to nie hasło, a standard
 komfortowa epilacja laserowa nowej generacji – efekty widzisz już po pierwszym zabiegu
 doświadczenie, do którego się wraca – i atmosfera, do której chce się wracać
Nie ważne, czy wpadasz na bikini brazylijskie, pachy, plecy, brwi, czy całościowy pakiet.
U nas zawsze czujesz się pewnie, bezpiecznie i… po prostu dobrze.
Zajrzyj do nas – na zabieg albo… na rozmowę.
Szukamy osób, które chcą się rozwijać z najlepszymi w branży.
Time for Wax & Laser. Więcej niż depilacja.

Name: Dr. Deaf
Description:
Van bouw en industrie tot metaal en logistiek: in veel sectoren ligt gehoorschade continu op de loer. Bij Dr. Deaf zorgen we dat bedrijven hun mensen niet alleen beschermen omdat het moet, maar vooral ook omdat het slimmer, veiliger én fijner werken is. Met onze otoplastieken en unieke servicecontracten leveren wij gehoorbescherming die doet wat ’t moet doen. En dat tegen de beste prijs-kwaliteit verhouding in de markt. Altijd volgens de regels, nooit onnodig gedoe.

Maar we zijn er niet alleen voor werk. Gehoorschade is namelijk net als een kater: je merkt het pas als het te laat is. Dus ook in het nachtleven maken we het verschil. Van festivals tot kroegen en van events tot nachten doorhalen: wij maken gehoorbescherming zichtbaar, stijlvol en een tikkie spannend en zorgen ervoor dat je oren het volhouden. 

Niet voor niets vertrouwen o.a. VDL, Mandemakers, JM van Delft & zn. en RKC Waalwijk al op Dr. Deaf.

Tijd om gehoorbescherming serieus leuk te maken.

Name: Answers For Elders
Description:
Answers for Elders (AFE) is a geriatric care management and home care agency serving families across Plymouth and the South Shore of Massachusetts. We specialize in helping older adults, aging parents, and their families navigate the challenges of aging with compassion, professionalism, and expert guidance.

Our services include comprehensive care assessments, personalized care plans, in-home caregiver coordination, dementia and Alzheimer’s care support, advocacy with doctors and facilities, and Medicaid / MassHealth guidance. Whether your loved one needs companionship, nursing visits, or long-term care planning, our dedicated care managers and nurses make the process easier, more informed, and more reassuring.

Families, elder law attorneys, and healthcare professionals trust AFE to deliver trusted elder care solutions, care coordination, and peace of mind—so every senior can live safely, independently, and with dignity.

Name: Surrati Perfumes and Fragrances
Description:
Founded in 1929 in the holy city of Mecca, Surrati Perfumes is a pioneer in the world of fine fragrance. With nearly a century of heritage, we are proud to be a trusted name in high-quality oils and perfumes, blending traditional Arabic artistry with modern sophistication.

Our ISO 9001-certified facility spans 29,500 square meters and is home to over 400 skilled professionals dedicated to creating more than 3,000 unique fragrances. Each product we craft embodies luxury, elegance, and excellence.

Global Reach
Surrati has a strong international presence, with distribution across the Middle East, Asia, Europe, North America, Africa, and Australia. Our commitment to quality and innovation allows us to cater to a wide array of cultural preferences and market demands.

What We Offer
From classic oud and musk oils to contemporary spray perfumes, Surrati products are more than just scents—they are luxurious statements of identity and taste.

Let’s connect and explore opportunities for collaboration in the world of fragrance.

Our team of skilled artists is dedicated to delivering stunning, long-lasting results tailored to each client's unique needs and aesthetic goals. We pride ourselves on our meticulous attention to detail and our commitment to using the highest quality pigments and the best techniques in the industry.

At Feather & Blade, client safety and comfort come first. We maintain the highest standards of hygiene and sanitation, ensuring a safe and comfortable experience for everyone who visits our studios. Our mission is to help clients simplify their beauty routines and achieve a look that enhances their natural beauty.

Discover the transformative power of cosmetic tattooing at Feather & Blade. Visit us in Lexington or Louisville or schedule an appointment to learn more about how we can help you look and feel your best every day!

Nosso centro oferece café da manhã e almoço de segunda a sexta-feira, além de uma ampla variedade de atividades para os nossos idosos.

Os principais programas que oferecemos são:

- Psicoterapia cognitiva
- Intervenção psicológica
- Melhoria das AVD (Atividades da Vida Diária)
- Intervenção psicossocial com as famílias
- Terapia recreativa
- Terapia ocupacional e funcional
- Psicomotricidade e atividades físicas (Fisioterapia e Pilates)
- Cultura (Palestras e atividades)

Atualmente, nossas instalações estão localizadas no bairro de Vila Mariana.
Após quase meio século de atividade, o que nos proporcionou uma grande experiência e uma sólida estrutura formada por nossa sede atual, contamos com uma equipe de profissionais e um grupo de voluntários com os quais conjuntamente realizamos nosso trabalho assistencial.

Name: Tanja Za Tebe - Coaching, mentorstvo in psihoterapija za uspeh
Description:
Zakaj bi nekdo izbral mene – TanjoZatebe?
Ker je življenje pot polna izzivov, priložnosti in vprašanj, ki nas včasih spravijo v dilemo. V tem vrtincu vsakodnevnih obveznosti in odločitev si želimo najti notranji mir, zadovoljstvo ter uspešno in izpolnjujoče življenje. In prav tukaj stopim jaz, TanjaZatebe, v vašo zgodbo.
Kot izkušena coachinja, mentorica in psihoterapevtka sem posvečena vašemu osebnemu razvoju ter vam pomagam raziskati in odkriti pot do vašega notranjega bistva. Moje delo temelji na dveh ključnih pristopih: transakcijski analizi in NLP.
Transakcijska analiza je močno orodje za razumevanje naših vzorcev delovanja in odnosov z drugimi ter vodenje bolj zadovoljujočega življenja. Skozi proces se naučite prepoznati in spreminjati nekoristne vedenjske vzorce ter izboljšate komunikacijo v svojem vsakdanjem življenju.
NLP pa vas nauči, kako s pomočjo miselnih in vedenjskih strategij doseči cilje ter se osredotočiti na pozitivne vidike življenja. S tem razvijete večjo samozavest in učinkovitejše načine za doseganje želenih rezultatov.
Zakaj bi izbrali mene? Ker verjamem v vaš potencial in verjamem, da imate v sebi vse, kar potrebujete, da uresničite svoje sanje in cilje. Moja vloga je, da vas podprem na vaši poti do osebne rasti ter vam pomagam prepoznati in odpraviti ovire, ki vas morda ovirajo na poti do uspeha.
Z mojim mentorstvom, coachingom in psihoterapijo boste:
1.	Odkrili svoje  vire moči in samozavesti,
2.	Razvili boljše odnose in izboljšali komunikacijo,
3.	Postavili jasne cilje in razvili strategije za njihovo uresničevanje,
4.	Presegli omejujoča prepričanja ter se osredotočili na pozitivne vidike življenja,
5.	Prepoznali svoje talente in potenciale ter jih uporabili
6.	Ustvarili ravnovesje ter našli notranji mir.
V svojem delu uporabljam celovit pristop, ki se prilagaja vašim unikatnim potrebam in ciljem. Moje dolgoletne izkušnje in strokovno znanje mi omogočajo, da vas podprem na vaši poti do osebnega in duhovnega razvoja.

Name: Haruto
Description:
We believe our parents deserve technology that feels like a warm hug—not another cold screen, a complex app, or a surveillance-driven smart speaker.

That's why we are building Haruto.

As a multidisciplinary team of eight—combining expertise in AI, industrial design, and interpersonal neurobiology—we are unlocking a new category of empathic AI for the longevity and care economies. 

Haruto is an empathic AI infrastructure embodied in a warm, tactile wooden sculpture. It is specifically designed for those who are often left behind by the digital revolution: technology-averse individuals who wish to age with dignity, autonomy, and genuine connection.

Why Haruto?

The "Silent Crisis" of loneliness and caregiver burnout is a global challenge. We designed Haruto to act as a bridge, supporting communication, memory, and emotional balance without ever replacing the essential human touch of medical and psychological professionals.

Our Mission:

Reducing Loneliness: Providing a presence that feels natural, personal, and trustworthy.
Relieving Families: Giving adult children and caregivers the peace of mind they deserve.
Reinforcing Health: Actively supporting healthy habits through intuitive, empathic interaction.

We aren't just building another senior assistance service. We are creating a trustworthy, personal infrastructure for mental health and longevity—built on the principles of privacy by design and deep human empathy.

If you are passionate about human technology, the future of care, or how we can help a generation age with dignity: let's connect.

Get Involved:

 DM me if you'd like to:

Download our Haruto Whitepaper – a deep dive into our empathic AI approach
Access our Safety Policy – transparency is at the core of what we do.
Apply for the last remaining spot in our pilot program – we're looking for one more family to join our Founder's Circle and help shape the future of Haruto.

Name: MMARA
Description:
Our mission is to empower women to reclaim control over their hair health and overall well-being.

MMARA was born from our personal struggles with hair loss and a shared frustration with how overlooked women of color are in the hair care and wellness industries. As three Black women co-founders, we’ve all experienced the emotional toll of hair loss—and the dismissive solutions often offered to women like us.

For women, hair is more than appearance; it’s tied to identity and confidence. Yet hair loss solutions are often temporary or harsh, ignoring the root cause. We knew there had to be a better way.

We built MMARA to empower women to take control of their hair and health through personalized routines, expert insights, tools to address the root causes of hair concerns, and most importantly tips for proactive care. We believe hair loss is a symptom—not the whole story. By addressing it holistically, we’re helping women reclaim their confidence, redefine wellness, and show up boldly in every aspect of their lives.

I Svane Pleje har vi over 700 medarbejdere, der hver dag hjælper borgere med deres daglige gøremål. Vi leverer både praktisk hjælp og pleje hver dag, døgnet rundt, hele året. 
Vores medarbejdere har hjertet på det rette sted og ønsker at gøre en forskel for vores borgere både ved at få dem til at føle sig trygge, glade og tilfredse. 

Vidste du, at hvis dig eller din pårørende er visiteret hjælp af kommunen kan du gratis vælge Svane Pleje?
Svane Pleje er et omkostningsfrit privat tilbud til visiterede borgere. Som borger har du frit valg omkring, hvilken godkendt leverandør af privat hjemmepleje, der skal levere hjælpen til dig.

Hos Svane Pleje får du:
Omsorgsfulde hjælpere med hjertet på rette sted
Smil og overskud, der gør hverdagen lidt sjovere
Et fast team af hjælpere
Fleksibel hjælp i forhold til dine ønsker og behov
Mulighed for tilkøb af pleje og praktisk hjælp

På vores hjemmeside kan du læse meget mere om os og finde kontaktoplysningerne til hver afdeling.
www.Svanepleje.dk
Vi glæder os til at høre fra dig.

Name: Truefitt & Hill Chicago
Description:
The oldest barbershop in the world

Truefitt & Hill is the oldest barbershop in the world, as certified by Guinness Book of World Records in April 2000. Truefitt was established in 1805 by William Francis Truefitt. Truefitt styled himself as hairdresser to the British Royal Court and the firm received their first Royal Warrant from King George III.

Truefitt & Hill has existed in the Chicago area for almost 25 years under different ownerships and locations. A barber named Kirk Marchant was the first owner to establish Truefitt & Hill in Chicago. After he passed away the barbershop location relocated to the loop under the ownership of Linda Mountford, who operated it with another partner. Linda is still involved in Truefitt & Hill as the products distributer in Canada.  During the covid pandemic of 2020, the loop location closed, but soon after Linda was able to transfer the ownership of the Chicago location to Azhar Kazim. Kazim still works and manages the Chicago locations and his family are actively involved in the business, including their son Yousef, who has an english and a middle eastern heritage.

Description:

These thoughtfully curated collections not only support the growth of emerging beauty brands but also provide clients with fresh and exciting options to explore.

Mission Statement: 
Our mission is simple; to offer accessible, high-quality solutions that inspire and enhance the beauty and well-being of our customers through curated selections from African-owned/inspired brands. 

Vision Statement:
We envision KOR. Beauty as a leading global platform that redefines beauty and wellness standards. Our vision is to create a world where self-care is a seamless and enjoyable part of daily life, where individuals fully embrace their unique beauty.

By championing the growth of both local and international beauty brands, we strive to build a community that celebrates diversity, authenticity, and holistic well-being. KOR. Beauty aspires to be the trusted partner in every individual’s self-care journey.

Our Approach: 
What we don't master, we seek from experts. We are committed to delivering the best for our brand and the experiences we offer. We are enriched by the expertise of top professionals—skincare experts, nutritionists, fitness gurus—and by partnering with ally brands featured on our website and in our pop-up stores.

Through our offerings, we aim to empower individuals to discover and embrace their own beauty rituals while providing a supportive platform for African beauty brands to thrive.

If this resonates with you, you're welcome to join us on this journey. 

Welcome to the KORmmunity!

Name: PHD Hair Restoration Systems
Description:
PHD Hair Systems was founded in 1999 in Greece and is a hair system design, maintenance and repair company with professional experience since 1982 in the treatment of hair loss and all types of alopecia. PHD 4th Generation Hair Restoration Systems provide painless methods, immediate and fully effective.
It offers prosthetic hair services, online hair systems, instant thickening, hair transplantation and hairstyling.

Its headquarters reside in Athens and its collaborations take place in Greece and abroad. It also provides the possibility of remote hair maintenance such as E-shop deliveries and also consulting for the preparation and installation of each system.
To this day, owns 25 years of pioneering hair restoration, more than 10.000 hair system applications, 6 highly trained Hair System Experts and 13 ready-to-use hair system models in multiple versions!

The renovated "PHD Hair System Lab", is a standard hair system design laboratory with all the necessary specifications to upgrade the client's new image. The aim of the company is to treat any kind of serious problem, such as alopecia, thinning hair due to medical conditions, hair loss due to an accident or chemotherapy.

The hair systems can be applied to everyone, regardless of gender or age. They are suitable in cases of injuries or other ailments. They are also ideal for patients who have undergone chemotherapy.

Its range includes a large collection of products from the greatest and most specialized suppliers in the market. This offers the possibility for care, maintenance, styling and care products, specially adapted to each case of a hair system.
Its main advantage is that it has the most competitive prices on the market, consistent fees and high-quality services.

At PHD, we treat each case with detail and care from start to finish. We believe in reviving every individual with beautiful, natural hair that will restore lost confidence and bring out the best version of themselves.

Name: Symbol Family Support Services Ltd
Description:
Symbol provides the following services:

THERAPY SERVICES
Symbol has one of the largest teams of Speech and Language Therapists in the UK offering specialist assessment, intervention, training and consultancy for children and adults with special needs.  In addition, Symbol also employs Social Workers, Clinical Psychologists, Occupational Therapists, Behavioural Therapists and Nurses in its Family Assessment Services.  Symbol is increasingly deploying expertise from these valuable in-house therapeutic resources across all its activities giving Symbol a unique offer to the people who use and buy its services.  

FAMILY ASSESSMENT CENTRE
Symbol operates up to 10 places for parents with learning disabilities undertaking a parenting assessment and intervention service (Commissioned by the Family Law Courts and Local Authority Children’s Services) and provides 9 families with longer-term specialist parenting support in the community post-assessment.

DAY OPPORTUNITIES (HOPYARD SERVICES)
Symbol supports 54 people with learning disabilities in a range of meaningful activities to promote skills in work, learning and leisure operating out of 2 separate sites in Kent.

SUPPORTED LIVING
Symbol currently supports 50 people with learning disabilities living in 15 different ordinary houses where they live as tenants.  This service is growing rapidly in response to local demand.

SHORT BREAKS/RESPITE CARE
Symbol is working with 35 young people and adults providing regular short breaks.  The demand for this service is also growing.  We have the facility to support up to 13 people at any one time. 

COMMUNITY SUPPORT
Symbol supports 8 people living in their own homes on a peripatetic basis.

FONCTIONS DE L'AQUAPURE II

Rajeunissement de la peau
Exfoliation et extraction en profondeur
Texture de la peau

Blanchiment de la peau
Booster de peau

Détente de la peau
POINTS FORTS

1. Exfoliation profonde avec la technologie AD Peel 

La technologie AD Peel créée des canaux sur la peau afin d'améliorer l'application de solutions et de maximiser les effets de la microdermabrasion.

- Nouvelle technologie AD Peel améliorée : Le concept avancé de la technologie AD (Aqua+Diamond). Peel améliore rapidement l'exfoliation et l'extraction, réduisant ainsi la durée du traitement.

- Technologie de contrôle des solutions précise : Utilise une valve de réglage stable pour assurer une distribution égale des solutions appliquées dans toutes les circonstances de traitement.

Our mission:

- Provide quality and professional care and service delivery as a significant provider of disability services in Western Australia.

- Provide an environment which allows our NDIS Participants to fulfill their goals within a home-like environment based on a Person-Centred Approach to needs.

- Undertake all our responsibilities within our quality systems framework whilst embracing the philosophy of continuous improvement in all we do.

Our vision:

- To promote, protect and ensure full and equal enjoyment of all fundamental human rights for all persons with disability, whilst respecting their inherent dignity.

Our values:

- We respect individual autonomy inclusive of freedom to make one's own choices and the independence of persons.

- We encourage full and effective participation and inclusion in society.

- We respect each individual's difference and accept persons with disabilities as part of human diversity and humanity.

- We support equality between men, women and LGBTQA+ staff and participants

- We respect the rights of persons with disabilities to preserve their identities.

Bizim hikayemiz, güzelliğe farklı bir bakış açısıyla yaklaşmamız ve dünyayı tüketilecek bir yer olarak değil, çok değerli bir kaynak olarak görmemizle başladı. Bu konuda bir şeyler yapmamız gerektiğini fark ederek yeni bir cilt bakımı vizyonunu hayata geçirmeye karar verdik.
Bu noktaya varmamız bir yolculuktu, birçok farklı ülkede, yüzlerce farklı bölge ve kültürlerdeki kişisel bakım, süreç, beklenti ve motivasyonlarını inceledik.
Yıllar süren Ar-Ge ,Ür-Ge ve Laboratuvar süreçlerinden sonra; edindiğimiz bu kıymetli bilgi havuzunu, çok değer verdiğimiz kullanıcılarımızın iç görüleri ile harmanladıktan sonra, ürünlerimizi sadece cildimize fayda sağlayacak bir kişisel bakım ürünü olarak düşünmeyip; aynı zamanda ruhumuzu dinginleştiren, iç dünyamıza ışık tutan, bizi huzurlu hissettiren ve mevcut dünyevi koşulların oluşturduğu yoğun streslerden arındıran formülasyonu ile mutlu sona ulaştık.
Ve işte karşınızda;  Beauty&More - The GemStone Theraphy
Her bir değerli taş kullanıldığı kozmetik ürününe kendi karakterini de verir, çünkü her bir taş kendi özünde benzersiz bir mineral içeriğe sahiptir. Modern kozmetikte değerli taşlar cilt üzerinde oldukça etkisi olduğu bilinen minerallerden oluşmaktadır. Minerallerin vücudumuzun tamamında cilt yolu ile emilebilir olması bize bütünsel bir bakım sağlar. Mineral taşların bozulma risklerinin olmaması da taşlara olan güvenimizi daha da kalıcı kılmaktadır.
Serimizi oluştururken; her bir değerli taşın özel olarak seçilip, “formüle uygun taş değil de taşa uygun formül” oluşturma prensibi ile hareket ettiğimizi belirtmek ve dünyanın bize sunmuş olduğu zenginliklerin cildimizde de ruhumuzda da en üst seviyede etkisini gösterebilmek için uzun yıllardır çalıştığımızı bilmenizi isteriz. 

Sen de Değerli Taşların Mucizevi Gücünü Keşfetmeye Hazır Mısın?

In 2026, our focus is clear.
We are strengthening our commitment to high-quality, responsive home care that supports people through:
• Everyday living at home
• Safe transitions home from hospital
• Short-term recovery and reablement
• Longer-term support for ageing well

Our services are practical, personalised, and delivered with dignity and consistency, including nursing care, personal care, medication support, wound care, transport to appointments and help at home with everyday tasks.

Name: MoveHs Hair Solutions
Description:
Viola en Davy Devries zijn de oprichtsters van MoveHs Hair Solutions. Zij heeft zelf een moeizame weg doorlopen met haar haarverlies. Op haar 17e werd zij voor het eerst geconfronteerd met Alopecia Areata, waarbij ze al haar haar verloor. In de loop der jaren kwam het haar weer terug, maar viel het ook weer meerdere keren uit, totdat het chronisch werd. Het haarprobleem bleek erg grillig vooral in het beginstadium. Viola heeft veel onderzoeken ondergaan bij dermatologen en Academische Ziekenhuizen. Daar werd geen aandacht besteed aan de psychische impact van het haarverlies. Een andere gezichtuitdrukking en uiterlijk, het leren omgaan met je onzekerheid, zoeken naar een haaroplossing en goede haarwerker, een web van pruikenleveranciers en haarwerkbedrijven. 

In de loop der jaren heeft Viola verschillende soorten haaroplossingen uitgeprobeerd. Ze heeft onderzoek gedaan in binnen- en buitenland, meegewerkt aan het ontwikkelen van betere en nieuwe haar concepten. De insteek hiervan was en is: ”geen  verschil zien tussen het haarwerk en je eigen haar”. Weer jezelf kunnen zijn, je veilig voelen, en met zelfvertrouwen weer meedoen en participeren zoals voorheen, zonder je beperkt te voelen. Met haar ervaringen en kennis geeft Viola MoveHs op transparante wijze vorm. Zij denkt mee, adviseert en zoekt naar een passende oplossing voor iedereen die met een haar probleem worstelt.

Davy werkt meer op de achtergrond in ontwikkeling en verbetering van het draagcomfort. De medische kapconstructie van het MoveHs label is een systeem wat je niet meer voelt bij het dragen. Voordat er een nieuwe collectie van het MoveHs label op de markt komt, is het getest door een team van vijf vrouwen met verschillende jobs en invullingen van hun hobby’s. Davy geeft ook diverse cursussen aan kappers die geïnteresseerd zijn om haarwerken en haarstukken van het MoveHs label op te nemen in hun organisatie.

Stress isn’t just something you feel. It’s something that runs your life. And the worst part? You don’t even realize it.

You wake up overwhelmed. You push through exhaustion. You struggle to rest.
You think this is just the cost of ambition, responsibility, or success.
But the truth is, stress isn’t a response—it’s a habit. A deeply wired pattern that controls your thoughts, emotions, and decisions every single day.

And like any habit, it can be unlearned.

 NO STRESS Community is the first structured, science-backed space where you don’t just manage stress—you reprogram it.
 Anonymous participation – No judgment, just real transformation.
 A structured process – Step-by-step rewiring of your stress response.
 Proven methodology – Not vague advice, but actionable change.

Our Clients & Residents

Our Staff & Training
Health & Safety Cleaning, Laundry & Gardening
Our Social Responsibility
Our Environmental Responsibility
Legal & Industry Specific Requirements

Our core values determine our company culture and priorities, it supports our vision of who we are and why we do what we do. They are the essence or DNA of our company's identity - our principles, beliefs and philosophies.

Name: Virgola Salon
Description:
𝗠𝗜𝗟𝗔𝗡𝗢-𝗪𝗔𝗧𝗔𝗠𝗨 // 𝘓𝘢 𝘯𝘰𝘴𝘵𝘳𝘢 𝘴𝘵𝘰𝘳𝘪𝘢, 𝘳𝘢𝘤𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘢𝘵𝘢 𝘢𝘵𝘵𝘳𝘢𝘷𝘦𝘳𝘴𝘰 𝘪 𝘯𝘰𝘴𝘵𝘳𝘪 𝘱𝘳𝘰𝘥𝘰𝘵𝘵𝘪 𝘦 𝘪𝘭 𝘯𝘰𝘴𝘵𝘳𝘰 𝘭𝘦𝘨𝘢𝘮𝘦 𝘤𝘰𝘯 𝘶𝘯𝘢 𝘵𝘦𝘳𝘳𝘢 𝘭𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘢𝘯𝘢 𝘮𝘢 𝘷𝘪𝘤𝘪𝘯𝘢 𝘢𝘭 𝘤𝘶𝘰𝘳𝘦.

Virgola nasce nel 1978 in un piccolo salone di via Compagnoni a Milano.

Fin dall’inizio Rinaldo Rampon, suo fondatore, si impegna a costruire una propria visione del lifestyle femminile: scommette sull’innovazione e sui giovani talenti, aprendo le porte a nuove idee e regalando voce a collaboratori divenuti icone nel mondo dei parrucchieri. 

“𝗕𝗲 𝗗𝗶𝗳𝗳𝗲𝗿𝗲𝗻𝘁”, essere diversi ma al contempo essere sé stessi, è questa la filosofia che accompagna da sempre il mondo Virgola e che ha suggerito lo studio e la realizzazione di una 𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗮 𝗱𝗶 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝗼𝘁𝘁𝗶 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶 𝗽𝗲𝗿 𝗰𝗮𝗽𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗶 ispirata al Kenya e al piccolo paese di Watamu.

𝗜𝗹 𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗺𝗲 𝗰𝗼𝗻 𝗹’𝗔𝗳𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗮 𝗲̀ 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗲 𝗲 𝘁𝗮𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗲, dalle origini swahili dei nomi dei prodotti alla scelta dei colori che ne richiamano la natura, ma non solo. 

Il Kenya è conosciuto anche per i suoi splendidi tessuti KIKOI e KANGA utilizzati dal brand per la creazione di 𝘢𝘤𝘤𝘦𝘴𝘴𝘰𝘳𝘪 e piccole 𝘣𝘢𝘨𝘴 porta-prodotti, realizzate dagli artigiani di Watamu.

Oggi Virgola presenta 𝗱𝘂𝗲 𝘀𝗮𝗹𝗼𝗻𝗶 𝗻𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗮 𝗰𝗶𝘁𝘁𝗮̀ 𝗱𝗶 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗼: 
- Virgola Salon, in P.zzle Lavater 2 
- Virgola Salon, in via G. Zanella 68

Name: New Wave Care
Description:
New Wave Care is not just another NDIS provider; we spark possibilities. We turn dreams into action, challenges into opportunities, and everyday moments into something extraordinary. Every participant, every staff member, and every connection is at the heart of absolutely everything we do. We believe that support is more than just a service. It’s a chance to empower, inspire, and create real impact in people’s lives and that is why we love what we do. 

From the Sunshine Coast to North Brisbane, we are building relationships that go beyond traditional care. We take the time to get to know each participant personally, understanding their goals, passions, and unique needs. This approach extends to our team, who don’t just follow plans, they collaborate, innovate, and create tailored experiences that genuinely make our participant's lives better.

What makes New Wave Care different? It’s simple: we are a movement, not just a provider. We’re committed to creating a culture where participants are supported to dream big, where staff are valued, supported and empowered, and where families, allied health professionals, and coordinators feel connected and confident in the services we provide. We focus on possibilities, not limitations, and believe that every moment has the potential to be extraordinary.

Choosing New Wave Care means choosing a team that genuinely cares, that listens, and that goes the extra mile. It means choosing a provider that doesn’t just meet expectations, we reimagine what support can be, creating real impact for participants, their families, and our broader community.

We’re not riding the wave of change; we’re making the waves.

Name: Asian Blend Spa
Description:
Asian Blend Spa is a company based out of City of Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa.
Whether you're seeking relief from muscle tension, stress reduction, or simply pampering escape, Asian Blend Spa Home of Tranquility offers Hilot Therapy a traditional Filipino healing technique that has been practices for centuries. It is considered the country's ancient art of healing and is deeply rooted in Filipino culture. The word " hilot" comes from Filipino language and means "to knead" or "to heal by touch". Asian Blend Spa is the first Filipino Massage Spa in Cape town offering quality massage treatments that Filipino therapists are known for their dedication to their craft and their ability to provide personalized care to their clients. They undergo comprehensive training in various massage modalities and deeper relaxation.
Asian Blend Spa Home of Tranquility is a renowned spa that specializes in offering a unique and rejuvenating experience inspired by Philippine massage methodologies. The spa is dedicated to providing serene and calming environment where guests can escape the stresses of everyday life and indulge in the healing benefits of traditional Asian massages.  In 2023, Asian Blend Spa was honored as the winner of the Best in Travel and Hospitality Awards by a UK board. This prestigious recognition acknowledges the spa's exceptional services and contributions to the travel and hospitality industry. Aside from this Marketing Excellence Awards 6th Annual African Awards in South Africa recognized Asian Blend Spa as one of the victors: Best in Personal Massage & Mobility Clinic 2023.
Location: City of Cape Town, Western Cape

Name: Mijn Huidcoach
Description:
Welkom bij de pagina van Mijn Huidcoach! 

Ik ben gespecialiseerd in professionele huidverbetering en (semi) permanente make-up. Ik coach mijn cliënten in mijn praktijk naar een verzorgde, mooiere en stralende huid. Mijn behandelingen zijn gericht op een zichtbare en blijvende huidverbetering met (semi) permanente make-up als kers op de taart. Mijn cliënten stappen na een huidverbeteringscoachtraject weer met een frisse en zelfverzekerde uitstraling door het leven. 

De producten die ik gebruik, zijn merken met hoogwaardige en natuurlijke ingrediënten die diep in de huid doordringen en daar allerlei processen aan het werk zetten. Ik richt me op de professionele vakvrouw die zich ervan bewust is dat zij met een frisse uitstraling zelfbewust voor de dag kan komen. Wil jij ook met huidverbetering aan de slag en een verzorgde en frisse indruk achter laten bij je klanten en je collega's? 

Neem dan contact op voor een huidverbeteradvies op maat via info@mijnhuidcoach.nl.

We offer a diverse range of beauty treatments, including facial massages, haircuts, spa treatments, laser hair removal and nail services. Tailored especially for women, our exclusive SPA and Beauty Center provides luxurious experiences such as soap massages, body scrubs, steam rooms, saunas, hamams, and jacuzzis with options for both cold and hot baths. Guests are also welcome to unwind in our relaxation zone, enjoy beverages from the pool bar, and explore our full range of beauty services.

As we grow our network, our commitment remains to impress our guests daily with exceptional services in a comfortable environment where beauty and relaxation converge. Whether you're looking for a place to spend time with friends and family or a personal haven for rejuvenation, VICCI Beauty Bar is dedicated to providing perfectly tailored services for a refreshing, revitalizing, and relaxing experience in both Phnom Penh and Poipet.

Name: Yorkshire and The Humber Care Association Alliance
Description:
YHCAA is a collaborative alliance of eight care associations across our region, working together to provide a strong, united voice for independent, private, and VCSE adult social care providers. As proud members of the Care Association Alliance, we are committed to improving the experience of everyone who accesses or works in social care.
Our member associations are:
 Bradford Care Association (BCA)
 Hull and East Riding Care Association (HERCA)
 Independent Care Group (ICG) 
 Kirklees and Calderdale Care Association (KirCCA)  
 Leeds Care Association (LCA)
 North and North East Lincolnshire Care Association (NELCA)
 Sheffield Care Association (SCA)
 Wakefield Independent Sector Liaison Group (ISLG)
We work closely together towards an improved social care and health experience for every person who accesses services or works in the care sector.
We aim to:
- Work collaboratively to provide one strong voice for independent, private and VCSE Adult Social Care providers across Yorkshire and the Humber
- Ensure residents in Yorkshire and the Humber receive high quality care from well-trained knowledgeable staff who feel valued for what they do.
- Be a strategic partner organisation, liaising with Yorkshire and the Humber Social Care and Health partners and senior leaders to influence care sector decision making.

Description:

Name: Steps Ahead Care & Support Ltd
Description:
Steps Ahead Care & Support are Care Management specialists for those with Acquired Brain Injuries, Spinal Injuries & behaviours that challenge. 

Over the last 15 years, we have worked closely with multidisciplinary teams to facilitate tailored rehabilitation programmes, ensuring the people we support are able to live as independently as possible and to reach their individualised goals. We pride ourselves on our bespoke, person centred service, which is achieved by working closely with each client, their relatives, support team and relevant professionals. 

As well as care management, we are an established provider of agency staff to registered organisations. We specialise in providing highly skilled staff to organisations who support people with an acquired brain injuries, learning disability, mental health, autistic spectrum, physical disabilities and spinal injuries. 

We provide a 24 hour on call service which operates 365 days a year, which is managed by one of our experienced team who will be familiar with each organisations individual requirements and the support staff who best compliment your existing team.

Whether you require long term cover or your requirements are more ad-hoc, Steps Ahead Care & Support are able to offer an exceptional service with the highest calibre of staff for more information on the service we can offer you please contact us on 01752 547257 where we will be happy to assist.

In 2018, we received our second consecutive Outstanding Award from CQC, you can read our report here - https://www.cqc.org.uk/location/1-110439732

VISIE

Description:

Name: Man O'Clock
Description:
Man O’Clock is a corporately owned, multi-location premium grooming brand in Canada, offering high-quality hair, skin, and grooming services through a consistent, customer-first approach.

Founded in April 2023, the brand has grown from its first location to four Man O’Clock Barbershops and one TVAM Salon | Barber | Spa.

Today, Man O’Clock services 60,000+ clients annually, has earned 5,800+ customer reviews, and has been recognized as Best Business of the Year.

Focused on quality, inclusivity, and modern grooming experiences, Man O’Clock continues to build trusted destinations for personal care across the Greater Toronto Area.

Name: Ted's Grooming Room
Description:
Growing up accompanying his father to the barbers, Ted was surrounded by discerning gents getting their follicles whipped into place. It was its own world, where everyone chatted like old friends and escaped their everyday routine. He always knew he wanted to recreate this moment, and so, Ted’s Grooming Room was born – A barber inspired by quintessential British style and his global explorations.

He embarked on a worldwide exploration in the hope of chancing upon an impeccable trim. When he landed in Istanbul, he heard whispers of the Sultan of close cuts. Rumour had it he gave the cleanest and smartest shaves in the world, with the simple flick of a blade. Ted found the legendary barbershop nestled down a backstreet and took a seat, putting his beard in the hands of a man wielding a double-edge sword.

He was then smothered with a hot towel and splashed with aftershave. When a flaming stick was waved around his face and his ears, he had this bright idea: he had to bring these dapper-dos with a side of thrill to London.

As you take a seat at Ted’s Grooming Room, you’ll be treated to this authentic experience of prestigious Turkish skill, down to the massage, the hot towel service and ear-flaming, of course. Whether you want the Full Ted Service, or to Cut a Long Story Short, Ted’s got you covered.

In 2008, the first Ted’s Grooming Room opened and Ted’s highly-skilled family grew. It wasn’t long before men were leaving with the smartest shaves London had ever seen; a blend of Turkish skills and British style.

Your follicles will have never looked so trim and proper.

Name: Hinaiti Official
Description:
Pure Beauty from French Polynesia 

À propos de nous :

Bienvenue chez HINAITI, la marque de soins capillaires innovante qui célèbre la beauté polynésienne. Inspirés par les trésors naturels de Tahiti, nos produits de qualité sont conçus pour offrir des soins uniques, de haute qualité et efficaces tout en respectant l'environnement.

Notre mission :

Chez HINAITI, nous croyons en la puissance de la nature. Nos soins sont formulés sans sulfates, sans silicones, sans gluten, sans sodium, sans parabènes et sans phtalates, et sont également sans cruauté animale. Chaque produit regorge de bienfaits pour hydrater, nourrir et équilibrer vos cheveux et votre cuir chevelu. Parceque la nature Polynésienne n’a pas d’équivalent au monde.

Notre histoire :

HINAITI est fondée par Janick Ducret, qui, après plus de 10 ans d’expérience dans le marketing de la beauté, apporte une vision unique à la marque. Name: scrub box
Description:
Skabt af naturen. Håndrørt af dig. 

scrub box bygger på en higen efter at ville vide, hvad vi putter på vores hud. Helt grundlæggende tror jeg på, at hvis noget er naturligt, kan du sagtens lave det selv. scrub box er en boks med alt, du skal bruge for at blande en naturlig body scrub, der eksfolierer, nærer og genopbygger huden. Boksen danner rammerne om en rolig stund, hvor du kan fordybe dig og fokusere på at give din hud, krop og sind den omsorg, det fortjener. 

En scrub box består af simple ingredienser, som gør store underværker. Fælles for dem er, at de er udvalgt med omhyggelighed, nysgerrighed og kærlighed.

Hav et rart bad <3 

Kærligst,
Sophia

Name: Coiffure Mac 3000
Description:
Fondée en 1972, notre entreprise de coiffure est une véritable référence dans l'industrie de la beauté et du style. Forts de plusieurs décennies d'expérience, nous avons su évoluer avec les tendances et les besoins de nos clients tout en maintenant une qualité de service exceptionnelle. Spécialisés dans les coiffures pour hommes et femmes, nous avons acquis une expertise inégalée dans l'art de la coiffure, de la coupe classique à la création audacieuse.

Au fil des années, nous avons établi une réputation solide en tant qu'artisans de la coiffure, alliant créativité et technique pour offrir à nos clients des résultats impeccables. Notre équipe de coiffeurs chevronnés est passionnée par leur métier et s'engage à créer des looks personnalisés qui reflètent la personnalité et le style unique de chaque individu.

En plus de nos services en salon, nous avons élargi notre champ d'action en proposant des services de coiffure à domicile et en entreprise. Nous comprenons l'importance de la flexibilité et du confort pour nos clients, c'est pourquoi nous avons mis en place ce service pour répondre à leurs besoins, que ce soit pour une coupe rapide avant une réunion ou une transformation complète dans le confort de leur propre espace.

Notre héritage de 50 ans dans l'industrie de la coiffure nous motive à continuer d'innover et d'inspirer. Nous sommes fiers de jouer un rôle clé dans la confiance et l'estime de soi de nos clients en créant des looks qui reflètent leur style de vie et leurs aspirations. Que ce soit pour une coupe classique intemporelle ou une tendance contemporaine, notre équipe dévouée est prête à transformer chaque séance de coiffure en une expérience mémorable et gratifiante.

Name: Mecasa
Description: Mecasa vermittelt Betreuungskräfte aus dem Ausland an hilfsbedürftige Senioren für die Grundpflege, Haushaltsführung und Alltagsbegleitung. Hohe Versorgungsqualität und faire Arbeitsbedingungen stehen für uns an erster Stelle. Zu diesem Zweck hat Mecasa den ersten DIN-Standard für die sogenannte 24-Stunden Pflege angestoßen und diesen als Gremiumsleiter gemeinsam mit Stiftung Warentest und Pflegewissenschaftlern entwickelt. Mecasa ist als erster Vermittler von DEKRA nach der DIN SPEC 33454 zertifiziert. Für unser mit Prof. Hagemann von der Universität Heidelberg entwickeltes Auswahlverfahren wurde Mecasa unter anderem vom Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) in Boston ausgezeichnet. Außerdem wird Mecasa von der Europäischen Union im Rahmen des Horizon 2020 Programms gefördert und ist Mitglied des EU-Forschungsnetzwerks EIT Health.

Name: Melbec Microbiology Ltd
Description:
Melbec Microbiology are a UKAS accredited testing laboratory (8615) servicing the cosmetic & personal care, household & biocidal, antimicrobial textiles and antibacterial wound dressings industries.  Our team has many years of industry experience, in both microbiology analysis and in manufacturing environments. This experience means that at Melbec, we really understand your products and the service that you need.

Our services include:
•	Suspension testing for antibacterial / antifungal / sporicidal claim support, e.g. BS EN 1276, BS EN 1650
•	In-vivo volunteer tests for hand washes/hand rubs, e.g. BS EN 1499, BS EN 1500
•	Chemical disinfectant evaluations, e.g. BS EN 13697
•	QC / Batch release testing (AMB/Y&M counts), e.g. BS ISO 21149, ISO 16212
•	Challenge / Preservative Efficacy testing, e.g. ISO 11930, Pharma
•	Assessment of antimicrobial wound dressings, e.g. prEN 16756
•	Assessment of antimicrobial activity of textiles to recognised test methods, e.g. AATCC 100 & 147, ASTM E2149, ISO 20743, JIS L 1902

At Melbec, we pride ourselves on understanding our clients and their products, and we work closely with them to achieve meaningful outcomes from appropriate testing.   In this regard, we have devised bespoke methods with many clients in order from them to assess their products in the most suitable, and meaningful, manner.

Dawn, and indeed all of us at Melbec, are committed to the provision of an excellent service experience to enable us to build long lasting working relationships with our clients.

If you'd like to learn more about how we can help you, or to discuss your testing requirements, please do not hesitate to contact us.  We look forward to hearing from you.

Tel:     01706 214 492
Email: info@melbecmicrobiology.co.uk
