Name: Zemé Fresh
Description:
We are India's 1st brand that provides completely chemical-free beauty services at home.

Our Process:
We make fresh hair & skin products in our kitchen, under the guidance of Ayurvedic doctors. Our trained beauticians deliver services at home (like Facial & Hair Spa) using our freshly made products. 

Why is fresh important? 
Like fresh food is better for health, fresh beauty products are better for our hair & skin. Each time we use any product, our skin absorbs some of it. So it is safest to use fresh products, that contain no chemicals. 

Our grandmothers used pastes of herbs like reetha, shikaka, amla, besan, haldi, chandan right? One big reason why they had great hair & skin is because of pure, fresh products they used. 

Try our services done with our own fresh, safe products & see the difference for yourself!

Name: Drive Your Freedom
Description:
Hi there, I am Julie and I currently live in New Zealand. I grew up in Samoa and loved the freedom we had as kids, swimming, sports and exploring. We didn’t have much materially but we made the most of our imaginations and landscape, making our own fun. 

Now a mother of 4, I realise that I want to be able to offer a life like I had to my children, not so easy in this day and age though….and when I retire, I want to be able to do so without worrying about trying to survive on the pension….

I work full time in Human Resources, and in between working long hours and juggling mine and my kid’s life, we have very little time to stop and just take a breath! It sometimes makes me forget that life is precious and so is time with my family and our friends.

I guess I was feeling slightly burnt out with my lifestyle, surely it doesn’t always have to be this way I thought?

This started my journey, trying to find something, a business, that I could do from home.  One that didn’t require me to have any industry experience and would give me the tools to help me succeed as I already knew I had the drive and determination. 

By chance I came across this business, thought it seemed an amazing opportunity to change my way of life and so I have given it a go……and it hasn’t disappointed me yet….Best part is it is accessible wherever I am, using my laptop or mobile phone to connect….

So far, the personal development I have gained from being involved in this business has been transformational. We all need to press that reset button and this was mine, I felt I could breathe again.

Being in a business with likeminded individuals is refreshing, exceptional training and support is provided which has seen me progress both personally and financially. 

I invite you to find out more....

Name: AMI Kappers
Description:
Lekker in je haar met AMI Kappers

Elk mens is uniek. Jouw kapsel is dan ook heel persoonlijk. Wat wel voor iedereen geldt: met mooi haar voel jij je op je best. Soms kan het vinden van een kapsel waar jij blij van wordt een hele zoektocht zijn. Gelukkig zijn daar onze AMI vakmensen! Bij onze salons stap je vol zelfvertrouwen, volledig ontspannen en stralend naar buiten. Wij zorgen ervoor dat jij altijd lekker in je haar zit.

Al bijna vijftig jaar staan wij voor inspirerend haaradvies in een prettige omgeving. In de stoel bij onze vakvrouwen of vakmannen wordt er met je meegedacht, naar je geluisterd en op basis van jouw stijl en wensen een coupe gecreëerd die echt bij je past. We weten alles van de laatste haartrends en technieken, zodat we jou kunnen voorzien van eerlijk en goed advies. Door altijd net dat beetje meer te geven, proberen we van elk salonbezoek iets onvergetelijks te maken. 

AMI Kappers telt ruim 100 salons in Nederland. Je vindt dus altijd een salon bij jou in de buurt. Daarnaast is AMI Kappers de eerste kappersorganisatie met een eigen haarmodelijn, een eigen professionele haarverzorgingslijn IVY Hair Care, een webshop én een eigen AMI Academie, waar al onze haarstylisten getraind worden. 

Dus zoek je een vertrouwde plek waar je met een goed gevoel in de stoel kunt kruipen bij één van onze haarspecialisten? Onze vakmensen staan graag voor je klaar. Met of zonder afspraak, altijd bereikbaar!

Name: Barbearia Corleone
Description:
Barbearia Corleone. Aqui, cada cadeira tem história.

Desde 2014, a Barbearia Corleone é referência no segmento de alto padrão no Brasil. Mais do que cortes de cabelo e barbas, oferecemos uma experiência que une tradição, excelência e estilo.

Um espaço onde cada detalhe importa — da luz à música, do atendimento ao serviço. Onde homens encontram mais do que estética. Encontram um ritual. Um cuidado que faz parte de quem são.

Em muitas de nossas unidades, esse momento se estende ao nosso bar de coquetéis clássicos — um convite à pausa, à conversa e à elegância de um bom drinque no tempo certo.

Nosso time é formado por profissionais que passam por treinamentos constantes, mantendo técnica, excelência e consistência. Aqui, excelência não é promessa. É entrega.

Nossos serviços incluem:
• Corte de cabelo
• Barba clássica Corleone
• Tratamentos capilares e terapias no lavatório
• Massagens relaxantes e quick massage
• Podologia masculina

E em breve, apresentamos a Corleone Kids, um salão infantil unissex que leva nosso padrão de excelência às próximas gerações.

Com unidades em Itaim Bibi, Morumbi e Faria Lima, seguimos crescendo com o mesmo compromisso desde o primeiro dia: excelência, tradição e uma experiência que faz parte do estilo de vida de quem entende a diferença.

Para nós, barbearia não é só serviço. É um ritual. É sobre estilo, identidade e respeito por quem sabe o valor de se cuidar.

Barbearia Corleone. Seu horário. Seu ritual. Seu espaço.

Name: Ambulanter Pflegedienst Hand in Hand GmbH
Description:
Hand in Hand steht für Rundum-Pflege für Neckar-Odenwald, Bayerischen Odenwald, Taubertal und Jagsttal. 

Aus unserer Region, für unsere Region.

Wir wissen, dass es gerade bei älteren und kranken Menschen Überwindung braucht, sich einem professionellen Pflegedienst anzuvertrauen. Deshalb legen wir neben unserer fachlichen Qualifikation und kompetenten Leistungen größten Wert darauf, einen einfühlsamen, vertrauten Kontakt zu unseren Patienten aufzubauen. Wir stellen uns auf die individuellen Bedürfnisse jedes Einzelnen flexibel ein und berücksichtigen in unserer Planung immer die persönlichen Lebensgewohnheiten.

Wir begegnen jedem zu Pflegenden und deren Bezugsperson(en) mit Wertschätzung, Respekt und Empathie.

Was Hand in Hand besonders macht? Wir bieten alle Pflegeleistungen aus einer Hand.

Von Beginn an war das Ziel, mit Hand in Hand einen ambulanten „Full Service“ Pflegedienst anbieten zu können, welcher weit über die Leistungen des Sozialgesetzes (SGB XI und SGB V) hinaus gehen sollte.

Zu den Dienstleistungen gehören unter anderem Körperpflege, Behandlungspflege, Tagespflege, diverse Betreuungsleistungen bis hin zur 24-h-Betreuung, Hauswirtschaft, Einkaufsservice, Hausnotruf und Hausmeister-Service sowie „Essen auf Rädern“.

Unser preisgünstiges und stets frisch zubereitetes „Essen auf Rädern“ erfreut sich größter Beliebtheit und wird nicht nur von den Klienten, sondern auch von ortsansässigen Firmen und Privatpersonen gerne genutzt.

Moderne, abwechslungsreiche Tagespflege-Einrichtungen ergänzen mittlerweile die Standorte Buchen, Osterburken, Hardheim und demnächst auch Weilbach.

Mit „Service-Wohnen“ bieten wir seniorengerechte Mietwohnungen in Buchen und Hardheim an – und bald auch in Weilbach.

In Kooperation mit ProMedica – dem Marktführer bei der 24-h-Betreuung durch osteuropäische Fachkräfte – ermöglichen wir allen Pflegebdeürftigen eine bezahlbare, professionelle und legale 24-h-Betreuung.

Attraktive JOBS: karriere.pflegehih.de

Name: ennie (CARE24 GmbH)

ennie bietet eine digitale Plattform, die selbstständige Betreuungskräfte und Pflegebedürftige zusammenbringt – ganz ohne weitere Vermittler. Jede Betreuungskraft wird vorab geprüft, um eine bezahlbare, vertrauensvolle und qualitativ hochwertige Pflege zu gewährleisten.

Mit fairen Bedingungen für Pflegekräfte und bezahlbaren Kosten für Pflegesuchende bieten wir die bestmögliche 24-Stunden-Pflege in den eigenen vier Wänden. Es ist uns eine Herzensangelegenheit einen sicheren Rahmen für beide Seiten zu schaffen.

Bei ennie vermitteln wir Betreuungskräfte an betreuungssuchende Personen in wenigen, einfachen Schritten. Hohe Gebühren an Vermittler entfallen, was einerseits geringe Kosten und andererseits eine faire Vergütung ermöglicht. Unser Ziel ist hohe Transparenz und faire Bedingungen am Markt für Pflegekräfte und dadurch eine hochwertige, vertrauensvolle und langfristige Betreuung für alle, die sie brauchen.

Wir möchten einen neuen Standard für die 24-Stunden-Pflege zu Hause setzen, um den Pflegenotstand als eines der größten gesellschaftlichen Probleme Deutschlands anzugehen. Damit können wir älteren Menschen so lange wie möglich ein Leben zuhause zu ermöglichen.

Que sont les soins de support ? Ce sont tous les soins associés et complémentaires aux traitements de la maladie, permettant aux patients en ALD (Affection Longue Durée) d’être pris en charge différemment, dans un souci d’humanisation et de personnalisation du soin.

Les soins de support ont été conçus pour améliorer la qualité de vie des patients et rompre l’isolement. Grâce à ces soins et à la proximité des autres patients, ce sont d’autres liens qui s’instaurent.
Ils proposent un accès simplifié à des spécialités parfois méconnues.
Les soins prennent différentes formes pour sortir du tout-médicament. Ils permettent à chacun de se réconcilier avec son corps et de reprendre de l’assurance. Ils engendrent un changement de vécu de la maladie.

Most people talk to be heard.

This is not traditional coaching. This is not consulting. It’s something quieter, sharper, and far more personal.

I've spent years in the world of business, leadership, and human behavior — but it's not the knowledge that defines my work. It's the ability to hold space for people who rarely get to be fully heard. The ones who carry everything. The ones who are always "on." The ones who solve for everyone else — but quietly seek something of their own.

I work with individuals who are already exceptional. They're not looking for motivation. They're not broken. They're not stuck. They simply need a space where they can speak freely, without judgment or performance. A space where their thoughts can stretch, sharpen, and settle.

At Arslan Sajid & Co., I offer:

Private strategic conversations that cut through noise

Deep listening that reveals what even you may not have said out loud yet

Thought partnership for decision-makers with no room for fluff

A discreet relationship built entirely around your personal and professional evolution

There is no playbook. No formula.
Every engagement is custom, quiet, and focused on your unique path.

You may come with a challenge, a transition, a decision to make, or a sense that something is shifting inside you — even if the world only sees your success.

My clients are building companies, leading movements, creating art, managing wealth, or shaping industries. And behind all that, they are human beings seeking clarity, truth, and space to breathe.

This is that Space.

Name: Be.U
Description: Be.U's exclusive high-frequency ultrasounds promote skin permeation, making it possible to deliver optimal hydration and skin filling without any discomfort, inflammation, or other adverse reactions. Our proprietary technology utilizes a nanosecond laser impulse that is absorbed by customized materials, efficiently converting light into a high-impulse pressure wave (ultrasound). These high-frequency ultrasounds temporarily permeabilize the skin, facilitating the epidermal delivery of cosmetics (such as hyaluronic acid). This mechanism, patented by the University of Coimbra by inventors Luís Arnaut, Carlos Serpa, and Gonçalo de Sá, has been specifically designed for aesthetic treatments with hyaluronic acid at Be.U beauty corners.

Name: Kind To Ya Mind | Coaching
Description:
I believe that self-awareness, self-love and self-authority are vital to our wellness, body & mind.

My purpose as a Co-Active Coach is to guide you towards & throughout all three components, and empower you to reach your unique, personal goals.

"But Dajana, what on earth is Co-Active Coaching?"

Well, to put it plainly: It's a coaching model based on the belief that nobody needs "fixing". Most of the time, all we need to do is get out of our own way.

Now, HOW to do that is where a lot of people get stuck.

During sessions, I offer you a safe space to explore your values, needs and desires; as well as your inner critic and the limiting beliefs that are holding you back.

Because as human beings, we are all naturally creative, resourceful and whole -- which means we are naturally capable of doing whatever the hell we put our minds to. 

Sometimes we just need a little bit of guidance, encouragement & accountability to get out of our own way... 

And that's where I come in.

Name: Donnington Laboratories Limited
Description:
Donnington Laboratories is a CLAS approved, independent contract laboratory with over 25 years’ experience in supporting producers of all sizes, from sole traders to international corporations. We specialise in the microbiological testing of cosmetics, personal care, household products, foods, and environmental monitoring. 

Founded in 2000, our goal has always been to use our industry knowledge to improve the quality and safety of products for the consumer on behalf of our clients, and to build strong working relationships with our clients to provide a service that can always be relied upon. We help problem solve, limit risks, and do good science. 

We strive to offer an efficient and flexible service to support our clients' individual needs. At the core of our business we value accurate and reliable data and we believe there is no substitute for this.  

We test to ISO and pharmacopoeia standards in the following areas:
Batch release | Challenge testing | Swabbing | Air Quality Monitoring | Microbial investigations | Hygiene audits | Stability trials | Shelf life trials

If you would like more information about our testing services or to submit an enquiry, please visit our website www.donlab.co.uk or feel free to email in to testing@donlab.co.uk.

Name: Care at Home Schweiz GmbH

Verlässliche Unterstützung und Selbstbestimmung im Alltag

Ihre Selbstbestimmung ist dabei unser oberstes Gebot: Wir planen unsere Unterstützung gemeinsam mit Ihnen und fördern Ihre Unabhängigkeit, damit Sie Ihr Leben aktiv nach Ihren Vorstellungen gestalten können.

2. Vertrauen durch Kontinuität und Verlässlichkeit
Vertrauen entsteht durch Beständigkeit. Daher ist es unser Ziel, Ihnen wenn möglich immer die gleiche Betreuungsperson zur Seite zu stellen. Diese Kontinuität schafft ein stabiles Vertrauensverhältnis, sorgt für Sicherheit und gewährleistet eine gleichbleibend hohe Qualität der Betreuung.

3. Engagierte Qualität durch intrinsische Motivation
Die Qualität unserer Betreuungs- und Hauswirtschaftsleistungen ist für uns selbstverständlich. Was uns jedoch besonders macht, ist die intrinsische Motivation unseres Teams. Unsere Mitarbeitenden engagieren sich aus Überzeugung und Verantwortung, um einen positiven und stabilisierenden Beitrag in Ihrem Alltag zu leisten.

Name: Ambulanter Pflegedienst Hand in Hand GmbH
Description:
Hand in Hand steht für Rundum-Pflege im Odenwald & Taubertal. Aus unserer Region, für unsere Region – für Pflegebedürftige sowie als Arbeitgeber.

Wir wissen, dass es gerade bei älteren und kranken Menschen Überwindung braucht, sich einem professionellen Pflegedienst anzuvertrauen. Deshalb legen wir neben unserer fachlichen Qualifikation und kompetenten Leistungen größten Wert darauf, einen einfühlsamen, vertrauten Kontakt zu unseren Patienten aufzubauen. Wir stellen uns auf die individuellen Bedürfnisse jedes Einzelnen flexibel ein und berücksichtigen in unserer Planung immer die persönlichen Lebensgewohnheiten.

Wir begegnen jedem zu Pflegenden und deren Bezugsperson(en) mit Wertschätzung, Respekt und Empathie.

Was Hand in Hand besonders macht? Wir bieten alle Pflegeleistungen aus einer Hand.

Von Beginn an war das Ziel, mit Hand in Hand einen ambulanten „Full Service“ Pflegedienst anbieten zu können, welcher weit über die Leistungen des Sozialgesetzes (SGB XI und SGB V) hinaus gehen sollte.

Zu den Dienstleistungen gehören unter anderem Körperpflege, Behandlungspflege, Tagespflege, diverse Betreuungsleistungen bis hin zur 24-Stunden-Betreuung, Hauswirtschaft, Einkaufsservice, Hausnotruf und Hausmeister-Service sowie „Essen auf Rädern“.

Unser preisgünstiges und stets frisch zubereitetes „Essen auf Rädern“ erfreut sich größter Beliebtheit und wird nicht nur von den Patienten, sondern auch von ortsansässigen Firmen und Privatpersonen gerne genutzt.

2 moderne, abwechslungsreiche Tagespflege-Einrichtungen ergänzen mittlerweile die Standorte Buchen und Osterburken.

Die „Service-Wohnen“ bietet seniorengerechte Wohnungen in Buchen an. Aktuell entsteht ein Neubau in idealer Innenstadtlage in Buchen.

In Kooperation mit ProMedica – dem Marktführer bei der 24-h-Betreuung durch osteuropäische Fachkräfte – ermöglichen wir allen Pflegebdeürftigen eine bezahlbare, professionelle und legale 24-h-Betreuung.

Name: INT.E.G.RA. Srl
Description:
- Our services -

➢ Dossier Manager - from data to documents

the leading software and method for the management of cosmetic regulatory documentation throughout Europe according to Reg 1223/2009. 

In addition to the main module "PIF Manager", Dossier Manager includes "D-Lab" for the management of R&D projects; "T-Lab" for the management of stability tests; "Quality Control" for the needs of the quality control laboratory and the "Production" module for the management of the production area. 

In addition to the software, the method also includes training courses, assistance to the Regulator staff and continuous technical/regulatory updates.

➢ C.A.O. (Custom Analysis Organization)

C.A.O. evaluates the efficacy and safety of your products and devices through integrated testing strategies with the optimal mix of our unique, 100% animal-free, OECD-adopted in vitro alternative methods and all other types of microbiological, chemical, and volunteer testing available on the market.

➢ InVitro International European Training Center 

As European partner of InVitro International we distribute, train and support all those who wants to make their own use of our 100% animal free, easy to use, macromolecular in vitro testing kits Ocular Irritection (TG OECD 496), Corrositex (TG OECD 435) and Irritection Dermal. 

No cell culture or cell lab required, unbeatable turnaround, easy to use.

➢ Cosmeting

Our database of toxicological and NO(A)EL information of substances used in cosmetics:

NoD (Noael on Demand) - on-demand service of toxicological monographs with NO(A)EL and dermal absorption of substances used in cosmetics. 

INCI Update - on demand service of data monographs including chemical name, INCI, Ph. Eur., INN and IUPAC names, EINECS / ELINCS, CAS and Color Index numbers, ingredient function, SCCS opinion and cosmetic restrictions INCI names.

Name: Aumyana
Description:
Aumyana (nature en indonésien) est une marque de produits cosmétiques naturels à base de fruits exotiques. L'entreprise est basée à Vitré (35), et a été créée par Alison et Maxime en Mai 2019.

L’enjeu de la marque est de promouvoir des soins réalisés avec des matières brutes et naturelles sans substances chimiques, nocives pour la santé. La transparence et la qualité des matières premières utilisées sont au cœur des valeurs d'Aumyana.

Leur volonté s’étend à créer une marque s’approchant du zéro déchet. Grâce à des contenants en verre, en aluminium ou en carton réutilisables et recyclables. L'enjeu est de diminuer l’utilisation du plastique qui fait tant de mal à notre Terre et notre santé. 

La gamme se compose de plusieurs produits de la salle de bain : l'huile vierge de coco, le charbon actif de coco, 3 shampoings solides, un après-shampoing solide et des accessoires durables. 
La gamme Aumyana est distribuée dans 100 magasins bio et vrac en France, en Europe et sur le site internet www.aumyana.co. 

La vision des co-fondateurs est claire : les cosmétiques deviendront un besoin physiologique, au même titre que notre alimentation. Il sera alors important pour nos clients d'en connaître l'origine.

L'entreprise a fait le choix du bio pour vous garantir une qualité et un produit sain du début à la fin.

Innovation is our strategic foundation. Our unique model is sustained by the Petals Perfumery School, a leading institution dedicated to educating and cultivating world-class perfumery talent.

Description:

Facialworks founder and esthetician Meghan Gilboa developed this unique line of skincare products that combine her passion for clean skincare for the modern woman, her love for the sea, and inspiration from the coastal cities of Orange County.

Infused in every Facialworks product is CleanSea Complex, which protects skin from dehydration, dullness, and damage from blue light with three power house ingredients: Lava Water from the Island of Jeju, Pearlami from the Tahitian Black Pearl, and Pepha-Age from green microalgae.

We have 5 facial bar spas in Southern California (in Newport Beach, Huntington Beach, Dana Point, Irvine and Manhattan Beach) where we take facials out of the dark, stuffy rooms and perform them at our airy state-of-the-art facial bar using Facialworks skincare products.

Name: Queen's Africa
Description:
Queen’s Africa c’est quoi ?
  Le devoir pour les professionnels que nous sommes s’est de donner le meilleur de nous dans nos domaines respectifs et d’en être les piliers. De cette idéologie est née Queen’s Africa qui est une marque de produits cosmétique de luxe conçu par les Africains et pour les africains. Elle a pour but de satisfaire les femmes africaines en leur offrant des produits cosmétiques de qualité à un prix raisonnable.
Crée en 2019, elle se positionne comme étant celle qui apporte et apporte le sourire, la joie aux dames et se soucie des problèmes qu’elles rencontrent avec leurs peaux au quotidien. 
Par ailleurs, nous mettons à la disposition de nos clientes des consultations gratuites et un suivi avant, pendant et après-vente. Nous avons la capacité de développer des cultures centrées sur le client, des équipes proactives et axées sur le client, ainsi que des processus et des systèmes qui créent une valeur durable pour les clients et l’organisation. Elle fournit des produits nécessaires pour faire vivre la meilleure expérience client à toute sa clientèle. Elle parraine une équipe dynamique, ambitieuse et toujours prête à relever des défis hors du commun composé de :
•Une équipe commerciale disponible du lundi à samedi de 7h à 21h pour vous conseiller et faire, vous suivre et répondre à toutes vos préoccupations de façon optimale.
•Un service après-vente efficace, sûre et efficace qui prend en compte tous les retours possibles que vous rencontrez avec le produit.
•son service de livraison gratuit et disponible 7j/7 et de 8h à 17h, elle couvre la ville de Douala, Yaoundé et assure l’expédition dans les zones et pays étrangers.
•Un service marketing et communication qui se charge de faire connaitre les produits de Queen’s sur tous l’étendu du continent et même au-delà.
•Des experts laborantins qui ont la lourde tâche de concevoir et transformer les produits et de se rassurer de leur efficacité sur la peau.

Name: Reviamo - Scalp Micropigmentation
Description:
La Micropigmentation Capillaire ou Scalp Micropigmentation (dénomination anglophone) est une technique de tatouage à visée esthétique qui consiste à implanter des pigments dans le cuir chevelu pour simuler l’aspect de cheveux rasés ou camoufler des zones dégarnies. Ce traitement est adapté aux hommes et aux femmes souhaitant densifier leur chevelure de manière discrète et naturelle.

Reviamo - Scalp Micropigmentation vous propose ces différents services;

- Effet rasé: Permet la redensification de la chevelure par un effet visuel, ne permettant plus d’apercevoir les zones de manque ou d’alopécie.

- Effet densité: Permet le camouflage de zones plus fine pour un résultat uniforme et dense.

- Cicatrices: Que ce soit des cicatrices liées à un traumas ou due à des greffes passées (FUT ou FUE), permet de les rendre discrètes et de les fondre avec la densité capillaire.

- Retouches: Permet de raviver votre Micropigmentation Capillaire après plusieurs années, que vous l’ayez réalisé chez Reviamo ou un autre praticien.

Osez prendre contact ! La consultation est gratuite.

Name: Pflege-Schätzle
Description:
Pflege-Schätzle – Weil’s alleine nicht mehr geht.

Pflege-Schätzle steht für legale, herzliche und zuverlässige 24-Stunden-Betreuung zu Hause.
Wir vermitteln erfahrene Betreuungskräfte aus osteuropäischen Ländern – für eine liebevolle, individuelle und rechtssichere häusliche Pflege.
Mit unseren Standorten in den Regionen Stuttgart und Ulm sind wir im Raum Baden-Württemberg fest verwurzelt. Gleichzeitig betreuen wir Familien bundesweit in ganz Deutschland – dank eines starken Partnernetzwerks erfahrener Standortpartner.

Die Vermittlung erfolgt im Rahmen der europäischen Dienstleistungsfreiheit (EU-Richtlinie 2004) und garantiert somit volle Rechtssicherheit.
Unser Gründer verfügt über mehr als 10 Jahre Erfahrung in der Pflegevermittlung und kennt die Herausforderungen, Bedürfnisse und Erwartungen von Familien aus erster Hand.

Als spezialisierte Pflegevermittlung begleiten wir Sie persönlich – von der Anfrage bis zur Anreise der passenden Betreuungskraft.
Unsere Partneragenturen und Betreuungskräfte aus Polen, der Slowakei, Rumänien und weiteren EU-Ländern arbeiten mit Engagement, Einfühlungsvermögen und Verantwortungsbewusstsein.

Wir legen größten Wert auf Transparenz, Fairness und menschliche Nähe.
Denn echte Pflege bedeutet mehr als Versorgung – sie schafft Vertrauen, Sicherheit und Lebensqualität.

Unser Ziel ist es, pflegebedürftigen Menschen ein würdevolles Leben in den eigenen vier Wänden zu ermöglichen und Angehörige spürbar zu entlasten.
Pflege-Schätzle – steht für Pflege zu Hause mit Herz, Erfahrung und Verantwortung. "Weil´s alleine nicht mehr geht"

Name: Scent Lab Fragrances
Description:
Scent Lab is the first and only fine fragrance perfume oil manufacturer in South Africa.

We use the latest GC-MS technology coupled with AI and machine learning to reverse engineer fragrance oils and then manufacture them at scale. Our team of data and technology scientists, analytical chemists, compounders and quality control personnel have developed unique technology and processes to automate the deformulation and recreation of aromatic compounds.

So, what does this mean? We use technology to reverse engineer perfume oils, giving us a unique selling point – we can create efficiencies using technology without reliance on old school perfumers. Because we can rely on technology and not the quality of someone’s nose (no matter how trained), we are infinitely scalable.

Our core focus is fine fragrance oils. We deformulate them in order to discover their basic components so we can recreate them. Once we fully understand what is contained within these aromatic compounds / perfume oils, we can then manufacture them at scale.

In this way, we’re able to create international quality generic perfume oils at a fraction of the cost of European manufacturers. You get the very best quality at the lowest price – the perfect combination.

Description:

Unser engagiertes Team bietet Ihnen individuelle und umfassende Assistenz, Pflege und Betreuung, die genau auf Ihre Bedürfnisse und Wünsche abgestimmt ist.


Unser Angebot:

1. Beratung
Wir beraten Sie neutral zu den verschiedenen Formen der Persönlichen Assistenz und helfen Ihnen, die für sie beste Lösung zu finden.

2. Antragstellung und Finanzierungsverhandlungen
Wir unterstützen Sie bei der Antragstellung von Assistenz- Betreuungs- und Pflegeleistungen und den Verhandlungen mit den verschiedenen Leistungsträgern.

3.  Leistungserbringung
Als ambulanter Pflegedienst für Assistenz, Betreuung und Pflege stellen wir die Erbringung der verschiedenen Leistungen sicher. Wir erbringen unsere Leistungen im Dienstleistermodell und rechnen direkt mit den Kostenträgern ab. 


Unsere Dienstleistungen:

1. Persönliche Assistenz
Unsere AssistentInnen unterstützen Sie in verschiedenen Lebensbereichen wie Körperpflege, Haushalt, Mobilität und sozialer Teilhabe. Je nach Kundenbedarf leisten wir Alltagsassistenz, Arbeitsassistenz, Aubildungs- und Studienassistenz, Elternassistenz, Kita- und Schulassistenz, Reise- und Urlaubsassistenz sowie Verhinderungspflege an.

2. Betreuung
Unsere Betreuung bietet umfassende Unterstützung für Menschen mit Behinderungen und Senioren, um ein selbstbestimmtes Leben zu ermöglichen und die Lebensqualität zu verbessern.

3. Pflege
Pflege bedeutet professionelle pflegerische Unterstützung für Menschen mit körperlichen Behinderungen, um deren Gesundheit und Wohlbefinden zu gewährleisten und ihnen ein selbstbestimmtes Leben zu ermöglichen.

Proporcionar terapias cognitivas personalizadas basadas en los recuerdos y preferencias de cada paciente.

Estamos respaldados por aceleradoras y programas de innovación como GAccelerator, Ashoka e IKEA, y trabajamos constantemente para ofrecer soluciones prácticas, asequibles y accesibles a las residencias y hogares de cuidado.

Name: Diakonie-Pflege Verbund Berlin gGmbH
Description:
Wir verstehen uns als Teil der Gemeinschaft und engagieren uns im sozialen Raum unserer Kieze. So schaffen wir einen positiven Einfluss, der über unsere Arbeit hinausreicht. 

Wir konzentrieren uns bewusst auf die ambulante Pflege und Betreuung. So stellen wir sicher, dass wir uns nicht verzetteln, sondern höchste Qualität in unserem Fachgebiet bieten können.

Menschen ein selbstbestimmtes und würdevolles Leben in der eigenen Häuslichkeit zu ermöglichen, ist unsere Aufgabe. Wir begleiten unsere Pflegekunden und deren Angehörige in der letzten Lebensphase und achten dabei auf eigene Interpretationen von Leben und Tod, sowie ihre Spiritualität.

Wir kümmern uns um unsere Pflegekundschaft und um unsere Mitarbeitenden. Der Mensch steht bei uns immer im Mittelpunkt. Durch unsere Arbeit verbessern wir das Leben anderer – eine Erfüllung, die uns antreibt.

Wir verstehen unterschiedliche Lebensentwürfe und –situationen und gehen achtsam miteinander um.

Deine Träume und Interessen sind uns wichtig. Wir setzen uns aktiv dafür ein, dass du nicht nur deine beruflichen Ziele erreichst, sondern auch persönlich wächst. Denn wenn du dich entfalten kannst, profitieren wir alle davon.

Gemeinsam meistern wir Herausforderungen und sind stolz auf das, was wir erreichen.

Gemeinsam gestalten wir unsere Zukunft, fördern Menschlichkeit und erreichen unser Bestes – jeden Tag!

Vandaag biedt CN Celini online een selectie van meer dan 45 exclusieve merken, getest en goedgekeurd door onze professionele kappers, aan scherpe prijzen.
Onze ambitie: het beste van professionele haarverzorging en stylingtools voor iedereen toegankelijk maken.

Met een aanwezigheid in België, Frankrijk en Nederland heeft CN Celini zich gevestigd als een referentie voor wie op zoek is naar kwaliteitsproducten, professioneel advies en een complete haarverzorgingservaring.

Glamy App olarak üyelerimizin tercih ettikleri kişisel bakım ve güzellik hizmetlerini, sadece “tek tıkla” bulundukları konumda; evinde, ofisinde ya da otelinde almalarını sağlıyoruz. Name: INDISHA, pure cosmetics & co
Description:
INDISHA closed its doors in July 2024 due to personal circumstances. Thank you to all our loyal customers and partners for your support on this beautiful journey since 2010.

If you can't eat it, don't put it on your skin! INDISHA pure cosmetics & co offers contemporary, elegant, pure and selective cosmetics brands. The purest worldwide. Brands without toxic ingredients, as much of organic or wildcrafted ingredients as possible, sustainable packaging and fair trade. Made by people passionate about their product and our wellbeing.  INDISHA consist of: webshop, social media, events, workshops. 

Why INDISHA?
Did you know that everything you put on your skin, is asbsorped by your body? Isn't it strange then to put stuff on your skin which you can't eat? Can you believe that a lot of cosmetic products do contain doubtful, chemical ingredients of which is proved or which are suspected to be harmful for your health and the environment? INDISHA has been looking for cosmetic brands with a different philosophy. Honest, pure, organic, contemporary brands! From passionate owners. INDISHA is a platform for those brands to tell their story and hopes to transfer a bit of their passion. Of from hundreds of products INDISHA checked the ingredients on 'purity'. Only those products INDISHA trusts for 100% are available at INDISHA. I hope you will be inspired to try a pure cosmetics product!

Jeanine, owner of INDISHA, is a true specialist in pure cosmetic ingredients. She loves to dive into science. To find out about purity of cosmetic ingredients.

¿Quiénes somos?

Nuestra misión

Buscamos embellecer y cuidar el rostro, piel, así como las manos y pies de nuestros clientes, utilizando productos de primera calidad y técnicas vanguardistas. Nos esforzamos por crear un ambiente acogedor y profesional en cada visita, asegurando una experiencia de lujo y bienestar.

Lo que nos distingue


Experiencia: Más de 10 años de experiencia en el sector de la belleza y el cuidado personal.
Innovación: Utilización de productos de última generación y técnicas avanzadas.
Ecobeauty: Hemos adaptado nuestra gama de productos hacia una línea más natural y free, libre de productos tóxicos y nocivos para la salud y el medio ambiente.
Calidad: Compromiso con la excelencia en cada servicio, garantizando la satisfacción del cliente.
Expansión: Amplia red de franquicias en México, ofreciendo oportunidades de negocio a emprendedores apasionados por la belleza.
Únete a nosotros!

Name: Sodipar Nouvelle-Aquitaine
Description:
SODIPAR est votre grossiste en produits de coiffure et d’esthétique pour professionnels et étudiants en école de coiffure et d’esthétique, depuis 50 ans.

Name: CareBoodle
Description:
Reimagining Domiciliary Care: An App to Empower Carers and Elevate Client Wellbeing 

Domiciliary care professionals know all too well the hurdles of supporting individuals in their own homes. From detecting subtle health changes to ensuring consistent training across diverse carer teams, every day presents new complexities. Many agencies struggle with:

 Early Detection of Decline
Subtle warning signs of conditions like delirium, dehydration, or infection can be missed without a standardised approach.

 Variable Training
With carers coming from different backgrounds, ensuring a uniform skill set can be difficult.

 Lack of Real-Time Support
Working in isolation often means carers must make urgent decisions without immediate backup.

Our Vision: A Groundbreaking Digital Tool
Dr. Kirsten Protherough and Liz Black Lock (founder of Lapis Care) are determined to address these challenges with a purpose-built app, designed by carers for carers. Though we’re still in the development stage, our goal is clear: to create a user-friendly, tech-enabled solution that simplifies day-to-day tasks, strengthens training, and ultimately improves client outcomes.

Key Features on Our Drawing Board
 Streamlined Assessment
A digital checklist and prompt system to help carers quickly spot early warning signs of deterioration.

 Interactive Training Modules
Engaging video lessons, quizzes, and case studies to build confidence and maintain consistent standards.

 Real-Time Expert Support
A built-in messaging feature to connect carers with supervisors or specialists whenever they need guidance.

 Comprehensive Reporting
Easy-to-generate summaries for auditing, quality checks, and updates to family members or healthcare teams.

Why Now?
 Growing Demand
As more people choose to remain in their homes, the need for innovative tools that support domiciliary care is greater than ever.

 Better Outcomes
Early detection and standardised training

Name: Range Essentials
Description:
We are on a mission to inspire others to embark on their own journeys of finding better alternatives to everyday products.

Handcrafted in Huntington Beach, CA by Deanna Keller in 2013, FLOW BLEND was created in necessity for her health. She was diagnosed with an auto-immune disease, UCTD (Undifferentiated Connective Tissue Disease), and as a result everyday living became increasingly difficult while living with debilitating pain and inflammation in her joints. She began researching, testing, and exploring the best essential oils in the world because she discovered their many benefits that include: anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and inflammation, analgesic properties that relieve pain by blocking pain signals to the brain, and their ability to improve circulation to alleviate muscle tension and soreness.

FLOW BLEND took three years to create, a proprietary organic essential oil blend of five oils (Helichrysum, Lavender, Peppermint, Clove, and Blue Tansy). Synergistically these five oils work in tandem to produce a powerful natural alternative to those seeking relief without relying solely on pharmaceuticals.

For five years she gave FLOW BLEND to friends, family, and others who were in need of an alternative to relief from pain. Dr. Rey Gubernick, better known as Dr. G, consistently used FLOW BLEND for a number of years on his patients: well-known athletes from motocross, MMA, surfing, skating, snowboarding, golf, and more.

In 2018 Range Essentials was formed after encouragement from Dr. G and countless inquisitions from his clients, to bring FLOW BLEND to the world. 

Today we offer a wider range of products to continue our mission of finding new and better alternatives for your everyday essentials.

Name: Connect Into Care - Day Care & Supported Living for Adults with Learning Disabilities
Description:
We cover the following 3 services as part of our provision:
- Day Care for Adults with Learning Disabilities @ Willerby
- Supported Living @ Market Weighton
- Care at Home and In the Community

Day Care @ Willerby
We appreciate our members are individuals. We don't have a set schedule that everyone must follow. We tailor the day and activities to each member so they get the most out of each day. 

Recently refurbished center including two on-site sensory rooms.

Transport can be provided to and from the day centre if required.

Extended hours are available including weekend care if required.

Can cater for complex needs.

Supported Living @ Market Weighton
High-specification detached property in a cul-de-sac location.

24-hour care 365 days per year can be provided as needed.

Free access to the day centre @ Willerby 

Care at Home and In the Community
We also provide customizable wrap-around care services for all our members.

This would be provided by the same carers from the day centre to provide consistency.

Care can be provided at our member's homes or in the community. We also provide care in rural areas if required. 

We're flexible on how this can be set up. The times are changeable. See below for an example of how this could work. A member could receive care at home from 07:30 am each day to help get ready. They would be transported to the day center at 09:00 am where they stay until 04:00 pm. They could be taken home and cared for until 06:00pm. 

We can also provide care over the weekend if required.

Please get in touch via enquries@connectintocare.co.uk or 01482 762716 for more details.

Name: Almofariz Farmácia de Manipulação
Description:
Almofariz Farmácia de Manipulação

Ciência, ética e confiança em cada fórmula.

Com mais de 30 anos de história, a Almofariz é referência nacional em farmácia de manipulação, com unidades nos bairros de Perdizes e Campo Belo, em São Paulo. Nascemos do olhar visionário das farmacêuticas Regina Guedes e Vânia Mazza – ambas formadas pela USP – que, ainda na década de 1990, foram pioneiras ao integrar a manipulação farmacêutica à nutrição, difundindo o uso de fitoterápicos entre profissionais da área.

Anos depois, Renata Mazza e Patrícia Fernandes passaram a integrar a sociedade, fortalecendo a gestão e contribuindo para a expansão e consolidação da Almofariz como referência em inovação e qualidade.

Fomos também uma das primeiras farmácias a manipular hormônios transdérmicos no Brasil. Hoje, somos reconhecidas como especialistas em nutracêuticos personalizados, atendendo uma demanda crescente de médicos e nutricionistas, sempre com uma equipe altamente qualificada de consultores farmacêuticos.

Contamos com mais de 10 farmacêuticos e uma equipe de 110 colaboradores, trabalhando com o mesmo propósito que nos move desde o início: oferecer saúde com inovação, qualidade e confiança.

Inovação com transparência

Fomos a primeira farmácia de manipulação do Brasil a lançar um rótulo tecnológico com QR Code, que permite ao cliente acessar informações completas sobre sua fórmula: composição, laudos de cada matéria-prima, país de origem, importador, lote, validade e número da nota fiscal. Um compromisso real com a transparência e a rastreabilidade.

Na Almofariz, fazemos – e mostramos como fazemos.
Ética, ciência e confiança em cada fórmula.

 Farmácia de manipulação · Nutracêuticos · Dermocosméticos · Longevidade · Alta performance · Saúde personalizada

Bazując na naturalnej pielęgnacji i wiedzy trychologicznej, współpracujemy z Twoim rodzajem włosów, dlatego nie modelujemy ich ani nie stylizujemy. W Ciach Fryzjer zachęcamy do zaakceptowania naturalnych walorów swoich włosów, które są unikalne dla każdego człowieka. Wierzymy, że fryzura nie ma podziału na płeć ani wiek. Staramy się tworzyć bezpieczną przestrzeń dla pracowniczek i klientów, jesteśmy miejscem przyjaznym LGBTQIAP+. Ciach Fryzjer hair salon is a team of three girls. We cut hair dry using an original technique of our founder: Katka Blajchert. We incorporate natural care and trichological knowledge to work with your type of hair, which is why we do not style them afterwards. At Ciach Fryzjer, we encourage you to accept the unique natural qualities of your hair. We believe that hairstyles have no gender or age. We strive to create a safe space for employees and clients, we are a LGBTQIAP+ friendly place.

Name: Van Clarke
Description:
Michael Van Clarke apprenticed with London’s top stylists in the 1970s, before opening his own flagship luxury salon in Marylebone 34 years ago – Vogue calls it “London’s most professional salon”.

He educates salon owners around the world with his Salon Business Mastery programme and trains apprentices and stylists at the London Salon Academy. Many have gone on to open their own award-winning salons or risen through the hierarchy of the salon business family. The loyal clientele, both local and global, have watched the development of these apprentices through the ranks of seniority over the years as they transform from school leavers to senior stylists and technicians. Four of the team have worked with Michael for over 30 years, and most of the senior team are partners in Michael Van Clarke LLP. 

Michael’s experience covers a wide range of hairdressing from teaching, runway shows, magazine editorial, TV and film, business administration, product development, writing for industry and national press, video creation, salon design, international speaking seminars, and of course, the salon work of looking after a broad range of clients including models, celebrities and nine Royal families.

The Diamond Dry Cut is Michael’s signature method, where he works with the client’s natural growth and texture of hair, to sculpt the most precise and flattering shape that’s easy to style and lasts longer. 

The Van Clarke product line has been a global success with the hero LifeSaver Pre-wash Treatment receiving 1000s of five-star reviews from around the world. This silicone-free Healthcare for Hair range is now available B2B for salon partners and professional retailers, so their clients and customers can enjoy naturally strong, supple, shiny hair, every day using the products and equipment we depend on as professionals. 

The salon holds the record for the most British Hairdressing Business Awards - 16 trophies. Recently winning Salon of the Year 2024!

Our platform is simple to use and built around real needs. You can browse carer profiles based on your location, care needs, availability, and budget. Every carer on the platform has been vetted and background checked, so you can have peace of mind when making your choice.

We believe care should be personal, flexible and affordable. With Carer Near Me, families can speak directly to carers and arrange support in a way that works for them. There are no agencies in the middle and no hidden costs.

For carers, this platform offers a real opportunity to grow your own work. You can showcase your experience, manage your own clients and set your own hours. It is designed to give good carers the visibility they deserve.

Carer Near Me is about trust, choice and freedom on both sides. We are here to help people get the care they need in a more open and direct way.

Visit us at www.carernearme.co.uk
Or contact us at support@carernearme.co.uk

Name: kidi | Häusliche Kinderkranken- und Intensivpflege
Description:
Der Pflegedienst – speziell für Kinder und Jugendliche!

Unsere Patienten sind besonders. Und besondere Bedürfnisse verlangen spezielle Maßnahmen. Maßnahmen, die wir sehr gut kennen und die wir jeden Tag sehr gerne durchführen.

Wir, als ambulanter Kinderkranken- und Intensivpflegedienst, sind zuhause für körperlich sowie geistig beeinträchtige junge Menschen da. Wir begleiten sie rund um die Uhr, wenn möglich sogar in Kindergärten oder Schulen und sorgen so für eine ganzheitliche Betreuung mit dem Fokus auf physisches, psychisches und soziales Wohlbefinden.

Was wir brauchen?! Dich!
Bei allen möglichen Voraussetzungen für die Arbeit im Pflegebereich ist uns eines besonders wichtig: Du sollst einzigartig bleiben! Denn wir möchten, dass unsere Pflegekräfte auch bei der Arbeit sie selbst sein können, denn genau das zeichnet uns bei kidi aus!

Wij nodigen u uit om de unieke Lagerman beleving zelf te ervaren. Kom langs voor een vrijblijvend advies en ontdek hoe wij uw haar, huid en nagels naar een hoger niveau tillen.

Liber Kozmetik & Medikal olarak, her kadının kendine özgü güzelliğini keşfetmesine yardımcı olmayı ve müşterilerimize benzersiz bir deneyim sunmayı amaçlıyoruz.

Name: Hollywood Hair
Description:
Hej, to my — Hollywood Hair! Eksperci od przedłużania włosów.
Jesteśmy przekonani, że zmiany zaczynają się od głowy, nawet wtedy, gdy chodzi o wygląd zewnętrzny. Naprawdę widzieliśmy niejedną metamorfozę — szok, jak zmiana długości włosów potrafi wpłynąć na wizerunek! To sprawia, że kobiety, które zdecydowały się skorzystać z naszych usług, czują się o niebo lepiej we własnej skórze. Możliwość oglądania tych niesamowitych metamorfoz sprawia, że kochamy swoją pracę z każdym dniem jeszcze mocniej. Właśnie dlatego robimy to, co robimy, pełni serca i profesjonalizmu.

Z tych samych powodów idziemy zawsze o krok do przodu. Tak oto wprowadziliśmy własną metodę przedłużania włosów — HH keratin mini bondes. Nowy sposób okazał się strzałem w dziesiątkę, albowiem tworząc małe zgrzewy keratynowe równocześnie zachowaliśmy trwałość efektu przedłużenia we wszystkich przypadkach. Tym samym przedłużone włosy stają się komfortowe dla klientek, bo małe zgrzewy są prawie niewyczuwalne. Ponadto nie niszczą włosów klientek, więc są dla nich w pełni bezpieczne.

To jednak nie wszytko, bo piękne włosy, to nie tylko długość. Kierujemy uwagę naszych klientek na zdrową pielęgnację i suplementację od środka. Dlatego w naszym sklepie można znaleźć kosmetyki niezbędne do dbania o włosy, a także suplementy diety.

Name: Itely Hairfashion Turkey
Description:
1987 yılında kurulan Itely Hairfashion, profesyonel saç bakımı pazarına İtalyan zevkini uluslararası bir meslekle birleştirebilen yüksek standartta ürünler sunmak amacıyla doğdu.
Şirket, endüstriyel ve üretimsel bir gerçeklik olarak hızla gelişti ve 1990 yılından itibaren hızla hem İtalya'da hem de yurtdışında öncü bir şirket olmayı başardı; artık zevkli, zarif ve en yüksek kalitenin “İtalya'da üretilmiştir” standart taşıyıcısı olarak biliniyor.
Bugün dünyanın her yerinde Itely Hairfashion projesine binlerce kişi katılıyor. Özellikle ABD, Brezilya, İngiltere, İspanya, Beyaz Rusya ve Çin gibi bazı üretim ve ticari şubeler şirketin kar paylaşım yapısına doğrudan katılımcılardır.
Itely Hairfashion her zaman yeni formülasyonların sürekli araştırılmasına, yenilikçi teknolojilerin sürekli geliştirilmesine ve doğru kalite kontrollerine odaklanmıştır. Hammaddelerin tamamı hayvansal kökenli değildir ve yıllar içinde özel bir çevre bilinci geliştirilmiştir.
Bugün, Itely Hairfashion, dünyanın her yerindeki kuaförlere istikrarlı bir referans olma amacıyla güncel eğitim sunmak için özel olarak tanımlanmış, hem yüksek kaliteli ürünler hem de eğitim/iletişim projeleri geliştirmektedir.
Her yeni adımda, her zaman dünyanın her yerindeki kuaförlere, onlara özel ürün ve projeler sunma isteğine dayanan bir felsefeyle hareket edilmiştir. Üstlenilen girişimler arasında mobilya, profesyonel aksesuarlar, teknik ekipman ve satış temsilcilerine yönelik eğitim toplantıları yer alıyor ve onları küresel kuaför danışmanlarına "dönüştürme" amaçlanıyor.

Name: Bellapiel Spa
Description:
Bellapiel: Elevando la Belleza desde 1996 

Con una trayectoria de 28 años en el mercado de la belleza, Bellapiel ha sido un referente en el cuidado personal y el bienestar. Desde 1996, nos hemos dedicado a perfeccionar la experiencia de nuestros clientes, ofreciendo una amplia gama de servicios que realzan la belleza natural y promueven la confianza.

 Con una sólida base en Viña Del Mar, Bellapiel ha expandido su presencia a lo largo de 6 sucursales en Santiago y V Región, convirtiéndose en un destino confiable para quienes buscan servicios de manicura, pedicura, depilación, diseño de cejas y pestañas, así como bronceado profesional. Cada una de nuestras ubicaciones ofrece un ambiente acogedor y servicios de alta calidad, respaldados por la experiencia de nuestro equipo de profesionales.

 En línea con las demandas del mercado actual, Bellapiel ha evolucionado con los tiempos, incorporando un enfoque en el comercio electrónico. Hace 2 años, lanzamos nuestra plataforma de ecommerce, ofreciendo una selección cuidadosamente curada de productos de belleza que complementan nuestros servicios en el salón. Desde productos para el cuidado de la piel hasta maquillaje de calidad profesional, nuestra tienda en línea brinda acceso conveniente a los mejores productos para el cuidado personal.

 En Bellapiel, valoramos la innovación y la excelencia en todo lo que hacemos. Nuestro equipo está comprometido con la calidad, la atención al detalle y la satisfacción del cliente. Nos enorgullece ofrecer soluciones personalizadas que aborden las necesidades individuales de cada cliente, brindando resultados excepcionales y una experiencia inigualable en cada visita.

Únete a nosotros en nuestra misión de inspirar confianza y resaltar la belleza única de cada persona. Descubre todo lo que Bellapiel tiene para ofrecer y déjanos ser tu socio en el viaje hacia una belleza radiante, tanto dentro como fuera.

 Conéctate con nosotros:
www.bellapiel.cl

Name: BEICHIES | SALON
Description:
Wij zijn in 2016 begonnen met BEICHIES en inmiddels wordt het gerund door een grote groep meiden die er samen voor willen zorgen dat er een plek is waar niet alleen wij, maar ook onze enorme diversiteit aan klanten zich prettig voelen. Wij snappen heel goed dat jouw haar een deel van je identiteit is. Je omschrijft tenslotte een ander persoon vaak ook aan de hand van het haar. Een uitspraak bij ons is dan ook: “je bent zoals je haar”.

WELKOM BIJ BEICHIES
Beichies is een begrip in Utrecht en omstreken. Wij hebben inmiddels een gigantische klantenkring opgebouwd en staan dan ook bekend om onze fijne sfeer en mooie resultaten. En dat merk je, of het nou maandag is of zaterdag het is altijd druk. Onze salon is gevestigd in hartje centrum van Utrecht, aan de bekende grachten. De salon heeft zelfs twee verdiepingen, waaronder een werfkelder, wat uniek in de wereld is. Utrecht zit in ons DNA verankerd, wij zijn twee nichtjes en delen onze Utrechtse roots, wij dragen dit familiegevoel uit naar onze Beichies familie, ons team.

EEN BETERE WERELD
Ons idee om een plek te creëren waarbij iedereen zich prettig voelt is geslaagd! Maar het gaat veel verder dan alleen het gevoel dat je krijgt wanneer je bij ons bent. Wij geloven dat als wij allemaal samenwerken aan een positieve verandering, wij van de wereld een betere en gezondere plek kunnen maken.

Klimaat bewust heeft samen met ons gekeken op welke punten we nog wat konden verbeteren om een positief verschil te kunnen maken in het verduurzamen van onze salon. Wij hebben bijvoorbeeld gekeken naar de oorsprong van onze producten maar  hebben bijvoorbeeld onze kranen vervangen door waterbesparende kranen. We mogen dan ook met trots zegen dat een certificaat van Klimaat bewust op zak hebben.

ONZE SALON, ONZE HANDTEKENING
Naast het haar, houden wij er ook van om bezig te zijn met het interieur en styling. Voor ons is het “warme thuis” gevoel wat je krijgt als je bij ons binnenkomt ook heel belangrijk.

Name: DPV e.V. - Deutscher Pflegeverband
Description: Das Wohl der pflegebedürftigen Menschen und der Pflegenden ist Ursprung und Leitsatz des Deutschen Pflegeverbandes (DPV). Dieser Verein wurde 1948 als Agnes-Karll-Verband mit Sitz in Neuwied gegründet. 1997 wurde der Name in Deutscher Pflegeverband geändert. Unsere Mitgliedschaft im Paritätischen Wohlfahrtsverband ermöglicht uns und unseren Experten der unterschiedlichsten Fachrichtungen in Gremien wie LIGA, etc. und Ausschüssen die Interessen zu vertreten. Durch die Teilnahme an Anhörungen der Ausschüsse und Ministerien auf Bundes- und Länderebene wirken wir - auch durch schriftliche Stellungnahmen - bei der Gesetzgebung mit. Der Deutsche Pflegeverband ist Mitglied im Aktionsbündnis Patientensicherheit. Neben Presse- und Öffentlichkeitsarbeit ist unsere Einflussnahme auf politischer Ebene und in verbandsübergreifenden Arbeitsgruppen gewährleistet. Aus,- Fort- und Weiterbildungen in eigenen Instituten und in Kooperation mit anderen Einrichtungen, bilden die Basis für eine Qualitätssicherung und- steigerung in der Gesundheitspflege. Wir sind offen für alle Personen die an der Pflege interessiert sind. Wir verknüpfen damit ein großes Potential an Mitsprache bei gesundheits- und sozialpolitischen Themenstellungen.

Name: Pflege UMM Mannheim
Description:
Die Pflege in der UMM zeichnet sich zum einen dadurch aus, dass sie exzellente Medizin und Pflege anwendet, forscht und ausbildet. Zum anderen ist der UMM die Teamarbeit eine Herzensangelegenheit und sie verfügt über eine große Anzahl an langjährigen Mitarbeitern. In kaum einer anderen Klinik gibt es eine so große Zahl an Mitarbeitern, die bis zu 40 Jahre Betriebszugehörigkeit nachweisen können. Dieses Phänomen spricht für eine hohe Identität und Verbundenheit mit der UMM als Arbeitgeber. Ein hohes Maß an Kompetenz, Erfahrungswissen, Ruhe und in manch einer Situation auch Gelassenheit bildet die Stärke der Mitarbeiter im Pflege- und Funktionsdienst.

Dank der UMM-Akademie gewinnt die Klinik jedes Jahr Nachwuchskräfte für ihre Pflegeteams, die mit ihrer fachlichen Sicht und dem neu erworbenen Wissen die Entwicklung des Pflegebereiches unterstützen.

Aktuell entwickelt die UMM-Akademie – angestoßen durch die generalistische Pflegeausbildung – die  Ausbildung weiter, man könnte auch sagen komplett neu. Hierbei wird das Curriculum aus der Sicht der Praxis aufgebaut. Die Theorie bildet das Dach der praktischen Ausbildung und stellt die Verbindung zur Praxisanleitung her. Unsere Praxisanleiter arbeiten hierbei mit konkreten Fällen, so dass der Auszubildende an Fallbeispielen in der Praxis lernen kann.

Name: The Industry, Ltd
Description:
Who We Are
The Industry was inspired by a personal struggle to manage single-motherhood, and working to provide + thrive, whilst giving power to creative passions and dreams from childhood. A balance that until now, was not thought possible.

Where it Began
 Balance is difficult. Your dreams may seem far away, but I assure you that you can make them a reality! Here is a little bit of back story, and why I chose to open The Industry with this business model.

After cosmetology school, like many, I was offered different assistantships and booth rental opportunities, however, none of them aligned with how my life was set up, as a single parent. I had no family in the area to help me watch the kids while I worked, and asking friends was not consistent. So, daycare was the only option, and at $1400 per month…not an option.
There was absolutely no way that I could raise my kids on an assistant’s wage or pay the high booth rent, whilst juggling daycare cost, my apartment rent, and the basics, like food. I could not justify paying for a full week at a salon and be locked in for a month-to-month or year, if my childcare was inconsistent or or cost just as much as what I would be paying in booth-rent. What if I only had 3 clients that week and they didn’t mind washing their hair in my kitchen sink? What if they didn’t mind if my kids were running around? Staying home seemed more lucrative, so that’s what I did- for years.That is what so many talented people in our industry do, because it is the only thing that makes sense. Until now.

The Industry, would have made it possible for me to grow and build my brand/business at an exponential rate, even given my situation at the time. 
With the basis being affordable hourly/daily booth rental.
It takes the tension out of the owner/stylist relationship by using the app to pre-pay/book/reserve your space. The commuter-style vibe of the stylists/artists/etc always changing, keeps it a positive, and consistently new environment.

Name: Derma Bright Clinic
Description:
At award-winning Derma Bright Clinic, our passion is helping our clients achieve healthy, bright skin. We are a skincare clinic with a focus on anti-aging and acne using the right treatment to get real results. How do we do this? It is a combination of effective skin care products, services, take home kits and our specialized machines.  

We offer cosmetic procedures, injectables, professional facials and peels that work well with our machines which use natural modalities including LED Light, Oxygen, Micro-current, Microdermabrasion and Ultrasound.  With this approach we are able to deliver a non-invasive, pain-free, with no down time experience that will leave you renewed, refreshed and looking bright!

We also offer a full body program that includes to LPG from France, fantastic for cellulite, fat, water retention and lose skin. We can combine this with body scrubs, wraps and massage for a full head to toe experience!

Our offices form part of Holistica Wellness, which consists of a group of like-minded practitioners including a RMT, Physio, Holistic Nutritionists, Chinese doctor a Post-cancer Nutritionist and more.

Name: Inspired Outcomes
Description:
At Inspired Outcomes, we have identified a need amongst seniors in their retirement years. That need is a single place they can contact to get assistance with all matters of living arrangements, from moving to a better environment to everyday requirements.



Inspired Outcomes was started in 2006 as a Project Management consultancy and has now changed paths to specialise in Seniors Advocacy Services. Margaret has her Real Estate certificate which assists in ensuring the Professional Real Estate Agents introduced perform to a Code of Conduct. 



Margaret was previously a Registered Nurse with experience in geriatric nursing and has a Business Administration degree majoring in Financial Management. Margaret also has many years of project management delivering major projects for institutions such as the Australian War Memorial and National Museum. For five years, Margaret was a senior project manager placing new houses within indigenous communities across the top of Australia.



We use this experience to ensure every effort is made to reduce the stress for the client and allow them to enjoy the experience of finding and moving into a new home.

The most important thing for seniors is the kind of assistance we offer as many do not have children or other family living close by. We can help with the many issues, both big and small, that seniors will come across when they move to retirement living.



Inspired Outcomes is able to fill this position by helping them through our pickup service. This service enables our seniors to travel around and individually look at retirement sites so they get the right feel about the place they are considering moving into. Once satisfied we then take care of the rest, assisting to complete the numerous details of purchasing and moving.

In essence, we become ‘surrogate’ children and family.

Name: Aris Ezgi Doğan
Description:
Aris Ezgi Doğan, Türkiye genelinde 76 şubeyle güzellik ve bakım sektöründe lider bir isimdir. Müşterilerimize en yüksek standartlarda hizmet sunmayı amaçlayarak, her bir şubemizde benzersiz bir deneyim sağlamaktayız.

Özellikle Gaziantep VIP şubemiz, bölgedeki güzellik ve bakım hizmetlerinde bir mihenk taşıdır. Burada, müşterilerimiz için özel olarak tasarlanmış lüks ve konforlu bir ortamda, en yeni teknolojilerle donatılmış tedavi yöntemleri sunuyoruz. Buz lazer epilasyon, cilt bakımı, bölgesel incelme ve kalıcı makyaj gibi çeşitli hizmetlerimizle, her müşterimizin kendilerini özel hissetmelerini sağlıyoruz.

Buz lazer epilasyonumuz, ağrısız ve etkili bir çözüm sunarak, istenmeyen tüylerden kalıcı olarak kurtulmanızı sağlar. Cilt bakımı hizmetlerimizle cildinizin ihtiyacına göre özelleştirilmiş tedaviler sunuyoruz. Bölgesel incelme programlarımız, en son teknolojiyi kullanarak, sağlıklı ve etkili bir şekilde vücut şekillendirme imkanı sağlar. Kalıcı makyaj uygulamalarımız ise, günlük makyaj rutininizi kolaylaştırarak, her zaman mükemmel görünmenizi sağlar.

Her şubemizde, alanında uzman, deneyimli ve müşteri memnuniyetine odaklı ekibimizle hizmet veriyoruz. Aris Ezgi Doğan olarak, müşterilerimizin güzellik ve bakım ihtiyaçlarını en üst seviyede karşılamak için sürekli olarak kendimizi yeniliyor ve geliştiriyoruz.

Türkiye'nin dört bir yanında yer alan şubelerimizde sizleri ağırlamaktan mutluluk duyarız. Aris Ezgi Doğan'ı tercih ederek, güzellik ve bakımın en iyisini deneyimleyin.

Nous savons que la confiance en soi passe par un produit qui vous correspond, nous nous appliquons donc à créer une gamme la plus complète possible.

Chez NJ Création, nous travaillons avec bienveillance et assiduité pour vous présenter des solutions qui vous soutiennent dans votre quotidien. Nos partenaires capillaires prennent le temps pour les choses essentielles et vous accompagnent à toutes les étapes. Notre plus belle victoire réside dans notre capacité à vous offrir le produit qui, par son style et son efficacité, saura passer inaperçu afin de redonner le pouvoir à chacun et chacune d’être soi-même.

Our Mission:

To provide our clients with safe and high-quality aesthetic care, at an affordable price, with excellent customer service. We believe in empowering our clients to look and feel their best and dedicated to achieving the best possible results for everyone.

Services:

We are NOW offering Medical Weight Loss Management, which include Semaglutide (generic Ozempic) and Tirzepatide (generic Mounjaro) injectables.  

We offer telehealth visits across the state of *Florida as well as In-Home visits in the Port Orange and surrounding areas! That's right, we come to you! We even offer the convenience of having your labs drawn right in your own home.

Initial consult, blood work review, eligibility and on-going management are conducted by a licensed and certified provider at No Charge (you only pay for the weight loss meds).  

*Telehealth/Weight Loss Management for patients outside of Florida will be on a case-by-case basis dependent on licensure reciprocation.

Coming Soon: 

Botox and filler injections via "Mobil Services" provided in the comfort of your own home at very affordable prices!  We’ll be expanding on these services over time!

About our Provider: 

Jennifer is an Honors graduate with a bachelor’s degree in health care administration, bachelor’s in nursing, and a master’s degree in nursing. She is a Board-Certified Family Nurse Practitioner. With 4 years as a Nurse and 12 years as a Family Nurse Practitioner.  In addition to recently completing her certification in Botulinum Toxin and Dermal Fillers, she has experience in Cardiology, Home Health Care, Urgent Care, Emergency Care, Gastroenterology, Dermatology, and Primary Care.  

She also has extensive training/knowledge in functional nutritional medicine, and autoimmune conditions. She participated in a humanitarian mission in Vietnam aboard the USS Mercy Hospital Naval Ship, earning her the Presidential Volunteers Service Award and featured in the Worldwide Leaders in Health Care 2021 edition.

Name: Laser Skin Solutions
Description:
Advanced Aesthetic Treatments
Don't let the name fool you! We do so much more than just laser treatments. We offer a variety of advanced aesthetic treatments including microneedling to treat acne scaring or to reverse the signs of ageing, IPL photo rejuvenation for sun damage, treatments for surface level veins (spider veins), skin tightening, or laser hair removal. Maybe you struggle with acne and would benefit from meeting with a Face Reality Certified Acne Specialists for a treatment plan. If your skin is not your primary concern then body contouring may be what you are looking for. We will use the latest techniques and technology to give you the healthy skin and body you are looking for from our downtown Portland location just off N 23rd in the Alphabet District with plenty of on site parking.

Love the Skin You're In
At Laser Skin Solutions in Portland we believe that we are here to support you in your journey toward healthier more vibrant facial and body skin. The journey for everyone is not the same but none the less, it is your journey and we are here to help you reach your goals.

Let's Talk About You
From the moment you walk in the door, our focus is on you. We don't just want to throw facial skin care treatments your way but we want to know what you are hoping to accomplish, why and by when. Do you have a major event you want to look your best for or are you doing something as important as boosting your self confidence. Are you looking to get Microneedling to reverse the signs of aging or treat acne scars? Do you have sun damage that would benefit from an IPL photo rejuvenation treatment or are you simply looking for laser hair removal? How about needing a little help reducing stubborn body fat. No matter why you are deciding to get skin treatments or seeking body contouring, what you want is what matters to us. Let us get to know you and customize a treatment plan just for you.

Name: Daybreakers Day Care Club
Description:
Daybreakers was founded by Honor and Michelle, who both know firsthand the challenges of caring for a loved one with memory loss and dementia. Honor, with 30 years in the care home sector saw too many people move into care sooner than needed because caregivers had no respite. Michelle supported her mother with dementia for six years and experienced the same struggle.

Together, they created Daybreakers—a members’ club that offers meaningful day care for people living with memory loss and dementia, while giving caregivers the chance to rest, recharge, and access support. 

The Club aims to provide a safe environment where our members feel a sense of belonging, purpose, and fun.

Name: Freunde & Partner Pflegedienst
Description:
Den Pflegedienst Adams gibt es bereits seit 1993. Seitdem hat sich das Unternehmen kontinuierlich weiterentwickelt und ist zu einem vertrauenswürdigen Partner für Pflegebedürftige und ihre Familien geworden.

Vor vier Jahren übernahm die neue Geschäftsleitung den Pflegedienst Adams und begann eine neue Ära für den Pflegedienst. Die Idee, Menschen in ihrer vertrauten Umgebung zu pflegen und zu betreuen, blieb jedoch bestehen. Die neue Leitung eröffnete einen neuen Standort und stellte engagierte Mitarbeiter ein, um das Team zu stärken.

Im Laufe der Zeit arbeiteten sie daran, die Qualität ihrer Dienstleistungen weiter zu steigern. Besonders wichtig war ihnen immer der nahe und freundschaftliche Umgang mit den Patienten. Für die neue Geschäftsleitung war es mehr als nur ein Job, es war eine Berufung, Menschen in ihrer schwierigen Lebenssituation beizustehen.

Nun ist der Moment gekommen, diese Motivation in ein neues Gewand zu packen und den Pflegedienst Adams in "Freunde & Partner - Pflegedienst" umzubenennen. Die Passion und der Wille, Menschen helfen zu dürfen, bleibt jedoch unverändert. Die neuen Geschäftsführer sind fest entschlossen, weiterhin eine zuverlässige Pflege und hauswirtschaftliche Leistungen auf höchstem Niveau anzubieten und auf individuelle Bedürfnisse einzugehen.

Mit dem neuen Namen wollen sie auch ausdrücken, dass sie nicht nur ein Pflegedienst sind, sondern auch Freunde und Partner für ihre Patienten sein möchten. Sie möchten ihre Patienten so lange wie möglich selbstständig halten und ihnen dabei helfen, ihre Lebensqualität zu erhalten. Sie sind davon überzeugt, dass es für viele Wuppertaler und Remscheider trotz Alter und Krankheit möglich ist, in ihrer vertrauten Umgebung zu leben und dank ihres Pflegedienstes die notwendige Unterstützung zu erhalten.

Name: Healthy Happy Feet
Description: My professional journey started in 2012, when I took a position at Regis Hair Salon in West County Mall. In 2013, I began renting a booth focusing on hair care services. However, my passion was still with nails. In March 2014, I accepted a position with Morgan Ford Spas. This position allowed me to build their nail services as their primary nail technician. In July 2017, I started my own business as Beautify Yourself doing hair while I remained with Morgan Ford Spa. In 2018 and 2019 I attended the annual Foot Forward Summit during which I realized my passion was in footcare specifically. In February 2020, I earned my Advanced Nail Technician (ANT) certification. This course focuses on safety and sanitation practices in the cosmetic footcare industry. At the same time, I studied for Safe Salon Professional (SSP) certification. This certification goes in depth with creating and maintaining an aseptic salon environment. How to utilize aseptic practices and gaining knowledge of out-of-normal conditions and the implications were the focus of this course. I completed my Footcare Nail Technician (FNT) certification in September 2020. This course allowed me to study footcare, foot-related diseases, and their treatments in detail. Pursuing my education further I applied for a 40-hour internship at Premier Podiatry to earn my Medical Nail Technician (MNT) certification in September 2021. This internship gave me an even deeper understanding of the foot's anatomy, the chronic conditions that affect them, and how they can be treated. In April 2021, I changed the name of my business from Beautify Yourself to Healthy Happy Feet to better reflect what I seek to provide for my clients. Currently, I run my business in a suite attached to Premier Podiatry and have developed a strong referral relationship.

What starts out as the occasional bit of help can end up with you becoming entirely responsible for a loved one’s life and well-being, including where and how they live.

We believe that ageing or infirmity shouldn’t compel people to move away from a loved home full of memories and close to friends. We provide quality home care across Barnet and Enfield, North London and herts, and believe that with our help and support, which is always centred around your needs and preferences, there’s no need to be anywhere else.

We provide a full range of services including:

Personal care – washing, dressing, showering / bathing, toileting, continence support, grooming, creaming, oral care…
Specialised care – for; Dementia, Stroke, Parkinson’s, Cancer, Diabetes, Learning Disabilities, Mental Health, Visual, Speech or hearing Impairments; End of life support.

Name: Lavish Skin & Body
Description:
Lavish Skin & Body is a specialist skin clinic focusing on innovative, non-invasive anti-aging & cosmetic treatments that produce real results. Our treatments are backed by rigorous scientific research & we have the most cutting-edge technology available to help you achieve fantastic skin and body results, with limited downtime. All cosmetic treatments & technologies offered are scientifically proven for safety and results. 

Our clinic combines luxurious elegance with cutting edge treatments & results. Enjoy spacious treatment rooms, high ceilings, luxe finishes & the ultimate in comfort & privacy whilst your dermal clinician helps you achieve significant, measurable improvements & milestones for your skin.

Our dedicated team of dermal therapists are highly skilled & committed to providing a second to none client experience in both comfort & results. Our services target a range of skin & body issues including Acne, Wrinkles, Age Spots, Collagen Promotion, Dry Skin, Fat Loss, Muscle Toning, Bladder Weakness, Pigmentation Redness and Rosacea, Broken Capillaries, Skin Ageing, Sun Damage, Vascular Concerns & more.

Unsure of what treatment is right for you? We offer free in person consultations so you can experience our clinic & obtain our recommendations without any commitment. Some of our popular treatments include EmSculpt for toning & fat loss, Laser Genesis for collagen promotion, Excel V+ for complex skin concerns, & EmSella for bladder weakness & postpartum pelvic floor concerns. 

We also offer a range of skin needling/microneedling options & more traditional skin lasers such as IPL for pigmentation, the Soprano laser for painless hair removal, microdermabrasion & Jet Peel facials.

Jacura bietet Ihnen dafür einfach persönlichere Leistungen - wir sind Ihre Experten für häusliche 24-Stunden-Betreuung aus Osteuropa sowie Alltagsbegleitung nach §45 SGB XI, was eine direkte Abrechnung mit Pflegekassen ermöglicht.

Unser Team besteht aus erfahrenen Experten aus den Bereichen Altenpflege, Kundenbetreuung und Organisation. Name: KLEEDjeBETER! Kledingadvies gebaseerd op je eigen garderobe
Description:
KLEEDje BETER! helpt bij het ontwikkelen van een verantwoorde garderobe die langer meegaat.

Het kernpunt is: bewuster omgaan met kleding. Het startpunt is: de eigen garderobe.

Hoe ga ik te werk?

Garderobe opruimen en organiseren 
Neem je eigen kledingkast in gedachten, zoals die nu is. Ik kom naar je toe en ruim samen met jou deze kledingkast op, geef je ter plekke persoonlijk kledingadvies en kan (indien nodig) samen met je gaan winkelen om een gewenste garderobe compleet te maken. Mocht je liever slechts een deel van je kledingkast door mij laten bekijken, dan kan dat natuurlijk ook. Ik neem namelijk altijd een kledingrek mee!

Samen bewust winkelen of kleding ruilen 
We kunnen kleding aanschaffen met aandacht voor duurzaamheid door naar tweedehands (of vintage) winkels te gaan of bij duurzame kledingmerken te gaan kijken. Maar misschien vind je een kledingruilbijeenkomst ook een goed plan…

Persoonlijk advies 
De kennis en ervaring vanuit mijn eerdere werk als POH-GGZ en coach zet ik in bij het onderzoeken van jouw persoonlijkheid en persoonlijke behoefte. Desgewenst gaan we diepte in. Het is belangrijk voor jou als klant om te weten wie je bent en wat ècht bij je past. Want dan klopt het hele plaatje en straal je dat ook uit!

Groet,

Lotti Verhoeven

Name: Gary Williams Coaching
Description:
Individuals, business owners, and employees hire me to understand, reduce, or relieve stress. I help them focus on their passions, build strategies, and reduce stress over things outside of their control. 

At times, a simple misunderstanding can destroy a friendship or relationship by one or more people becoming emotional and overreacting, saying things that cannot be "unsaid" or easily forgotten. 

In other instances, an event or disappointment may elicit more or less visible emotional responses from different people, causing others to question one's sensitivity or empathy. e.g., "You do not look sad." 

Each of us was raised somewhat differently, has a unique history of life experiences, and expresses or suppresses feelings and emotions in different ways. 
"You are not stuck with your current brain" (Dr. Daniel Amen). Learning to distinguish between different and incorrect in our minds can be a struggle, and learning not to respond outwardly may be even more difficult.

Description:
Aesthetic Effect proudly introduces Scent Stays, an innovative wearable fragrance emitter that integrates seamlessly into your daily wardrobe. Our unique device is engineered to be filled with your fragrance of choice, whether it be perfume, cologne, or essential oils, ensuring a consistent and subtle scent release throughout the day.

Elevating traditional accessory functions, Scent Stays also serves as a magnetic collar stay, providing a dual-purpose solution for the style-conscious individual. The added magnet offers versatility, allowing the wearer to position the device on any garment for a personalized scent experience.

As we commence production on our initial run, we are excited to bring this first embodiment to the market. Concurrently, we are exploring licensing opportunities for our patented designs, including adaptations for watch bands, glasses, and other personal accessories.

Our vision is to enhance personal scent application and retention, moving beyond the limitations of sprays and dabbers. We are committed to sustainability and convenience, with future developments including prefilled scent pods for an even more user-friendly experience.

Aesthetic Effect is at the forefront of olfactory innovation, merging technology with personal care.
