Edelyn Fragrance is more than a fragrance company, it is a lifestyle brand built on the belief that scent is a powerful form of self-expression. From our humble beginnings to our growing presence in the fragrance industry, we have remained committed to one purpose: creating unforgettable scent experiences that blend quality, creativity, and care.

Every bottle we craft is a reflection of our philosophy that a sweet scent carries a bold presence—the kind that speaks before you do. Our fragrances are designed not only to elevate personal style but also to inspire confidence, charm, and individuality. 

At Edelyn Fragrance, we believe that smelling good is not just an accessory—it is a statement of identity, a source of empowerment, and a way of life.

Our Vision

To create a fragrance-filled lifestyle and become the world’s leading fragrance company, delivering the best quality always. Because when you smell good, you feel unstoppable.

Our Mission

• Provide premium-quality scents at affordable prices.
• Deliver outstanding customer service rooted in care and trust.
• Create unique fragrances that inspire confidence.
• Satisfy every customer’s scent desire and lifestyle need.


Our Values

Integrity, Passion, Innovation, Excellence, and Customer Delight guide everything we do. They are the essence of who we are and the promise behind every bottle.

Our Promise

We make smelling good not just a choice—but a responsibility. Every Edelyn fragrance tells a story of confidence, care, and creativity.

Our Products

We specialize in elegant perfume oils that elevate skincare routines, combining freshness and luxury for long-lasting, personalized scent experiences. Each fragrance is designed to enhance confidence, charm, and individuality.

At Edelyn Fragrance, we don’t just sell perfumes—we create lifestyles. With us, every scent is a statement.

Bem-vindo à SOS Home Care, onde o cuidado ganha um novo significado. Somos uma empresa dedicada a fornecer cuidados excepcionais e compassivos para aqueles que mais precisam, no conforto de seus lares ou em ambientes hospitalares. Com um foco especializado em cuidados com idosos, oferecemos uma gama abrangente de serviços personalizados para promover a saúde, o bem-estar e a qualidade de vida.

Nossa equipe é composta por profissionais altamente treinados e dedicados, que têm paixão pelo que fazem e comprometimento com a excelência. Estamos aqui para oferecer suporte não apenas aos nossos pacientes, mas também às suas famílias, fornecendo tranquilidade e segurança em cada etapa do caminho.

Nosso objetivo é proporcionar um ambiente acolhedor e familiar, onde nossos pacientes se sintam valorizados, respeitados e cuidados. Com uma abordagem holística e centrada no paciente, adaptamos nossos serviços para atender às necessidades individuais de cada pessoa, garantindo que recebam a atenção e os cuidados necessários para viver uma vida plena e feliz.

Na SOS Home Care, acreditamos que o cuidado vai além do tratamento médico; trata-se de estabelecer conexões significativas, promover a independência e cultivar uma sensação de pertencimento. Estamos comprometidos em fazer a diferença na vida daqueles que atendemos, e é uma honra para nós ser parte desse importante capítulo em suas vidas.

Junte-se a nós enquanto continuamos a tornar o cuidado uma prioridade e a transformar vidas, um paciente de cada vez. Estamos aqui para você, a qualquer momento, em qualquer lugar.

Cuide de quem você ama.

Neste sentido, convido você à conhecer a marca de produtos Seja Sua Pele. Você vai se surpreender com a qualidade e os resultados.

Seja Sua Pele, torne-se ainda mais protagonista de sua história.

Name: Buller And Rice
Description:
Stephen Buller and Anita Rice co-founded their vision of a truly
sustainable salon, Buller and Rice.!
The very core of curating this salon was to have a business
dedicated to sustainability. This is not an ethos we introduced
over time. We started with this very message to take steps to
constantly further and elevate our environmental credentials to
continue to evolve our position in leading this conversation
within haircare, whilst encouraging other salons to make the
necessary changes to become less wasteful and minimise their
impact on the environment.!
Partnering with local businesses was key from the start. Working
with Hackney based design studio Lozi on the design of the salon,
utilising the latest innovations in sustainable designs and
finding value in waste materials.
Minimising waste and raising awareness of our impact on the
environment is key to the salon’s proposition, and showcasing
that you can do this without compromising on a stylish luxury
interior or the client experience. Salon fixtures were a key
element of this, going as far as to use leftover sawdust.
Solely using products from eco, sustainable and biodynamic
lines is at the core of the salon's beliefs.!

At Bliss Beautique, beauty is not an appointment.
It’s a ritual.

A moment created for you to feel heard, guided, and genuinely cared for. Many women arrive with real frustrations: rushed experiences, inconsistent results, and no clarity on what they need or when to return.

So we designed a different model — rituals crafted with intention, emotion, and real-life needs.

Our Ritual Combos guide every stage of your hair and your life:

 First Time Rituals
For discovering Bliss with confidence and experiencing true care.

 Color Rituals
To keep your color radiant, healthy, and luminous through your natural beauty cycle.

 Extension Rituals
To preserve and elevate your Pink Box Extensions with premium protocols.

 Smoothing & Straightening Rituals
For a frizz-free, silky life in Miami’s sun and humidity.

Because your beauty deserves continuity, not guesswork.

Every ritual has a purpose, a recommended frequency, and a sensory design: soft aromas, calm music, thoughtful protocols, and a team that welcomes you with warmth and intention.

Here, you’re not “just another appointment.”
You’re a story, a moment, and a ritual worth experiencing fully.

Bliss Beautique – Where beauty becomes ritual, and you feel cared for.

Name: TONI&GUY ITALIA
Description:
TONI&GUY Italia nasce a Milano nell’aprile del 1997 grazie all’impegno di Sergio Carlucci e Charity Cheah. Da allora il brand non ha mai smesso di espandersi e oggi è conosciuto in tutto il Paese, dove conta oltre 150 collaboratori, tra stilisti, staff e creativi, operativi nei 14 Saloni presenti in tutto lo Stivale e nella TONI&GUY Academy, l’istituto per l’alta formazione professionale con sede a Milano, in via Settembrini 29.

Chi è TONI&GUY:
Con 60 anni di esperienza nel settore, TON&GUY è un marchio iconico a livello internazionale, riconosciuto come un "Superbrand" ufficiale nell'industria dei parrucchieri. Siamo orgogliosi di promuovere l'eccellenza nella formazione dei nuovi talenti attraverso le nostre 23 Accademie professionali sparse in tutto il mondo.

La nostra missione, coniata dal fondatore Toni Mascolo, è chiara: "To grow the best, most profitable and most creative hairdressing company on the planet, where people love to work and clients love to be"

Cerchiamo individui appassionati, proattivi, innovativi e devoti alla preservazione della nostra eredità di qualità.

Opportunità di Lavoro: 
Una carriera con TONI&GUY è stimolante e ti offre la possibilità di raggiungere il tuo massimo potenziale. Stiamo cercando individui con un atteggiamento positivo, la determinazione di crescere in modo autonomo e una vera passione per il nostro settore, che si tratti di lavorare in un salone, in una delle nostre accademie o presso la sede centrale. In cambio, forniamo il supporto e la formazione necessari per garantire il tuo successo, insieme a un eccezionale pacchetto di benefit.

Capelli, moda, formazione e motivazione sono i pilastri del nostro successo, e ogni ruolo aziendale è altamente valorizzato. Ogni membro del nostro team contribuisce al successo di TONI&GUY.

La nostra passione è promuovere un'eccellenza di squadra in ogni reparto.

Lavora con noi: https://toniandguy.it/work-with-us/
I nostri saloni: https://toniandguy.it/salon-finder/

We are a private braiding studio specialising in knotless braids that nurture the health of natural curls and coils. Our mission is to redefine the braiding experience—an essential part of so many Black women’s lives, yet one that rarely feels like a treat. After being marginalised in society for so long, Black women deserve an elevated experience that celebrates their beauty and worth. At our studio, we’re here to make that happen.

We offer a luxurious, relaxing experience in an intimate setting, free from the noise and distractions of larger salons. This isn’t just about braids—it’s about self-worth and empowerment, which play a huge part in personal and professional success. For our target audience, these elements aren’t just luxuries, but integral to maintaining their busy lifestyles while embracing their natural beauty.

At the heart of everything we do are the values of professionalism, transparency, education, empowerment, and community. We proudly advocate for and support Black-owned, female-owned, and local businesses, reflecting our commitment to uplifting our community.

Ultimately, we are more than just a salon—we are part of a movement aimed at empowering women to love and embrace their natural hair while balancing their busy lives.

Name: Aztec Health
Description:
Aztec Health is a Texas-based, veteran-owned Personal Assistance Services (PAS) agency committed to providing compassionate, reliable, and high-quality in-home support for individuals who need help with daily living. We empower clients to remain safe, independent, and comfortable in their homes by delivering personalized care from trained and trustworthy caregivers.

We specialize in hands-on non-medical personal care, including assistance with bathing, dressing, grooming, mobility, meal preparation, housekeeping, medication reminders, and companionship services. Our team works closely with families to create customized care plans that meet each client's unique needs while promoting dignity, safety, and independence.

At Aztec Health, we believe that quality home care starts with quality caregivers. That’s why we invest in comprehensive background checks, competency-based training, ongoing supervision, and continuous caregiver development to ensure our care standards exceed industry expectations.

We proudly serve seniors, adults with disabilities, veterans, and individuals recovering from illness or hospitalization. Whether a client needs a few hours of support each week or full-time assistance, we deliver dependable, compassionate care built on trust and respect.

As a veteran-operated agency, we bring discipline, integrity, and mission-focused leadership to the home care experience. Our goal is simple: to deliver exceptional PAS services that enhance quality of life and allow clients to thrive at home.

At Aztec Health, your family is our priority, your safety is our commitment, and your independence is our mission.

Name: Rigmor - Personlig Assistent for Seniorer
Description:
Rigmor - Personlig Assistance for Seniorer
Meget mere end blot ekstra hænder

Mit navn er Rigmor Fribo, og som din dedikerede assistent tilbyder jeg omsorgsfuld og næstekærlig støtte som et alternativ eller supplement til hjemmehjælpen. Uanset om det offentlige ikke dækker nok, eller du bare har brug for særlig pleje, tryghed eller selskab, er jeg her.

Med min assistance kan du få hjælp til opgaver, der virker uoverskuelige, eller opleve ting, du længe har savnet.

Her er et udpluk af, hvad jeg kan tilbyde:
• Personlig pleje
• Kørsel og ledsagelse
• Indkøb og madlavning
• Håndtere kontakt og møder, fx med offentlige instanser
• Arrangerer kulturoplevelser og rejser
• Undervisning i brug af pc og www
• Aflaste familier, der er tynget af demens, alzheimer eller fysiske handicaps
• Støtte i dagene efter udskrivelse fra hospital
• En god samtalepartner og godt selskab

Min hjælp udspringer altid af dit/jeres behov og ønsker, og tilpasses din/jeres situation.
Jeg har hjulpet ældre og deres familier med praktiske ting og omsorg siden 2012. Min baggrund er bred og dækker både sundhedssektoren og offentlig administration. Jeg har års erfaring som sygehjælper og har været sygeplejestuderende i tre år. Er projektleder, coach og har arbejdet 13 år i den offentlige administration. Oprindelig er jeg uddannet erhvervssproglig korrespondent. Jeg har voksne børn, en dejlig mand, forældre og svigerforældre - en tilværelse fuld af kærlighed, knaster og livserfaring. 

Men denne erfaring, kan jeg tilbyde en støttende hånd og nærværende oplevelser, der imødekommer dig og dine individuelle behov.

Ring 8173 7998 eller skriv til kontakt@rigmorpaforseniorer.dk og lad os få en uforpligtende snak om, hvordan jeg kan hjælpe dig og din familie.

Founded in 2016 in Marinha Grande, CATLOOK set out to redefine how people care for their brows and lashes. Driven by a commitment to innovation, exceptional client service, and strategic partnerships, CATLOOK quickly became a leader in beauty services. In 2022, our success led to a standout collaboration with PRIMARK, launching our first in-store Beauty Studio at NorteShopping, where we bring exclusive beauty experiences directly to customers.

Building on a strong national presence, CATLOOK took an exciting step onto the international stage in 2024, entering the Spanish market with a new PRIMARK Beauty Studio at Fan Mallorca Shopping in Palma de Mallorca. Mirroring the successful concept in Portugal, this space offers expert brow, lash, and nail services.

In parallel, CATLOOK expanded its franchise programme, with the opening of our first franchise studio in Pombal, extending our brand’s reach and creating new opportunities for passionate entrepreneurs.

True specialists in brows and lashes, we shape not only aesthetics but also the confidence and empowerment of our clients. Our reputation for excellence continues to flourish, inspiring our vision to share our passion for beauty even further.

Welcome to Sylvian Care South-East London, a local home care provider founded on a simple, non-negotiable principle: to put people first. We are a purpose-driven, human-centred business dedicated to setting a new standard for care in our community.

For Families Seeking Exceptional Care

I know how frustrating finding good care can be – I built this business to solve that problem. My promise is simple: a consistent, compassionate service you can rely on. You’ll build a trusting relationship with a dedicated professional carer who understands your specific needs. You get peace of mind knowing the person in your home genuinely loves what they do.

We’re not about ticking boxes – we’re about people. This is a partnership that evolves with you. You’ll never get a ‘computer says no’ response from us. If something isn’t working, we’ll solve it together. My goal is to provide a service I’m proud of, and more importantly, that genuinely satisfies you and your family.

For Passionate, Purpose-Driven Care Professionals

This isn't just another care job. I created this company to be somewhere I’d want to work. Our 'human-centered' philosophy puts you at the heart of everything we do. We're purpose-driven, offering comprehensive training, a supportive team culture, and a real voice in our operations – because empowering you is how we deliver exceptional care to our clients.

Our Services Include:

Companionship & Social Support

Personal Care & Daily Routines

Specialist Dementia & Alzheimer's Care

Post-Hospital & Respite Care

Get in Touch

Exploring care options? Don't hesitate to get in touch with us for a confidential, no-pressure conversation about your needs. We're here to listen and help you figure it out.

Looking for a rewarding career? If you are a talented care professional seeking a role where you will be truly valued, we invite you to visit our website to learn more about joining our team.

Name: Jennifer Bassi Cosmetic Tattoo
Description:
Hello! Thank you for your interest in my work.

I was lucky to be born with the gift of artistic talent and an eye to detail.

I am passionate about my art, I put everything I have to make sure your procedure turns out as beautiful as possible. Remember, your face is my canvas! My goal is to listen to what you like, suggest some ideas but ultimately, enhance your own features.

I was taught one on one by Conne' Lord, who is a nationally renowned Permanent Cosmetics Artist and Instructor. You will benefit from my experience, specializing in Permanent Cosmetics since 1999.

I pay close attention to the smallest of detail, ensuring your satisfaction and always looking for ways to improve my talent. 

I discuss with my clients the events that will occur before the procedure, their desired outcome and what I think would look great. Together, we decide the best way to enhance your own natural beauty!

I have always been a perfectionist and my clients benefit from this attribute and my learned patience. It’s an art, you don’t rush art! Please don’t make an appointment after your procedure. We are done when we are both happy with the outcome!

I absolutely love my profession, I take a lot of pride in my work!

I was certified by SPCP - Society of Permanent Cosmetic Professionals - 

this gives you assurance that I was tested of my skills and safety matters. 

If you are in Dallas, please send me an email with subject line: Dallas and I will let you know my next visit.


I look forward to meeting you.

Jennifer Emma Bassi
Call/Text 214-810-4651
jennifer@cosmetictattoo.expert
https://cosmetictattoo.expert

The Association CDF (Coiffeur de France) is an initiative aimed at supporting and promoting our talents internationally. It represents a unique opportunity for French hairdressers to develop and shine on the international stage.

Objectives of the Association
•	International Visibility: Showcase the talents of French hairdressers and entrepreneurs worldwide.
•	Professional Recognition: Offer French and international recognition to the members of the association.
•	Career Opportunities: Facilitate international career opportunities for French hairdressers.
•	Development Opportunities for Establishments
•	Consulting for Country Integration: For establishments or hairdressers.
Membership and Benefits
For Member Establishments:
•	Responding to international event bids (Fashion Week, Olympics, international beauty pageants, etc.)
•	Recruitment platform for versatile hairdressers for international positions.
•	Targeted training to meet the specific needs of international markets.
•	Management replacement for your salons in case of absence (vacation, illness, etc.).
•	Parisian reference address to enhance the credibility and visibility of your establishment.
•	Visibility on the CDF website and social media (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn).
For Member Hairdressers:
•	Participation in international events to increase their visibility.
•	Finding contracts or internships abroad to broaden their professional experience.
•	Discovering new product brands to enrich their expertise.
•	Access to international training to stay at the forefront of techniques and trends.
•	International career development with personalized advice.
•	Salary and benefits negotiation advice
A membership fee is set per hairdresser and per establishment, ensuring access to the numerous benefits and opportunities offered by the CDF association.
A website is under construction along with all associated social media channels. This will enable smooth communication and optimal visibility f

Name: Kari | KIN
Description:
Welcome to KIN.

KIN was born out of a desire to help women reimagine what’s possible - not just in work, but in every part of life. It’s about taking back the definition of success, creating from instinct instead of expectation, and building lives that actually feel aligned and alive.

KIN is for women who:

- feel unfulfilled in the roles they’ve been playing and are ready for more
- are on the edge of a big leap but want guidance for the transition
- know what they want but need support to finally make it happen
- have had something end - career, relationship, identity - and feel the pull toward a new beginning
- are simply ready to stop settling and step into who they’re becoming

This is where we stop choosing between “career” or “life.” It’s where the whole woman gets to be seen, supported, and free to create what’s next.

Name: MANDAGLO
Description:
I’m Amanda Harris, a Licensed Master Cosmetologist and the founder of MANDAGLO, a mobile beauty business serving Savannah, Richmond Hill, and the surrounding Coastal Georgia area. With over 16 years of experience in makeup artistry, custom spray tans, and personalized beauty education, my mission is simple: to help people feel confidently themselves.

At MANDAGLO, I specialize in on-location makeup and spray tan services for weddings, events, photoshoots, media appearances, and everyday moments that matter. I also offer personalized makeup lessons for real women, those tired of not knowing what to do with their makeup bag and ready to learn techniques that truly work for their face, lifestyle, and goals.

My approach is skin-focused, connection-driven, and deeply intentional. Whether I’m preparing a bride for her wedding day, creating a glow for a fashion influencer, or teaching someone how to master their own look, I lead with heart, precision, and a calming presence that lets clients feel taken care of.

Before launching MANDAGLO, I was the General Manager of Bluemercury’s 100th store in Savannah, where I built lasting relationships and led a luxury beauty team in a high-end retail setting. I’ve also had the privilege of working with top-tier brands and media clients, including on-air talent for Paramount and CBS News.

I believe makeup and sunless tanning aren’t just services, they’re tools for self-celebration. Beauty should feel like you, grounded in your style, enhancing your skin, and leaving you feeling radiant inside and out.

Let’s connect, collaborate, or create something beautiful together.

www.mandaglo.com
@mandaglo | Makeup • Spray Tans • Lessons

Name: Dermalogica Türkiye
Description:
1986'dan beri profesyonel düzeyde cilt bakımı Dermalogica, bir cilt bakım terapisti tarafından geliştirildi. İşte bu yüzden sadece bugün değil hayat boyu etkili ve kişiselleştirilebilen çözümlerin neler olduğunu biliyoruz. Cilt terapistlerine ve kullanıcılarımıza profesyonel düzeyde eğitim, ürünler ve hizmetler sunuyoruz.

Dermalogica ve The International Dermal Institute’daki lisansüstü eğitim merkezlerinin kurucu ortağı ve baş vizyoneri olan Jane Wurwand, profesyonel cilt bakımı konusunda en tanınmış ve saygın otoritelerden biridir. Onun liderliğinde Dermalogica, dünya çapında 100'den fazla ülkede 100.000'den fazla cilt terapisti tarafından kullanılan lider profesyonel bir cilt bakımı markası haline gelmiştir.

Serimiz, cilt terapistlerine en iyi cilt bakım ürünlerini ve eğitimi sunabilme arzusundan doğdu. Küresel boyutta ortak bir amaca sahip cilt bakım terapistlerimize beceriye dayalı eğitimler sunarak; herkesin sağlıklı bir cilde ulaşmasını sağlıyoruz. Dermalogica, dünyada cilt bakım profesyonellerinin bir numaralı tercihidir.

Her müşterimiz için kişiselleştirilmiş bakımlar ve hizmetler yaratıyoruz çünkü her cildin farklı olduğunu biliyoruz. En iyi sonuçlar, bir cilt uzmanı tarafından size özel öneriler ile sağlanır. Yaşam tarzınız veya bulunduğunuz çevre nasıl olursa olsun, Dermalogica'nın sizin için çözümler sunacağından emin olabilirsiniz.

Ellerimiz, sesimiz ve niyetimiz ile yayılan dokunuşunun gücüne inanıyoruz. Bu şekilde birbirimizle benzersiz, kalıcı bağlar oluşturuyoruz.

Name: AUTHENTIC - Coiffure Beauté
Description:
L’histoire AUTHENTIC 
•octobre 2014
Le salon de coiffure AUTHENTIC, niché dans une ancienne galerie d’art entre les Carmes et St Étienne, est fondé en 2014 à Toulouse par la coiffeuse experte et très appréciée, Virginie Garcia Barrau et son époux Frédéric Garcia. Au décès de Virginie en 2015, Frédéric, qui n’est pas du métier, doit faire un choix crucial: abandonner ou continuer. C’est en s'appuyant sur la première coiffeuse salariée du groupe, Sophie Cornet, qu’il décide de faire perdurer le projet.

Au fil des années, malgré les épreuves traversées, Sophie s’aguerrit et manage avec cœur une belle équipe de coiffeurs grâce à la complicité, la rigueur et l’énergie toujours très positive de Frédéric, papa solo, directeur d’une agence de tourisme et patron impliqué.

•novembre 2020
Frédéric a en tête de dupliquer le modèle Authentic. Il investit pour pérenniser l'image du salon en épurant le logo et en précisant son identité : AUTHENTIC devient la “galerie coiffure et beauté”. Sophie, exprime quant à elle le souhait d’évoluer : elle aimerait diriger son propre salon.

•janvier 2022
Frédéric et Sophie s’associent pour créer le 2ème salon du groupe AUTHENTIC. Sophie laisse le poste de manager à Raphaël Machado qu’elle a formé pour se consacrer à ce nouveau projet qui se construira toujours à Toulouse, sur la rive gauche cette fois.

Dans l’intermède, les associés lancent “AUTHENTIC•NOMADE”. Sophie garde ainsi le contact avec sa clientèle en la coiffant dans son atelier éphémère et offre aussi un regard rafraîchissant sur la coiffure à domicile et la coiffure événementielle (mariage, shows, conventions…).

•février 2023
Raphaël fait ses armes en tant que manager dans le premier salon qui est rebaptisé “AUTHENTIC•CARMES - Galerie Coiffure et Beauté", en prévision de l’arrivée imminente (!!) de son petit frère “AUTHENTIC•St CYPRIEN - Corner Coiffure et Beauté ”.

L’histoire AUTHENTIC continue de s’écrire sans jamais oublier celle qui en avait posé les premiers mots •••

Name: AminoTherapy Center
Description:
The AminoTherapy is the pride of the Jordanian and Arab industry and a is new revolutionary technology in the field of hair straightening, as it is considered the first hair straightening material which contains natural materials and with a complete formula free of formaldehyde. The Amino Therapy relies on amino acids, fruit and vegetable acids, natural oils, Shea butter, Aloe Vera extract and sage. 

The working mechanism of the AminoTherapy is based on the natural proteins present in its components, as they bind to the proteins that are already found in the hair, support, strengthen and straighten them.

The AminoTherapy has been licensed by the Jordan Food and Drug Administration and the Saudi Food and Drug Authority. It has also obtained all certificates confirming that it is completely free of formaldehyde.

Dr.Raghad Almohareb fulfilled her promise to women that hair could be straightened to its maximum levels using natural materials.

Why choose Belle over just another salon?

Started in 29 July 2019 by dr. Jonathan Anindita, M.Biomed (AAM) and dr. Name: Volumely
Description:
Chez Volumely, nous pensons que la chevelure est une seconde peau, elle demande à être entretenue, chouchoutée… elle fait partie intégrante de votre personnalité et de comment vous vous présenter au monde, c’est un élément clé de votre personnalité.

Nous avons interrogées plusieurs femmes sur leur relation avec leur cheveux et souvent les mêmes frustrations reviennent : 

- chute de cheveux suite à un accouchement 
- passée la trentaine: cheveux moins épais et ternes
- cheveux abimés : stress, pollution, fatigue 
- cheveux fragilisés au retour des vacances d’été : chlore des piscines, eau de mer, exposition prolongée au soleil
- décoloration, balayage, lissage à répétition ce qui agresse également le cheveu…

Volumely est la première box pour entretenir tout types de cheveux et booster sa confiance en soi.

Les boxs Volumely offrent une routine de soins capillaires complète.
Chaque box, livrée tous les 2 mois, contient 4 à 5 produits full size (sérum pour le cuir chevelu, shampooing, après shampooing, masque, spray fixant, huile, …) pour hydrater, protéger et faire briller vos cheveux ainsi qu’un accessoire de mode/beauté et une gourmandise afin de rendre le moment relaxant et non pas une corvée. 

La box contient également un livret digital qui permet de découvrir le rituel et d’en savoir plus sur la composition et les bénéfices des soins sélectionnés. 

Avec Volumely, sublimez vos cheveux et booster votre capital confiance!

Name: Atelier Luxury Hair Services
Description: A modern salon offering Luxury Hair and Aesthetic Services on Historic East Johnson Street in Madison, WI. More sensory than colorful, the Atelier brand and space represents a feeling, inviting clients to enjoy a high end and unique experience. As a widely used French word, Atelier has been branded and incorporated as a ‘collective group of Artists’, offering luxury hair services and an unmatched Client Experience. Both a space to showcase eloquence, edge, a broad collective of hair stylists, artists and other industry leaders, each piece that the salon is comprised of had been carefully selected to match the aesthetic and represents what the brand is comprised of — including homage to the founders grandmothers fluent and first language, French as a native French Canadian.

Name: Groupe Zannoni
Description:
Le Groupe Zannoni est né d’une conviction simple : que l’on pouvait repenser la beauté capillaire en alliant naturalité, exigence et innovation.

En 2020, c’est à Ajaccio que l’aventure commence, avec l’ouverture du premier salon Organic’R. 
L’ambition ? Offrir une autre approche de la coiffure, plus respectueuse du cheveu, de la personne et de la nature. Trois salons plus tard, Organic’R est devenu un lieu de confiance pour celles et ceux qui cherchent une expertise professionnelle, des produits choisis pour leur composition, et une atmosphère bienveillante. En 2025, Organic’R se prépare à franchir une nouvelle étape : l’ouverture à la franchise.

Porté par cette même exigence, le Groupe Zannoni lance en parallèle sa propre marque de soins capillaires : Sora.
Une marque 100 % naturelle, formulée en Corse, avec des plantes endémiques cueillies et transformées dans une logique de traçabilité intégrale. Ici, pas de compromis : chaque formule est le fruit d’un travail scientifique rigoureux, d’un ancrage territorial fort, et d’une volonté d’innovation constante.

Le Groupe Zannoni investit dans la création, la recherche et le développement, avec la conviction que la naturalité, l’innovation et le respect du vivant sont les piliers d'une cosmétique capillaire de demain.

Entre héritage insulaire, excellence artisanale et audace entrepreneuriale, le Groupe Zannoni construit un modèle alternatif : une beauté capillaire plus engagée, plus transparente, plus essentielle.

Questa attività favorisce la creazione di solidi rapporti con le farmacie del territorio, aprendo così nuove opportunità nel commercio di prodotti dedicati.

Nel corso degli anni, l’azienda si struttura e si consolida a livello regionale, distinguendosi sia nell’ambito dei servizi che nella distribuzione. La svolta arriva nel 2005, con l’introduzione del decreto “Bersani”: un’importante realtà della Grande Distribuzione Organizzata sceglie Euromed come partner per lo sviluppo di un innovativo progetto di parafarmacie a libero servizio.

L’iniziativa si rivela un successo oltre ogni aspettativa, dando vita ai primi corner e contribuendo alla continua crescita dell’azienda, oggi punto di riferimento nel settore.

Willkommen bei Brügge Cares!  Wir sind ein führender Pflegedienst, der sich leidenschaftlich für die Gesundheit, das Wohlbefinden und die Pflege unserer Patienten engagiert. Bei Brügge Cares setzen wir auf Innovation und fortschrittliche Pflegepraktiken, um sicherzustellen, dass unsere Patienten die bestmögliche Versorgung erhalten. Wir sind stolz darauf, eine vertrauenswürdige Ressource für Familien zu sein, die Unterstützung und Betreuung benötigen, sei es im eigenen Zuhause oder in einer Pflegeeinrichtung.

Unsere Mission ist es, das Leben unserer Patienten zu bereichern und eine positive Veränderung in unserer Gemeinschaft zu bewirken. Wenn Sie nach hochwertiger Pflege und Unterstützung suchen, stehen wir Ihnen gerne zur Seite. Kontaktieren Sie uns noch heute, um mehr darüber zu erfahren, wie Brügge Cares Ihnen und Ihren Lieben helfen kann. Gemeinsam schaffen wir eine bessere Zukunft für alle!

Description:
Welcome to Catherine PEIGNE’s World, where luxury and innovation come together to offer an incomparable haircare experience.

Catherine Peigne, with 40 years of experience in hair styling, possesses a unique vision of hair well-being. 

With recognised expertise and unparalleled know-how, she has conquered an exclusive clientele by offering ultra-personalised hair styling and treatments. Catherine is driven by an innovative vision, combining the determination inherited from her mother and the creative passion passed down by her father. 

Her endless quest for perfection and the well-being of her clients has led her to explore the challenges of science and nature, and Catherine is now taking a new step by introducing revolutionary solutions to the haircare market, developed in collaboration with renowned scientific experts. Her commitment to research and development has resulted in the creation of an innovative patent, using extracts of natural plants and cutting-edge biotechnology for exclusive formulas.

Her products embody efficiency and environmental respect. Designed with premium ingredients and innovative formulas, they offer visible and long-lasting results. Her range, including products such as shampoos, masks, hair treatments, and serums, meets the specific needs of every hair type.

You can indulge in three distinct ranges: Silk Protein with gold flakes, Caviar, and cannabidiol, each offering a unique experience.

Catherine Peigne is a brand that embodies excellence, innovation, and an exceptional hair experience for its clients both in France and internationally.

For more information about our products and partnership opportunities, please contact us @ cp.idesignyourlook@gmail.com.

Consideramos que cada tratamiento debe ser único según un diagnóstico realizado en profundidad. Para dicho análisis contamos con profesionales destacados, con más de 10 años de experiencia, titulados en dermatocosmiatría, cosmetología y amplia formación en aparatología y estética avanzada.

Gracias a estos tratamientos personalizados hemos logrado, en nuestros pacientes, resultados reales disminuyendo diversas problemáticas que afectan la salud de la piel y la autoestima.

Eudermia es sinónimo de salud, cuidado de la piel y excelencia

Description:
Vivah Catalyst is a boutique matrimonial matchmaking service company. Incepted and promoted by professionals from corporate management background, HR, Branding, Marketing including relationship psychologists.

We are, "Vivah Catalyst" or a “Marriage Catalyst”,  a professionally managed organization that provides matchmaking services for individuals who are seeking marriage partners. The role of us as a marriage catalyst would be to facilitate the process of finding a suitable partner for a client by understanding their preferences, interests, and requirements and matching them with potential partners who meet their criteria.

As a Vivah Catalyst, we may use various methods and tools to find suitable matches, such as personal networking, or traditional matchmaking techniques and if needed, online matrimony platforms,. The aim is to expedite the process of finding a compatible partner and provide support and guidance throughout the process, including facilitating communication between the parties and helping to resolve any issues or conflicts that may arise.

In short, our role as a Vivah Catalyst is to provide personalised matrimonial facilitation services, using human intelligence. As all individuals are different, their needs are different, so that means it is important to understand them as a person rather as a profile only, that will help these very important persons find a suitable partner and we will facilitate the process of marriage while ensuring that both parties are comfortable and happy with their decision to enter into a lifelong commitment.

We have representatives in USA, Canada, Germany, Sweden and UK/Ireland to facilitate

Name: ASK Beauty
Description:
Jesteśmy rodzinną firmą, która powstała z pasji do piękna i świadomej pielęgnacji. ASK to nie tylko nazwa – to inicjały Ani, Sebastiana i Karoliny, które symbolizują wartości, na których budujemy naszą markę: autentyczność, zaangażowanie i wiedzę.

W ASK Beauty łączymy naukę, luksus i doświadczenie. Współpracujemy wyłącznie z wyselekcjonowanymi markami premium, które udowadniają, że pielęgnacja skóry może być czymś więcej niż rutyną – może stać się codziennym rytuałem, źródłem przyjemności i inwestycją w siebie.

Nasza historia rozpoczęła się w ASK Beauty Clinic – miejscu, w którym dbamy o zdrowie i piękno skóry pacjentów. To doświadczenie pozwoliło nam stworzyć ASK Beauty Sklep – przestrzeń online, w której oferujemy starannie wybrane kosmetyki premium, testowane i rekomendowane przez ekspertów. Dzięki temu nasi klienci zyskują pewność, że sięgają po produkty, które naprawdę działają.

ASK Beauty to nie tylko sprzedaż – to edukacja i inspiracja. Poprzez cykl wideo „Skincare Couture” i liczne materiały eksperckie dzielimy się wiedzą, obalamy mity i pokazujemy, jak pielęgnacja może zmieniać samopoczucie i jakość życia.

Naszą misją jest tworzenie kultury świadomej pielęgnacji – opartej na jakości, innowacjach i luksusowych doświadczeniach. Stawiamy na indywidualne podejście, bo wierzymy, że piękno ma wiele definicji, a każda z nich zasługuje na szacunek i pielęgnację.

 Jeśli chcesz być częścią świata beauty w wydaniu premium, dołącz do naszej społeczności. W ASK Beauty znajdziesz nie tylko produkty – znajdziesz filozofię troski o siebie.

Description:
It’s your life, and you should be the one who decides what end-of-life experience you have. Whether it’s engaging a Death Doula to demystify the dying process and provide support, or planning ahead so your medical and personal end-of-life choices are clear for when you you can't speak for yourself.

The MyDeathDoula service works alongside the person who is dying and their loved ones to create a space where you can be fully supported through your final living experience.

Your MyDyingPlan is where your medical and personal end-of-life decisions are captured. It enables medical decisions to be made according to your choices and that your personal preferences for your last moments are clear and can be carried out.

Name: nobu care UG
Description:
nobu care organisiert häusliche 24-Stunden-Betreuung – zuverlässig, empathisch und effizient.

Wir unterstützen Familien dabei, ihren Angehörigen eine würdevolle Betreuung im eigenen Zuhause zu ermöglichen. Unser Fokus liegt dabei auf einer klar strukturierten Organisation und einem persönlichen Service, der alle Beteiligten entlastet.

So funktioniert’s:
nobu care vermittelt Betreuungskräfte, die bei einem erfahrenen Personaldienstleister in Polen angestellt sind. Der Dienstleister stellt dem Kunden die Betreuung direkt in Rechnung. Zusätzlich erhebt nobu care eine monatliche Servicepauschale für Organisation, Kommunikation und Begleitung des gesamten Betreuungsverhältnisses.

Was uns auszeichnet:

Zentraler Ansprechpartner: Unsere Kunden haben ausschließlich Kontakt zu nobu care. Wir kümmern uns um alle Abläufe, vom ersten Beratungsgespräch bis zur laufenden Betreuung.
Transparente Struktur: Unsere Preisgestaltung ist klar und nachvollziehbar. Keine versteckten Kosten.
Individuelle Lösungen: Wir gehen auf die Bedürfnisse jeder Familie ein und finden passgenaue Betreuungskonzepte.
Zuverlässigkeit & Erreichbarkeit: Wir stehen unseren Kunden jederzeit zur Seite – schnell, direkt und lösungsorientiert.
Unsere Kundinnen und Kunden sind ausschließlich Privatpersonen. Sie profitieren von unserer Erfahrung, unserem Netzwerk und unserer konsequenten Serviceorientierung.

nobu care – weil gute Betreuung Organisation braucht.

Description:
Our mission is to champion the health, dignity, and happiness of seniors by offering expert care management and unwavering advocacy, ensuring every individual enjoys a life of fulfillment and comfort.

Joshua is committed to enhancing the quality of life for older adults, bringing extensive experience to geriatric care management.  As a Care Manager in Seattle, Washington, he specializes in providing comprehensive support and advocacy for elderly clients, addressing their unique physical, emotional, and social needs.  He conducts thorough assessments and creates individualized care plans tailored to each client's circumstances and preferences.

Joshua's experience in clinical settings includes helping patients navigate the complexities of the US healthcare system.  His leadership and collaboration with clinical teams have improved patient outcomes, particularly in chronic condition management, medication adherence, and health literacy.

His dedication to community health extends beyond the clinic and country.  As a Peace Corps Volunteer in Chiúre, Mozambique, Joshua developed and implemented training for hospital staff, improved HIV treatment adherence, and engaged in community-based health activities.  His hands-on approach and cross-cultural collaboration significantly contributed to local health initiatives.

Joshua holds a Bachelor of Arts in Social Work from Eastern Washington University.  Joshua is a member of the National Association of Social Workers (NASW).

Driven by a passion for promoting independence, autonomy, and compassionate care, Joshua continuously seeks opportunities for professional development and stays updated on best practices in geriatric care and medical management.  He is dedicated to fostering strong relationships with clients, families, and healthcare providers, ensuring dignified and respectful care for older adults facing health challenges and life transitions.

Name: Fusion Care
Description:
About Us
Fusion Care are a leaving care community organisation based in Bury. We work across Lancashire and Greater Manchester providing support to children and young people. We were founded by Ray Porter who had been a foster carer since 2005, after realising that many young people do not always receive the support they need, Fusion was established in 2009. Since then Fusion Care has continued to grow from strength to strength and in total our staff have supported over 100 young people! 

Our Support
Predominantly we work with young people aged 16+ and support them towards independence. These young people may find themselves receiving support from just a few hours per week up to 24/7 staff. We also provide support to children and young people in the community in a range of settings, we call this 'Special Outreach Support'. Some young people find themselves in our care whilst seeking asylum, they receive the same level of support as our other young people. We provide support to parents and children, they receive a key worker who has previously worked with other parents and children and understand what to expect. Finally, we can offer emergency, interim and bridging support placements to children and young people. This can be either at a young person's family or fostering home or at our caravan at Ribby Hall to provide respite and activities during a difficult time.  

Training 
We pride ourselves on being a small company with a big heart. As much as we support our young people, we also support our staff to develop themselves. All our staff receive a mandatory online training package consisting of 10 courses, in addition to this we provide First Aid training within the first year to all team members. 
For those who want to develop themselves further we offer staff to undertake a qualification relevant to them with our partner Bury College. Staff have progressed to Social Work degrees with The Open University!

Name: Dovida Zeist-Amersfoort
Description:
Onze naam ‘Dovida’ komt van de woorden voor ‘thuis’ (Domus) en ‘leven’ (Vida). Onze naam weerspiegelt thuis, leven, ondersteuning en zelfstandigheid. 

Onze visie is een wereld te creëren die zich focust op mensen en ze ondersteunt om op hun eigen manier te leven. Binnen onze visie staan versterking en de kans om keuzes te maken centraal. 

Onze missie is de ondersteuning, versterking en zorg voor mensen zo te organiseren dat ze centraal staan bij elke beslissing die we nemen. Onze missie benadrukt onze intentie om te focussen op wie mensen zijn en hoe ze willen leven en gezien willen worden. Wij doorleven deze missie in onze interacties, beslissingen en op ieder moment dat we bij onze klanten of hun familie zijn. 

Ons beeldmerk, ‘de cirkel van harten’, symboliseert de cirkel van zorg en aandacht die ieder individueel persoon omringt. Hiermee plaatsen we onze klanten letterlijk centraal.

Wij weten dat het waardevol is om thuis ouder te worden en wij helpen jou hier graag bij. Ontdek onze diensten en vind de perfecte diensten die passen bij jouw behoeften op dovida.nl/onze-diensten

Name: Mt. Assisi Place
Description:
Families seek personal care at challenging times in their lives. Choosing care needn’t be a stressful experience. At Mt. Assisi Place — an 81-bed personal care home in Pittsburgh’s north suburbs — we work with our Residents, their family members and healthcare providers to ease this time of transition and take pride in welcoming them to a great place to live. 

Our care team is dedicated to providing quality, compassionate personal care in the Christian tradition, as has been provided on this site for more than 50 years. Mt. Assisi Place was originally founded as Marian Hall Home in 1970 by the School Sisters of St. Francis, marking an expansion of the Sisters’ ministry work to include both education and elder care.

While Mt. Assisi Place is no longer affiliated with the Sisters, we are proud to carry forward their century-long tradition of compassionate care. We have more than a dozen retired School Sisters in residence, and many artifacts of their time here are on display throughout the building. The Sisters also continue to coordinate Masses in our chapel.

“May we never lose our Wonder”

What is Wonder?
Wonder is when suddenly all your senses are heightened. Colors are more vivid and beautiful. Aromas explode in your nostrils. Texture and touches somehow both calm and excite you. It is being captivated, satisfied, and with every breath fully alive. It’s child-like, rare, mystical, and marvelous. You are aware of the extraordinary in everything all around you. Name: Living in Alignment
Description:
Living in Alignment: een platform, maar vooral een levenshouding die geboren is uit mijn eigen reis van vallen en opstaan. Het pad hiernaartoe was allesbehalve recht. Maar onderweg vond ik telkens opnieuw de moed om te kiezen. Voor mezelf, voor mijn vrijheid, voor mijn waarheid.

Uit dat diepe verlangen om te leven in volle afstemming is LIA ontstaan, als beweging en levensstijl. Een thuiskomen in jezelf. Living in Alignment is de plek waar vrouwen die voelen dat ze méér willen zichzelf opnieuw ontdekken.

Bij Living in Alignment draait alles om leven in afstemming: niet vanuit moeten en presteren, maar vanuit mogen en zijn. Het is een uitnodiging om los te komen van de rollen, verwachtingen en verhalen die we hebben meegekregen, en terug te keren naar wie we werkelijk zijn. Hier vind je inspiratie, ritme, rust en vuur als levende bouwstenen voor een nieuw fundament. Met tools die je helpen je leven opnieuw vorm te geven: van voeding tot mindset, van routines tot reflectie.

Via mijn boeken en resets deel ik een rauwe maar zachte benadering van leven in alignment. Echt, doorleefd en praktisch, als uitnodiging om een ander pad te kiezen. Ik ben schrijver, ondernemer, creator en vrouw.

Living in Alignment herinnert vrouwen aan wie ze zijn, lang voordat de wereld hen vertelde wie ze moesten zijn. Het is een plek waar je jezelf opnieuw ontmoet, waar heling, groei en kracht samenkomen, en waar je leert leven op jouw voorwaarden: bewust, vrij en in harmonie.

Welkom bij Living in Alignment. 

Liefs Liana

Od 8 lat świadczymy szeroki wachlarz usług z ogromną dbałością o miłą atmosferę oraz intymne warunki. Nasza kompleksowość pozwala w jednym miejscu zadbać o twarz, ciało i duszę. Podchodzimy do klientów holistycznie!
Dzięki ciągłemu podnoszeniu kwalifikacji naszego personelu, uczestnictwie w licznych szkoleniach i Kongresach zawsze jesteśmy na bieżąco z nowymi technologiami, aby jeszcze skuteczniej dbać o WASZE piękno. Odpowiedni dobór planu zabiegowego zapewnia zachwycające efekty naszych kuracji. Zależy nam na wysokiej skuteczności zabiegów z zachowaniem naturalnego wyglądu. Szczególne znaczenie ma dla nas dokładne przeanalizowanie przeciwwskazań do zabiegów, gdyż dbamy o to, żeby klienci czuli się w naszych rękach komfortowo, ale przede wszystkim bezpiecznie! Posiadamy własną sterylizatornię, co gwarantuje sterylność sprzętu, na którym świadczymy usługi. Wiele lat doświadczenia i pasji zrodziło miejsce, w którym klienci oraz pracownicy czują się wspaniale. Nasza misja to świadczenie usług doskonałych, bo Piękno rodzi się w ESSE!

At Finessed Ink, we specialize in paramedical tattooing and scalp micropigmentation (SMP)—transformative procedures designed to restore confidence and enhance natural beauty. 

Based in Calgary, Alberta, we provide expert solutions for hair loss, scar camouflage, and permanent makeup enhancements using the latest techniques in the industry.

Why Choose Finessed Ink?
 Industry Expertise – Our artist is highly trained and skilled in paramedical tattooing, ensuring natural-looking, hyper-realistic results.
 Personalized Approach – Every client receives a custom treatment plan designed to match their unique needs and skin tone.
 Cutting-Edge Techniques – We use the latest technology and safest pigments for long-lasting, non-invasive solutions.
 Confidence-Boosting Results – We help clients regain confidence by restoring the appearance of hair density, concealing scars, and enhancing facial features.
 Professional, Private Studio – Located in Calgary, our studio provides a clean, welcoming, and discreet environment for all treatments.

Our Services
 Scalp Micropigmentation (SMP) – A non-surgical hair loss solution that replicates the look of real hair follicles.
 Scar Camouflage – Concealing scars from injuries, surgeries, or hair transplants with precision tattooing.
 Fine-Line Tattoos– Delicate and artistic self-expressions.
 Eyeliner Tattooing – Smudge-proof, perfectly applied eyeliner designed to last.
 Semi-Permanent Makeup – With Lash lifts/tints and eyebrow laminations, save time with your morning routine. 
 Tattoo Removals - A laser free treatment to remove tattoos that no longer match your aesthetic.

We believe everyone deserves to feel confident in their own skin. Whether you’re looking to restore your hairline, conceal scars, or enhance your natural beauty, Finessed Ink delivers results that look and feel authentic.

 Contact us today to book a consultation and take the first step toward feeling your best!

Name: L'Atelier Ki Fua
Description:
L’Atelier Ki Fua est bien plus qu’un simple projet social, c’est une célébration vibrante de la beauté et de la diversité de l’Afrique et des îles. Notre histoire commence avec une passion profonde pour nos racines et un désir ardent de partager cette richesse avec le monde.

Au cœur de l’Atelier Ki Fua réside un engagement fondamental : transmettre les trésors de la beauté africaine et insulaire à travers les générations. Nous croyons que la véritable beauté réside dans la connexion à notre héritage, à notre énergie intérieure et à la sagesse transmise par nos ancêtres.

Mission de l'Atelier Ki Fua:

Chez l'Atelier Ki Fua, notre mission est de promouvoir la beauté véritable, celle qui transcende les normes superficielles et célèbre la singularité de chacun. Nous nous engageons à atteindre cet objectif en :

Transmettant le Savoir - Formation : Nous partageons les secrets de la beauté africaine et insulaire à travers des ateliers éducatifs et des outils pédagogiques, permettant à chacun de se connecter à son propre potentiel de beauté.
Promouvant des Produits Authentiques : Nous mettons en avant des produits cosmétiques, capillaires, herbes médicinales, accessoires, jeux, livres et poupées provenant d'entrepreneurs féminins africains, caribéens et antillais. Nos produits sont le reflet de notre diversité culturelle, tout en restant accessibles au monde entier.
Soutenant la Philanthropie : Nous nous engageons à donner une partie de nos bénéfices à deux associations à but non lucratif en Afrique que nous chérissons particulièrement : Ndako ya Bana et Addico Charlie Incroyable Comestible. Nous croyons en la responsabilité sociale et en la contribution à des causes qui comptent.

Name: Radical'Epil Haguenau
Description:
Bienvenue chez Radical Epil Haguenau, votre destination privilégiée pour une épilation durable et des soins de beauté avant-gardistes. En plein cœur de Haguenau, découvrez un espace où technologie et expertise s'harmonisent pour transformer votre routine de soin.

Notre centre se distingue par l'utilisation de l'épilation laser professionnelle, une méthode qui vise les follicules pileux pour réduire significativement la repousse des poils, promettant une peau lisse et douce. En parallèle, la technologie IPL Or’Light, avec ses appareils de haute qualité français, offre une solution efficace et sécuritaire pour une épilation longue durée.

Chaque parcours débute par un diagnostic personnalisé suivi d'un test gratuit, permettant à nos praticiennes diplômées d'adapter le traitement à vos besoins. Le nombre de séances, estimé entre 6 et 8, est défini pour atteindre des résultats optimaux, vous assurant une satisfaction complète.

Au-delà de l'épilation, nous innovons avec des soins de photo-rajeunissement. Cette technique utilise la lumière pulsée pour cibler et améliorer l'aspect de votre peau, procurant un rajeunissement visible au niveau du visage, du cou et du décolleté.

Radical Epil Haguenau s'engage à offrir des soins de haute qualité, personnalisés pour répondre à vos attentes. Nos technologies de pointe et notre équipe expérimentée sont au service de votre beauté et bien-être.

Contactez-nous pour une consultation gratuite et entamez votre transformation vers une beauté durable et éclatante.

#RadicalEpilHaguenau #ÉpilationLaser #IPL #BeautéDurable #SoinsDePeau #Haguenau

Name: Pflege Gemeinsam GmbH
Description:
Pflege Gemeinsam GmbH ist ein sehr moderner Pflegedienst, der einen exzellenten Ruf genießt. 

Daher ist es das Ziel von Gemeinsam, Pflegebedürftigen und ihren Angehörigen auch in schwierigen Zeiten professionelle Hilfe und Sicherheit zu bieten. Eben „Ihr Wegbegleiter in der Pflege" zu sein und jeden Lebensabschnitt adäquat zu begleiten. Dafür engagieren wir uns mit Herzblut, dass unsere Kunden/-innen so lange wie möglich selbstbestimmend und eigenständig in ihren eigenen 4 Wänden zu Hause leben können. Und wenn das nicht mehr möglich sein sollte, verhelfen wir mit Betreutem Wohnen und vor allem mit unserer einzigartigen Alternative zu einer Heimunterbringung – unserer Seniorenwohngemeinschaft – zu einem möglichst autonomen und würdevollen Leben mit Demenz.

Mit über 35 Jahren Erfahrung in Krefeld und weiteren überregionalen Standorten zählen wir zu den größten ambulanten Diensten unserer Gegend. Um auch in Zukunft ein zuverlässiger und kompetenter Partner sein zu können, liegen unsere Schwerpunkte zum einen in der Ausnutzung digitaler und innovativer Technologien in der Pflege, die mit eine Garantie für eine liebevolle und qualitativ hochwertige Versorgung der uns anvertrauten Personen sind.

Außerdem genießen unsere Mitarbeitenden ein Arbeitsumfeld, das den Pflegeberuf wertschätzt, das die persönliche und fachliche Entwicklung fördert und das sich an der Zufriedenheit unseres Kollegiums messen lässt. Denn die Qualität unserer pflegerischen, haushaltsnahen und betreuerischen Tätigkeiten, basiert auf sich wohlfühlenden, erstklassigen und engagierten Mitarbeitenden!

Name: Pflegedienst Merten & Merten GmbH
Description:
Wir, der Familienpflegedienst Merten und Merten, stehen seit mehr als 30 Jahren für Pflegeleistungen auf dem allerhöchsten Qualitätsniveau in Lünen, Dortmund und Umgebung. 

Unser Mission:
Kranke-, Pflege- und Hilfsbedürftige Menschen in einer familiären Atmosphäre umfassend und professionell fachpflegerisch zu beraten, zu unterstützen, zu versorgen und zu betreuen. 
Dabei steht nicht der Kunde im Mittelpunkt, sondern auch unsere Mitarbeiter. Denn nur wenn Kunden und Mitarbeiter gleichermaßen zufrieden sind, kann professionelle Pflege funktionieren. 

Unsere familiäre Atmosphäre:
Unser Pflegedienstkonzept beruht auf Basis einer familiären Atmosphäre. Da wir unser Unternehmen als Familienbetrieb führen wissen wir , wie wichtig Vertrauen, Geborgenheit, Verlässlichkeit, Ehrlichkeit und Empathie sind. Diese familiären Werte leben wir sowohl für unsere Kunden als auch für unsere Mitarbeiter. 
Dabei bemühen wir uns für unsere Kunden und Mitarbeiter ansprechbar zu sein. 

Unser Versprechen:
Um die bestmögliche pflegerische Qualität zu gewährleisten setzen wir auf regelmäßige Fort- und Weiterbildungen. Dabei gehen wir als Vorbilder immer voran. 

Unsere Vision:
Wir möchten den Pflegeberuf so attraktiv wie möglich gestalten und dass er wieder Wertschätzung in der Gesellschaft findet.

Name: MDCnutri – Nutrição Integrativa
Description:
A MDCnutri é um espaço de cuidado, escuta ativa e transformação por meio da Nutrição Comportamental e da Saúde Integrativa baseada em evidências. Atuamos com foco no ser humano como um todo  corpo, mente, cultura, história e emoções — promovendo acompanhamento nutricional personalizado, ético e fundamentado na ciência.

Realizamos atendimentos online, presenciais domiciliares e em homecare, levando cuidado a quem mais precisa, com flexibilidade e acolhimento. Cada paciente é atendido com empatia, respeito à sua história e sem julgamentos, longe de dietas punitivas, modismos ou terrorismo nutricional.

 Áreas de atuação:
• Nutrição Comportamental
• Saúde Integrativa baseada em evidências
• Fitoterapia (quando indicada)
• Terapia Nutricional em diferentes fases da vida
• Nutrição Clínica e Hospitalar
• Atendimento nutricional online e domiciliar
• Homecare (pacientes acamados, idosos, pós-cirúrgicos)
• Educação alimentar e oficinas temáticas
• Nutrição da mulher, materno-infantil e do idoso
• Cuidados paliativos e suporte familiar
• Projetos sociais e educativos em saúde

Trabalhamos para promover autonomia alimentar, qualidade de vida e a construção de uma nova relação com a comida  mais consciente, leve e possível. Acreditamos que nutrir é cuidar da história de cada pessoa, por isso cada atendimento é único, humanizado e transformador.

 Na MDCnutri, cuidar vai além do prato. Vai até onde você estiver.

Mit diesem Leitgedanken, der bis heute zur Unternehmensphilosophie zählt.

Comprehensive Support: Join our family and receive extensive training, ongoing support, and continuous updates on best practices.
Recession-Proof Industry: Tap into the consistently growing demand for in-home senior care.
Low Initial Investment: Starting a Daughter for Hire franchise requires a low initial investment compared to other franchise opportunities. This makes it accessible to many aspiring entrepreneurs.
Exclusive Territories: We have many desirable territories available giving you the benefit of an exclusive territory and the ability to choose the perfect market.  
Flexible Lifestyle: Achieve work-life balance with the ability to set your own schedule.

This unique combination of financial success, personal fulfillment, and community impact makes Daughter for Hire a meaningful and rewarding franchise opportunity.

Name: CLINICAL HAIR&HEALTH
Description:
Jsme specializované vlasové centrum a klinika trichologické dermatologie. Již od roku 2011 pomáháme lidem s péčí o vlasy a vlasovou pokožku v našich pobočkách v Praze, Brně, Pardubicích, Ostravě a Plzni.

Spojujeme lékařské zkušenosti, odborný přístup a účinnou dermokosmetiku Vivipharma, jejíž výsledky potvrzují klinické studie.

Staráme se o vlasy komplexně, a proto vedle trichologie nabízíme i další služby jako PRP nebo Regenera activa. Jednou z nejžádanějších je v poslední době transplantace vlasů. Patříme mezi špičku na českém trhu – pracujeme s nejmodernějšími transplantačními systémy a tvoříme klientům individuální transplantační plán. Každoročně u nás podstoupí transplantaci vlasů největší počet klientů v České republice. Naše zákroky vede zkušený lékařský tým v čele s lékařkou s více než 20letou praxí.

Name: BrowWell
Description:
BrowWell: The Ultimate Destination for Flawless Eyebrows

If you're looking for the ultimate solution to your thinning or sparse eyebrows, look no further than BrowWell. Our state-of-the-art microblading techniques ensure you leave our Norristown, PA location with the perfect set of brows.

Microblading is a revolutionary technique that involves using a small blade to deposit pigment under the skin, creating the illusion of fuller, more defined eyebrows. At BrowWell, our team of experts uses only the highest-quality pigments and tools to ensure that your microblading experience is as safe and effective as possible.

But microblading isn't just for those with thinning or sparse eyebrows. Our ombre powder brows technique is perfect for those who want a more subtle, natural-looking brow. And for those looking to enhance their hairline, our microblading hairline process can help create the illusion of fuller, thicker hair.

But our services don't stop there. At BrowWell, we also offer scalp micro-pigmentation, a cutting-edge technique that can help those suffering from hair loss or thinning achieve a fuller, more natural looking head of hair.

And for those who are hesitant about trying microblading, our before and after photos speak for themselves. Our clients consistently leave our studio with brows that are not only beautiful but also ideally suited to their individual needs and preferences.

At BrowWell, we understand that every woman's eyebrows are unique, which is why we take the time to listen to your needs and desires before beginning the microblading process. Our team of experts is dedicated to ensuring that you leave our studio feeling confident and beautiful.
So why wait? Book your appointment at BrowWell today and experience the ultimate solution to your eyebrow woes. We are dedicated to helping you achieve the brows of your dreams, and we will not rest until you're delighted with the results.

Name: The Exec Sobriety Coach
Description:
With over 25 years in senior leadership roles, I’ve seen firsthand how alcohol can become a quiet coping mechanism for high-achieving professionals. My own journey led me to re-evaluate that relationship, and in doing so, I found clarity, balance, and a renewed sense of purpose.

Now, as the founder of The Executive Sobriety Coach, I work with professionals who are sober curious or ready for change through confidential, one-to-one coaching. My approach is practical, honest, and free from judgement. No group therapy, no generic programmes, just tailored support grounded in real-life experience.

I help clients to:

• Navigate high-pressure roles and social settings without relying on alcohol

• Build personalised strategies that work with their lifestyle and values

• Thrive professionally and personally with a clear head and confident mindset

If you’re exploring what a life without alcohol might look like, or you know someone who is, feel free to connect or visit www.theexecsobrietycoach.uk

Name: Lashbox France
Description: Ce que nous préférons à propos de LBLA, c'est qu'il change la façon dont les professionnels des cils vivent et travaillent dans l'industrie de la beauté. Non seulement LBLA est fondée sur l'amour et la passion pour l'industrie, mais nous avons également créé LA technique pour travailler avec des cils de 0,03 méga volume qui a révolutionné l'industrie. Nous continuons d'apporter des changements dans l'industrie en nous concentrant sur des formations qui incluent l'incroyable technique et l'ensemble des compétences du bouquet de fleurs, parallèlement au coaching d'équilibre des affaires et de la vie, pour continuer cette révolution. Beaucoup d’entre nous sont devenus des artistes des cils parce que nous aimons avoir la capacité de permettre aux autres de se SENTIR belles. Le cœur derrière le choix d’une carrière comme celle-ci est de donner de l’espoir, c’est de donner de l’amour et cela donne la priorité aux autres. Ce sont des qualités que nous aimons retrouver chez les personnes avec qui nous nous entraînons, et c'est une manière appropriée de décrire le dynamisme de nos dirigeants et de chacun de nos formateurs. Puisque c'est le type de personnes qui nous attirent en tant qu'entreprise, nous avons pu créer une équipe qui fonctionne à partir d'une culture d'amour et qui s'investit dans notre communauté. Nous pensons que c'est la raison pour laquelle nous avons connu une croissance si rapide et avons désormais des distributeurs dans 15 pays, fournissant plus de 55 000 artistes de cils rien qu'aux États-Unis. Nous avons une telle demande en matière d'éducation que nous avons le privilège d'héberger des formations en direct en ligne et dans plusieurs villes des États-Unis chaque mois tout au long de l'année ! Donner du cœur à une industrie technique est devenu notre mission et celle-ci se développe si vite que nous sommes submergés de gratitude et du besoin de réapprovisionner continuellement les étagères vides. Nous sommes ravis de continuer à marcher avec vous tous

Name: Ollumia
Description:
Ollumia is the first Personal Colour Analysis Studio in the world created to cater to Southeast Asian skin tones. Built on measurable science and grounded in understanding, we bring accuracy, inclusivity, and trust to the world of colour analysis.

For decades, Personal Colour Analysis has helped people find harmony between their features and the colours they wear. Yet much of its foundation was developed under Western light and complexion profiles, leaving a gap in representation for regions like ours. Ollumia was built with one vision in mind to bridge that gap through precision, refining the process with calibrated technology, verified data, and a deep respect for individuality and nuance.

Ollumia’s system defines a new approach to beauty, one rooted in measurable precision and tailored to every person. We are the first colour analysis studio in the world to measure with near-daylight accuracy through a fully CRI 98 calibrated environment. This ensures every tone observed is true to life, unaffected by external distortions. Each consultation begins with objective colourimetry (CIE LAB) and continues through personal light calibration, adapting illumination to each client’s tone. Our digitally calibrated and printed drapes, together with colourimetric facial scans, provide verifiable results that align seamlessly with real-world applications in fashion and beauty.

We created Ollumia because we believe truth builds confidence. Our purpose is not to define beauty through categories, but to return it to where it belongs, with the individual. Every person’s data is uniquely theirs, reflecting an analysis that is precise, consistent, and free from bias.

Our commitment is to make colour measurable, personal, and empowering. 
We promise clarity not as an ideal, but as a standard, a reflection of care, precision, and respect for every tone we encounter.

Ollumia. Where clarity begins.

Description: Keep Safe Care Direct offers an online caregiving curation, matching and management system for those looking for in home care and for organization looking to recruit caregivers. While most private duty care is administered by agencies, Keep Safe Care Direct guides a Careseeker (most likely an adult child looking for care for a parent) on hiring their own caregiver. Compared to traditional Private Duty Agencies, families can save $10K to $30K per year, and caregivers make $3 to $4 per hour extra using our app. It combines the best in caregiver hiring (matching, screening, ratings & background checks) with all the back office functions (verified time worked, payroll, scheduling, and documentation) to insure safe, reliable, dependable, affordable care is obtained. Each member has access to their own personal Nurse 24/7 to help guide them and give them advice on healthcare options, and we are the only company to aid with transitional care. Free to join, we want to make sure that there is a rightness of fit in the Care-Pair by empowering caregivers and those looking for care.

Name: Society Pod
Description:
Society Pod - Jouw Partner in Persoonlijke Groei en Welzijn 

Welkom bij Society Pod! Wij zijn er om jouw persoonlijke en professionele leven te versterken met een breed scala aan diensten. Ontdek hoe we samen jouw doelen kunnen bereiken! 

Onze Diensten:

 Mentale Gezondheid:
Persoonlijke begeleiding en workshops om stress te verminderen en zelfvertrouwen op te bouwen. Onze experts staan klaar om je te ondersteunen bij elke stap naar mentale balans en welzijn.

 Juridische Ondersteuning:
Betaalbaar advies en standaardbrieven voor arbeidsrecht, huurrecht en meer. Of je nu een conflict op je werk hebt of juridisch advies nodig hebt, wij bieden oplossingen op maat.

 Sport en Gezondheid:
Personal training, groepslessen en speciale sessies om angst te verminderen en fit te blijven. Werk samen met onze trainers om je fysieke en mentale gezondheid te verbeteren. Ouder en kind PT, gelijk sociale tijd spenderen met je kleine.

 Financiële Stabiliteit:
Coaching in budgetbeheer, schuldhulp en boekhouding voor kleine ondernemers. Laat onze experts je helpen om financiële rust en overzicht te krijgen.

 Sociale Cohesie:
Evenementen en netwerkbijeenkomsten om sociale contacten te bevorderen. Maak nieuwe vrienden, breid je netwerk uit en voel je verbonden met de community.

Waarom Society Pod?
Wij geloven in laagdrempelige, toegankelijke ondersteuning voor iedereen. Bij Society Pod draait alles om jou en jouw groei. Onze aanpak is professioneel, sociaal en informeel, zodat jij je op je gemak voelt terwijl we samen aan jouw toekomst werken.

Neem Contact Op
Ontdek hoe wij jou kunnen helpen en werk samen met ons aan een gezondere, gelukkigere toekomst.  Stuur ons een e-mail op welkom@societypod.nl en bezoek onze website voor meer informatie. Laten we samen jouw doelen bereiken en een positieve impact maken!

Name: Mánela Unipessoal, Lda
Description:
A Mánela Unipessoal Lda é a empresa detentora da marca registada Mánela Cinco das Três, dedicada à excelência no bem-estar e à valorização do cuidado pessoal através de serviços de spa em Massamá.

Com uma filosofia centrada na harmonia, na qualidade e na atenção ao detalhe, a marca Mánela Cinco das Três oferece experiências de spa que promovem o equilíbrio entre corpo e mente, num ambiente sereno, elegante e profundamente acolhedor.

O slogan e parte essencial da identidade da marca — “Cinco das Três” — traduz o coração da sua filosofia. Representa o desejo de oferecer um serviço de cinco estrelas num universo de três estrelas, simbolizando o compromisso de elevar o quotidiano a algo extraordinário.
Para a Mánela Cinco das Três, a excelência não se mede pelo luxo material, mas pela dedicação, pela atenção aos detalhes e pela forma como faz cada pessoa sentir-se especial.

Para além dos serviços de spa, a marca desenvolve projetos editoriais próprios, nomeadamente a Revista Mánela Cinco das Três, uma revista interna, pequena, autónoma e de edição sazonal, dedicada à partilha de conteúdos sobre técnicas, tratamentos e inspiração de spa.

Integra ainda o Diário da Mánela, um espaço digital de comunicação e proximidade, onde se exploram temas de bem-estar, atualidade e estilo de vida, incluindo a rubrica O Sabor da Harmonia, dedicada à criação de receitas saudáveis e equilibradas que refletem a ligação entre o prazer da mesa e o bem-estar interior.

A Mánela Unipessoal Lda representa uma marca portuguesa de referência, que alia rigor profissional, sensibilidade e autenticidade, inspirando cuidado, serenidade e confiança em cada detalhe.

Name: Anera Research Hub
Description:
Anera Research Hub is a research-led platform focused on cosmetic claims validation, formulation support, and consumer insight, with a specific emphasis on African populations.

We work at the intersection of science, regulation, and real-world use, helping brands generate credible, ethical, and market-ready evidence to support product performance and claims. Our work spans consumer perception studies, expert evaluations, formulation and optimisation support, regulatory alignment, and research publishing.

Anera is built on the belief that African beauty deserves the same level of scientific rigour, documentation, and accountability as any global market. We collaborate closely with brands, scientists, experts, and consumers to ensure data reflects lived experience, not assumptions.

Our approach is deliberate, transparent, and grounded in science. The goal is simple: to make science more accessible and beauty more accountable.

Als ambulanter Pflegedienst sind wir darauf spezialisiert, pflegebedürftige Menschen in ihrer häuslichen Umgebung zu unterstützen. 

Unser Ziel ist es, unseren Kunden ein möglichst selbstbestimmtes Leben in ihrem vertrauten Umfeld zu ermöglichen und ihnen dabei zu helfen, ihre individuellen Bedürfnisse zu erfüllen.

Unser erfahrenes und engagiertes Team aus qualifizierten Pflegefachkräften und Pflegehelfern steht unseren Kunden mit fachlicher Kompetenz und menschlicher Zuwendung zur Seite. 

Wir bieten eine breite Palette von pflegerischen und hauswirtschaftlichen Leistungen an, die individuell auf die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden abgestimmt werden.
Unser ambulanter Pflegedienst legt großen Wert auf eine vertrauensvolle und partnerschaftliche Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Kunden und deren Angehörigen.

Our culture is one which is focused around a collective vision and purpose, which is to provide more choice and control to supported individuals. We achieve this through promoting positive risk, consistency in support methods, positive communication and by promoting empowered decision making by staff and supported individuals. Our support plans provide more choice and control, enabling people to achieve their goals and aspirations on their pathway to independence.  

Our management team are consistently visible, providing positive leadership in all services. Our managers work to create an environment which is professional, focused and engaged. We seek regular feedback from individuals who use our service, our staff teams, managers and other professionals to shape how we work and ensure we remain inclusive and supportive.

Name: Puissantes - Podcast
Description:
Puissantes est un podcast dédié aux femmes ambitieuses qui souhaitent réussir sans s’épuiser.

À travers des conversations profondes et sans filtre, le podcast explore les habitudes, les choix de vie et les rituels de soin de soi de femmes inspirantes : entrepreneures, dirigeantes, créatrices, artistes, sportives, expertes…

Des femmes qui ont construit des parcours solides tout en restant alignées avec elles-mêmes.

Chaque épisode aborde des sujets clés :
– leadership féminin
– ambition et réussite professionnelle
– confiance en soi
– équilibre de vie
– soin de soi comme levier de performance durable
– rapport au corps, au temps et au regard des autres

Puissantes, c’est un espace de réflexion pour celles qui refusent l’opposition entre bien-être et performance, et qui souhaitent construire une ambition consciente, ancrée et durable.

Name: KF Institut
Description:
Bienvenue dans mon institut de beauté, le KF Institut, situé en plein cœur de la place de Jaude à Clermont Ferrand. Je suis Kevin Fischer, le premier esthéticien de la région Rhône Alpes Auvergne à me lancer à mon compte sur le Puy de Dôme. Depuis toujours, j'ai été passionné par le monde de la beauté et du bien-être, et c'est cette passion qui m'a poussé à ouvrir mon propre institut.

Lorsque vous franchissez les portes de mon institut, vous êtes accueilli dans un univers intimiste et sobre, propice à la détente et à la relaxation. Je suis convaincu que chaque client est unique, c'est pourquoi j'ai soigneusement sélectionné des produits de soin bio et cruelty-free des laboratoires du Cap Ferret pour répondre aux besoins personnalisés de chacun, que vous soyez un homme ou une femme.

En tant qu'esthéticien, je suis à l'écoute de mes clients et je suis naturellement patient. Je sais que prendre soin de soi peut être une expérience intimidante pour certains, c'est pourquoi je m'efforce de créer un environnement chaleureux et accueillant pour tous mes clients. Je suis également fier d'offrir des services d'épilation, de soins du corps et du visage, tous personnalisés pour répondre aux besoins individuels de chaque client.

Le KF Institut est bien plus qu'un simple institut de beauté, c'est un lieu où vous pouvez vous détendre et vous ressourcer. Je suis convaincu que la beauté vient de l'intérieur, c'est pourquoi je m'efforce de créer une expérience de soin globale pour mes clients. Je suis heureux de pouvoir offrir mes services à la communauté de Clermont Ferrand et j'ai hâte de vous accueillir dans mon institut.

Name: Miseria
Description:
You’re a leader with a lot going on. Maybe you’re a high-functioning executive and a barrier breaker. Maybe you manage employees or mentor younger professionals in your industry. You’re possibly active with a church, sorority, or other facets of your community, volunteering with organizations and serving on boards. 

But after experiencing a loss, it feels impossible to do all these things in your life. It’s hard to even walk out the front door. We’ve felt that way, too, which is why we’re creating a safe space for women leaders to plan and transition into their new life; because life is never the same again when loss happens.

Miseria is a sacred community for women to be supported, seen, and heard in their grief. After years of global loss, from loved ones to careers to self, we’re offering intentional programming that will help women feel accepted, empowered, welcomed, and lifted up after experiencing a loss in their lives.

We Offer End of Life Care & Planning too. We answer questions, ease anxieties, serve as guides, and advocate for autonomy and dignity.  And death doulas aren’t only for the imminently dying. We assist people in all stages of life with advance care planning, resolving death anxiety, supporting grief, education and social justice activism, and other related issues.
