Ma Maison setzt sich dafür ein Pflege besser, zeitgemäßer und würdevoller zu gestalten. Für Menschen verschiedener Kulturen und Herkunft, in verschiedenen Sprachen: deutsch, englisch, französisch, türkisch, arabisch, polnisch, italienisch

Leistungsumfang:
•	Grund- und Behandlungspflege
•	Tägliche frische Zubereitung der Mahlzeiten in unserer Küche
•	Psychosoziale Betreuung
•	Angehörigenberatung und Unterstützung bei Antragstellung
•	Ergotherapie, Logopädie und Krankengymnastik auf ärztliche Verordnung
•	Fußpflege und Friseur
•	Fahrdienst

Tagesstrukturierung und Beschäftigung durch:
•	Gedächtnis- und Konzentrationstraining
•	Biografie-Arbeit
•	Aktivierung und Förderung von Fähigkeiten
•	Monatliche Andachten
•	Singen, Basteln und Handarbeiten
•	Spaziergänge und Ausflüge
•	Literaturnachmittage und Lesungen
•	Bewegungsübungen

Die Leistungen orientieren sich an den Bestimmungen der § 41 SGB XI, § 71 SGB XII und dem Pflegeleistungsergänzungsgesetz.

Individualität, Entspannung und Aktivitäten: 
Wir kennen die Bedürfnisse älterer Menschen und haben ein Ohr für ihre Gedanken und Sorgen. Plätze zum Wohlfühlen, etwa in unserem kleinen Innenhofgarten oder in unserem Ruheraum laden zum Entspannen ein. Gemeinsame Aktivitäten, wie z.B. Kochen, Spielen, und Ausflüge, schaffen Gelegenheit für den täglichen Austausch.

Die frische Zubereitung der Mahlzeiten und das gemeinsame Essen ist für viele Tagespflegegäste ein wichtiges Ereignis. Sie erfahren das Gefühl gebraucht zu werden, und sie können ihre eigenen Wünsche und Fähigkeiten einbringen.

Name: Long-Term Care Alliance of New Brunswick
Description:
The Long-Term Care Alliance of New Brunswick has been formed by the Associations representing LTC service providers in NB:
   New Brunswick Home Support Association  http://nbhsa.ca/ 
   Special Care Home Association of New Brunswick   https://www.nbscha.ca/ 
   Association of New Brunswick Nursing Homes  https://www.nbanh.com/ 

The Alliance has an overarching objective to provide safe, timely and quality long-term care services for New Brunswickers, enabling seniors and those requiring care to obtain a level of care that is both desired and most appropriate for their needs. The three Associations each provide safe, quality care for their clients and believe New Brunswick seniors and others deserve the most appropriate level of care for their level of need - whether it be at home, in a Special Care Home or a Nursing Home. 

The long-term care system today is drastically lacking in regards to the provision of services that are most appropriate, affordable and timely. The Alliance members have mutual challenges and are well positioned to collaborate with Government, other partners and all New Brunswickers to resolve those challenges, implement effective solutions and capitalize on opportunities to improve availability of services for seniors and all those requiring supports and care in New Brunswick.     

The Alliance has 3 priorities to achieve its objective:
Sustainable funding models for seniors and service providers;
A comprehensive long-term care plan for New Brunswick;
An independent Department of Seniors and Long-Term Care.

Wir bieten Ihnen, bzw. Ihrem Angehörigen eine Vielzahl von Leistungen rund um das Thema „Ambulante Pflege“. Da kaum etwas so sehr von den individuellen Wünschen geprägt ist wie die Pflege eines geliebten Menschen, gehen wir hier sehr behutsam und einfühlsam vor. Spezielle Fragen beantworten wir gerne, bitte nehmen Sie persönlich mit uns Kontakt auf. Ebenso wenn Sie Fragen zu unserem u. s. Leistungsangebot haben.

Unser Leistungsangebot

-   Grundpflege (nach SGB XI und SGB XII), wie Hilfe beim Duschen, Lagern, etc.
-   Behandlungspflege (nach SGB V) auf der Grundlage ärztlicher Verordnungen, wie Injektionen, Verbandswechsel etc.
-   Grund- und Behandlungspflege nach Krankenhausaufenthalt.
-   Hausnahe Dienstleistungen
-   Palliativversorgung (Individuelle Beratung und Information, Trauerbegleitung, Vermittlung weiterer Hilfen)
-   Beratungseinsätze für Pflegegeldempfänger nach § 37. 3 (SGB XI)
-   Umfassende Information und persönliche Beratung (auch im Krankenhaus)
-   Unterstützung für helfende Angehörige, Freunde, Nachbarn
-   Begleit-, Betreuung- und Fahrdienste, Ausflüge auch mit dem Rollstuhl
-   Hilfe bei der Weiterführung des Haushalts
-   Senioren-Aktiv-Gruppe mit Gedächtnistraining
-   Demenzbetreuung und Seniorennachmittage
-   Tanztreff
-   Beratung bei der Antragstellung und Finanzierung
-   Hilfe bei der Beschaffung von Hilfsmitteln wie Rollstuhl, Rollator, Vorlagen, etc.
-   Betreuung nach § 45b
-   Lieferung frisches Mittagessen
-   Vermittlung weiterer Hilfen wie Mahlzeitdienst, wenn das Essen nicht von uns geliefert wird, Fußpflege etc.
-   Verhinderungspflege bei Ausfall pflegender Angehöriger z. B. bei Krankheit, Urlaub usw.
-   24-Stunden-Rufbereitschaft

Wir suchen laufend:
Examinierte Pflegekräfte, Altenpflege- und Krankenpflegekräfte
Pflegefachkräfte
Hauswirtschaftskräfte
Auszubildende – Wir sind ein Ausbildungsbetrieb und bilden Altenpflegeschüle

Weitergehende Informationen erhalten Sie auf unserer Website www.pflegedienst-edithwalter.de.

Description:
OUR VALUES
Although a lot has changed since 2005 the core values are still the same:

Find the right person for the job, you can train someone to work in care but you can’t train someone to care in work.
Our staff are our most valuable assets.
Build the package of care around the client, it’s their home, it’s what they need and we need to deliver it their way.
It’s not just the client that needs the support, reassurance, and respect. Supporting the client is supporting the family network.
Every person we support is someone’s mother or father, son, or daughter, treat them how you would expect yours to be treated or how you want to be treated when you’re needing the help.

WE PROVIDE:
We can provide a range of support and care packages to support many different peoples needs, starting from 30 minutes to 24 hours a day 7 days a week 365 days a year.

We provide services that include:

Personal care (incontinence, bathing, grooming, dressing)
Administration and management of medication
Transferring and pressure relief using equipment such as ceiling tracking, mobile
hoists and slide sheets.
We can assist our clients with feeding including peg feeding.
We also provide support with assistance with daily activities such as laundry, cooking, cleaning, shopping managing finances, carrying on daily activities i.e. visits to place of worship, social events, shopping and days out.
Our service is flexible, and we can rearrange services to suit individual needs. We will put a communication book in for carers to communicate with each other and for notes to be passed back and forth with family members, if this is agreed.

We understand that we are there to assist the individual and where applicable the family members. Our social care workers are there to help, not there to take over or think that we know better.

Name: Koučink pro osobní rozvoj | Ladislava Jasanská
Description:
Jsem advokátka, koučka a psycholožka.
Koučováním pomáhám klientům v oblasti životních změn a zlepšení života. Budu vás motivovat a vést k dosažení cílů. Jako koučka pracuji primárně s motivací, ne s disciplínou. Bude vás to bavit a dodá vám to energii a chuť dojít až do cíle.

Jak probíhá koučink?

Na nultém sezení, které je zdarma, se seznámíme a rozhovorem zjistíme, zda Vám mohu pomoci. Zjistíme, jaké dva až tři cíle byste si chtěli stanovit. Musí to být něco, co Váš život zlepší, obohatí a učiní Vás šťastnější. Zkusíte si, jaké je to být koučován a zda je to ta správná cesta pro Vás.

Pokud se rozmyslíte, že Vás mohu koučovat, následuje cca 5–10 jednohodinových sezení, kde společně pracujeme na cílech, které máte. Odstraňujeme překážky, porážíme vnitřní sabotéry, radujeme se z dílčích vítězství. Mezi jednotlivými sezeními je rozestup cca tří týdnů, kdy pracujete sami. S energií, kterou Vám sezení dávají, to je snazší.

Na konci naší spolupráce budete mít dosažený cíl, splněný sen, získanou novou kompetenci, změněný postoj, naučenou novou dovednost atp. 

Váš život bude bohatší o to, co jste si na počátku přáli a nevěděli tak docela, jak na to.

Mgr. Bc. Ladislava Koňák Jasanská
ladislava@jasanska.com
+420 602 692 769

Name: Lifebook Military
Description:
Introducing Lifebook Military, a specialized version of the Lifebook program tailored specifically for the military and veteran communities. Lifebook Military is designed to empower individuals with military backgrounds to envision, plan, and achieve their personal vision of success in a way that aligns with their unique experiences and aspirations within the military and beyond.

Lifebook Military recognizes the distinct challenges, values, and goals that military personnel and veterans encounter throughout their service and transition into civilian life. By leveraging the power of the Lifebook methodology, this program provides a structured and comprehensive approach to help military personnel and veterans create a blueprint for their lives that integrates their military experiences, personal ambitions, and post-service aspirations.

Through the Lifebook Military program, participants will be guided through a step-by-step process to define and refine their vision for success in key areas such as post-military career, physical and mental well-being, relationships, financial stability, personal growth, and contribution to society.

Drawing on the expertise and insights of mentors who have military backgrounds themselves, Lifebook Military offers a unique understanding of the challenges faced by military personnel and veterans. The program incorporates strategies and resources specifically tailored to address common issues such as transitioning to civilian life, managing post-traumatic stress, leveraging military skills in the civilian workforce, and building meaningful connections within the veteran community.

Your completed Lifebook Military will serve as a valuable compass for military personnel and veterans, enabling them to realign with their true north and consistently make choices and take actions that support their personal vision and goals.  Visit our website and learn more.

Description:

Our story is rooted in empathy. More than a decade ago, our founder, Marsha Murphy, experienced the heartbreak of losing her mother in a nursing facility, despite her wish to remain at home. That moment became the driving force behind our mission: to help other families avoid the same pain by ensuring their loved ones can age with dignity, comfort, and peace in familiar surroundings.

 What We Offer

We provide a comprehensive range of non-medical home care services, including:

Personal Care: Bathing, dressing, grooming, mobility assistance.

Companionship: Meaningful social interaction, emotional support, and engaging activities.

Medication Reminders: Gentle reminders for medication schedules.

Meal Preparation: Nutritious meals tailored to personal preferences and dietary needs.

Light Housekeeping & Errands: Help with groceries, appointments, and home upkeep.

At Harriet Home Care, we don’t just provide care, we build relationships. Every service is delivered with empathy, respect, and reliability, so families gain peace of mind knowing their loved ones are cared for like family.

 Mission:
To ensure every individual has the choice and dedicated support to receive exceptional care at home, sparing families the distress of facility placement and allowing loved ones to age with comfort, dignity, and joy.

Name: EKA - Beauty & Care
Description:
EKA – Beauty & Care

Waar schoonheid en gezondheid elkaar ontmoeten

Mijn naam is Eka. Ik geloof in een totaalaanpak waarbij schoonheid en gezondheid hand in hand gaan. Niet als losstaande begrippen, maar als een harmonieus geheel dat vertrekt vanuit zorg, respect en een diep geloof in de kracht van preventieve zelfzorg.

De naam EKA staat niet alleen voor mijn persoonlijke initialen. Ze staat voor de drie pijlers waarop mijn visie gebouwd is: Elegant, Kwaliteitsvol en Authentiek. Deze waarden vormen de basis van alles wat ik doe.

Met een achtergrond in de zorgsector en een doorgedreven opleiding in gespecialiseerde hand-, voet- en haarverzorging, creëer ik geen klassieke beautysalon. EKA is een plek waar aandacht, rust en professionaliteit samenkomen. Waar elke behandeling niet alleen een esthetisch doel dient, maar ook een bijdrage levert aan het algemene welzijn van mijn klanten.

Mijn missie is duidelijk: ik wil mensen begeleiden naar een gezondere en sterkere versie van zichzelf. Niet met snelle oplossingen, maar met doordachte, verzorgende rituelen die zowel het lichaam als de geest ondersteunen. Een gezonde basis is essentieel voor een duurzame uitstraling. Bij EKA beginnen we bij de kern: een juiste analyse, een zorgvuldige aanpak en behandelingen die verder gaan dan het oppervlakkige.

Of je nu kiest voor een diepwerkende handverzorging, een gespecialiseerde voetbehandeling of een rustmoment tijdens een natuurlijke haarverzorging – bij EKA draait het om meer dan verwennerij. Hier draait het om bewuste zorg, op maat van wie jij bent.

EKA – Beauty & Care is geen trend, maar een visie. Een plek waar je tot jezelf komt, waar schoonheid geen filter nodig heeft, en waar echte resultaten gebouwd worden op kennis, empathie en kwaliteit.

Name: HCAB - Home Care Association of Bangladesh
Description:
A Home Care Association is an organization that typically represents and advocates for the interests of home care providers, caregivers, and patients receiving care in their own homes. These associations often serve as a hub for information, resources, and support within the home care industry.

Here's a breakdown of what a Home Care Association might typically do:

Advocacy: They advocate for policies and regulations that support the home care industry and promote the well-being of patients. This could involve lobbying for funding, influencing legislation, and working with government agencies.

Education and Training: Home Care Associations often provide education and training programs for caregivers and home care providers. These programs may cover topics such as best practices in caregiving, safety protocols, and compliance with regulations.

Networking: Associations offer opportunities for home care providers to connect with one another, share experiences, and learn from one another. This could take the form of conferences, workshops, or online forums.

Resources: They offer resources and tools to help home care providers deliver high-quality care. This might include guidelines, templates for documentation, and access to research and best practices.

Quality Standards: Many associations set standards for excellence in home care and provide accreditation or certification programs for providers who meet these standards. This helps to ensure that patients receive reliable and high-quality care.

Research and Development: Some associations engage in research to advance knowledge in the field of home care. This research might focus on topics such as innovative care models, new technologies, or the effectiveness of different interventions.

Public Awareness: They work to raise public awareness about the benefits of home care and the services available. This could involve public campaigns, media outreach, or educational events.

Overall, Home Care Associations play ...

Step into a world of relaxation and indulgence, where our serene atmosphere and top-notch customer service will make you feel right at home. Whether you're looking for permanent hair removal, skin rejuvenation, permanent Makeup services, or simply a rejuvenating escape from the daily grind, Ma-hu is here to exceed your expectations.

Experience the transformational power of beauty and confidence at Ma-hu. Your journey to radiant skin begins here.

Name: Tori Prince Beauty, LLC
Description:
At Tori Prince Beauty, we understand that your skin tells a unique story—one of resilience, heritage, and unparalleled beauty. Founded by Tori Prince, our award-winning skincare, cosmetics, and wellness brand is dedicated to celebrating and nurturing melanin-rich skin.
Our Commitment to You
We recognize the distinct needs of women of color and are here to provide luxurious, personalized skincare solutions that address concerns such as hyperpigmentation, aging, and acne. Our mission is to empower you to feel confident in your skin and embrace your natural beauty.
Loving Luxury
To us, "Loving Luxury" means more than indulgence; it's about nurturing and healing. Our products blend science-backed ingredients with premium botanical extracts, ensuring treatments that are both effective and gentle. Each product is crafted to deliver visible results while offering a sensory experience that celebrates the essence of luxury.
A Community of Empowerment
Tori Prince Beauty is more than a brand; it's a community built on empowerment, education, and support. We provide valuable knowledge for women of color looking to enhance their skincare routines. Our online educational platform offers advanced skincare courses for professionals, equipping them with the tools and techniques necessary to work with diverse skin tones and types.
Sustainability and Wellness
We are committed to sustainability and clean beauty, using ethically sourced ingredients and eco-friendly packaging. Our goal is to create an experience that prioritizes overall wellness—including mental and physical health—while promoting luxurious self-care.
Mentorship and Growth
As a platform for mentorship, we offer business coaching for beauty professionals, helping them grow their careers and create positive change in the industry. Whether you're seeking personalized skincare, professional development, or support in business growth, Tori Prince Beauty is here to guide you.
Join Us!

Name: Topline Care
Description:
* THERES NOTHING LIKE THE COMFORT OF YOUR OWN HOME* 

Topline Care is a small Introductory Live In Care Agency.  Our small carer run agency guarantees a more personal care experience.  We endeavour to only sourcing the very best carers for your care needs at home.  Carers are professionally handpicked and are matched to support all your health requirements and personal interests. Our purpose is to give you peace of mind through outstanding Live In Care Services, which is key to your health and wellbeing. Your life or that of your loved one can be transformed by being able to remain living at home, receiving exceptional care. We know that familiarity of home is important to you, as is living life with dignity and independence. Whether you currently know much about Live In Care or not, we are here to help. We go the extra mile and will make a positive difference to your life, through a practical and proactive approach. Topline Care offers 9 levels of care, which could be tailored to met all your care requirement. We are proud to be at your service, so all you need to do is let our experienced care team guide you through the Live In care process.

DISCOVER THE BENEFITS OF LIVE IN CARE

* Qualified and certified handpicked carers to match your needs providing continuity of care
* Keep your care in your own hands with a cost-effective solution, rather than residential care
* Live at your own pace of life, with support when you need it
* Lead a fulfilled life and maintain your social engagements and appointments
* Peace of mind that your routines and domestic tasks will be managed, giving you more leisure time
* Having the freedom to live your life on your own terms

Name: Life is Beautiful
Description:
About Us:
"Life is Beautiful" is a platform dedicated to celebrating the wonders of existence. We are a vibrant community where people from all walks of life come together to learn from each other's experiences and share insights that underscore the beauty of our world. Our mission is to illuminate the myriad ways life is beautiful, from the monumental to the mundane.

Our Mission:
To inspire people to recognize and appreciate the beauty in their lives, share their positive experiences, and collectively contribute to the greatness of others.

Our Vision:
Creating a world where everyone feels empowered to celebrate life, share their journey, and support others in recognizing the beauty in their own lives.

Our Values:

Appreciation: Encouraging a deep sense of gratitude for life's blessings.
Learning: Promoting continuous learning from life's diverse experiences.
Sharing: Fostering a community where sharing is synonymous with caring.
Positivity: Spreading positivity to enhance the collective spirit of our community.
Empowerment: Equipping individuals with the mindset to turn challenges into opportunities.

Our Initiatives:
Storytelling Sessions and Life Testimonials
Positive Experience Workshops and Webinars
Community Outreach Programs
Collaborative Projects for Social Good
Inspirational Content and Resources

Why Engage With Us:

Community Strength: Connect with a supportive network that values each member's journey.
Learning Opportunities: Gain insights from diverse life stories and positive experiences.
Positive Impact: Be part of initiatives that make a tangible difference in people's lives.
Empowerment: Access resources that help you appreciate and elevate your own life.

Content:
Inspirational stories and testimonials from our community members
Tips and insights on cultivating a positive outlook
Highlights of our community impact and outreach programs
Educational content on personal growth and appreciation
Interactive posts inviting members to share experiences

Name: Betreuungsdienst Thüringen KB GmbH
Description:
„Einfach persönlicher“ ist unser Grundprinzip. Danach entwickeln wir seit mehr als fünf Jahren überall in Ostthüringen persönliche Betreuungslösungen. Unser Ziel? Wir tun alles dafür, dass pflegebedürftige Menschen in der Region möglichst lange und selbstbestimmt dort leben können, wo es am schönsten ist: zuhause.

Unsere liebevollen Betreuungskräfte fördern die Mobilität und Selbstständigkeit unserer Kundinnen und Kunden, begleiten im Alltag, unterstützen im Haushalt und sorgen dafür, dass pflegende und sorgende Angehörige entlastet werden. 

Egal ob in unsere Tagespflege in Dornburg oder direkt im eigenen Zuhause: Unsere individuelle Betreuung ist die perfekte Alternative zur Seniorenresidenz oder zum Pflegeheim.

Name: Minty Barber LLC
Description:
Minty Barber LLC is a modern grooming and personal care brand built on craftsmanship, community, and consistency. What began with our first location in Frisco, Texas has grown organically into neighboring McKinney, with a continued commitment to serving—and growing alongside—the communities we operate in.

We specialize in men’s grooming services, including haircuts, beard trims and sculpting, traditional shaves, and facial rejuvenation treatments. Alongside our services, Minty Barber has expanded into branded haircare and skincare products, furthering our mission to elevate the beauty industry not only for clients, but also for the professionals behind the chair.

At our core, Minty Barber blends modern technique with classic barbering values. Our approach prioritizes professionalism, hospitality, and personalized service—delivering an experience that builds confidence while preserving the timeless feel of a neighborhood barbershop.

We proudly serve clients throughout Frisco, McKinney, Plano, Allen, Dallas, Prosper, and the greater DFW area, with a goal of being a trusted destination whenever someone searches for “barbers near me.”

Minty Barber is more than a barbershop—it’s a community-focused brand dedicated to raising standards across services, products, and people. All guests are welcome.

Name: Glow UP
Description:
𝐒𝐢̀, 𝐩𝐮𝐨𝐢 𝐛𝐫𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐚𝐫𝐞. 𝐌𝐚 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐦𝐚 𝐝𝐞𝐯𝐢 𝐬𝐦𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐝𝐢 𝐜𝐞𝐫𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐬𝐜𝐮𝐬𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐥 𝐜𝐚𝐳𝐳𝐨.

Il tuo Glow Up non arriva con l’oroscopo del mese o aspettando che qualcuno ti salvi. Arriva quando decidi, una volta per tutte, di prenderti la responsabilità della tua vita.

Non importa quanto hai sbagliato, quanto sei indietro o quanto ti senti perso. Conta solo una cosa: 𝐬𝐞𝐢 𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐨 𝐚 𝐟𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐢𝐥 𝐥𝐚𝐯𝐨𝐫𝐨? A guardarti in faccia e dire: “Basta cazzate. Ora si cambia.”

Qui troverai strumenti, idee, schiaffi emotivi e qualche riflessione che potrebbe darti fastidio. E va bene così. Perché crescere fa male. Ma restare fermi fa molto più male.

𝐈𝐧𝐢𝐳𝐢𝐚. 𝐅𝐚𝐢 𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐨. 𝐋𝐚𝐬𝐜𝐢𝐚 𝐢𝐥 𝐬𝐞𝐠𝐧𝐨. 𝐈𝐥 𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐨 𝐧𝐨𝐧 𝐡𝐚 𝐛𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐠𝐧𝐨 𝐝𝐢 𝐮𝐧 𝐚𝐥𝐭𝐫𝐨 𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐞. 𝐇𝐚 𝐛𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐠𝐧𝐨 𝐝𝐢 𝐭𝐞, 𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐨 𝐦𝐚 𝐚𝐮𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐜𝐨.

Disponibilizamos acompanhamento da rotina por um prontuário digital e diário de evoluções, os cuidadores são supervisionados constantemente por uma coordenação técnica e treinados para cuidar com o amor e a dedicação que nossos clientes merecem.

Buscamos levar cuidado humanizado, carinho e atenção para aqueles que necessitam, através de um atendimento exclusivo, supervisionado e eficaz; com intuito de dar tranquilidade aos familiares, preservando a rotina da família e estimulando a independência dos nossos assistidos.

Somos uma equipe especializada em cuidado, através de uma assistência física e emocional. É importante ter alguém preparado e disposto a garantir sua segurança, mobilidade, boa alimentação, uso de medicação e claro, uma boa companhia. Se necessitar deste serviço, podemos tornar a sua vida mais fácil.

A Acuidar pode lhe ajudar!

With my background, I strive to utilize all that modern medicine has to offer to provide natural and aesthetically pleasing results. Whether it’s neuromodulators or natural microneedling, I believe you can get the beautiful skin you’ve always wanted! I work with every client to ensure beautiful and natural results as well as recommend wellness from the inside with supplement and nutritional guidance.

I believe that beauty and health must be built from the inside to last on the outside. Let me help you look and feel your very best!

We’re here to support you and your family, offering thoughtful guidance and a relationship you can trust — every step of the way.

Name: La plume qui libère
Description:
Notre mission est d’aider les personnes à dépasser une expérience émotionnellement impactante (harcèlement, maladie, séparation, accouchement difficile,...).

La Plume qui libère accompagne les personnes à déposer par écrit leur histoire afin de leur permettre de se libérer émotionnellement et ainsi tourner la page.

Grâce à ce travail la personne dispose d'un document pour un usage personnel, pour le partager avec son avocat ou son entourage. Poser des mots sur son histoire, permet de dépasser les maux qui y sont associés.

Dans un cadre apaisant et sécurisant, les séances sont vécues comme des parenthèses d'écoute et de considération pour retranscrire avec finesse l’expérience. Parole et émotions sont accueillies. S'il est normal et souhaitable que la narration suscite des émotions durant la séance, La Plume qui Libère propose une réponse adaptée conjuguant l'écoute et les techniques d'accompagnement que sont la Programmation Neuro Linguistique et le Reiki.

Name: Care Finder Assist
Description:
Care Finder Assist (CFA) is a free, independent care navigation service supporting privately funded individuals and families to find safe, suitable care options, including care homes, home care and supported living. Led by experienced social care professionals, we offer personalised guidance, provider matching, and 60 days of post-placement support, all at no cost to the care seeker.

Unlike lead generation platforms or sales-driven referral agencies, we are not here to sell care. We provide a professional service that puts the needs of the care seeker first, and that is exactly why it works better for providers too.

We only introduce pre-qualified clients whose needs, budget and preferences align with your service. You only pay if a placement is successful, with no upfront listing fees. Our shared assessment (with permission) gives you clear pre-information to support your own process from the outset. Our impartiality ensures families are well informed and confident, making placements more likely to succeed. Our 60-day aftercare helps reduce early exits and complaints by offering continued guidance and reassurance to families.

CFA saves care providers valuable time and resources otherwise spent on chasing occupancy targets, handling unsuitable enquiries, or managing misaligned placements that can lead to complaints or safeguarding concerns. We also offer a robust feedback loop, so you can receive meaningful insights to showcase strengths, improve your service, and build a stronger reputation.

We are here to make private care better for everyone, one informed decision at a time.

Care Navigation | Care Placement | Elder Care | Care Homes | Supported Living | Independent Advice | Referral Management | Post-Placement Support | Occupancy Solutions

Name: Bargersville Wellness Salon, Spa, Yoga, Barbershop
Description:
Bargersville Wellness is an eco-friendly all people welcome salon, spa, yoga studio, and barbershop!

Our mission is to provide individualized and accessible hair, skin, and body therapies to our guests and space to teach industry professionals to thrive in an inclusive, diverse, equitable, and FUN environment! Additionally, we want to change the way the salon and spa industry interacts with their environment, employees, and fellow industry professionals. We intend to be stewards of our community and environment and spark positive change amongst our fellow business owners!

Our vision is to create an experience for our guests and team that will inspire change in their lives and our community. We also envision building a team learning environment with our peers. Additionally, we will raise awareness about the need for, and provide education for, self-care for all age categories and genders. Empowering our clients and future clients to be cared for by BW is as important as educating them to be cared for by themselves.

We have created a safe space designed with you in mind, accepting you as you are each time you visit us. Each of us at BW believes in freedom and equity for all! 
 Our cancellation policy changed on January 1, 2023. We now require 36 hours for cancellations and the no-show and cancellation fees will be 100% of the service(s) booked or missed. ALL prices are starting at prices.
We feel that it is important for you to know that we only accept kind, ethical, and non-violent communication/interactions with our team and community members. While we strive for perfection with each client interaction, remember that we are human. We ask that you keep that in mind should you need to address any concerns about our business practices or services. We are a learning culture space and we are constantly learning, evolving, and improving for YOU!
With love, Blythe and Ashley

Mamy stały program dla osób onkologicznych - darmowe zabiegii do 1500 zł dla jednej osoby miesięcznie - zachęcamy, by się zgłaszać!  Nikogo nie wykluczamy, nikogo nie oceniamy chcemy być integralną tkanką lokalnej społeczności :)

Pracujemy na kosmetykach marki K-time, Leyton House oraz Diana. Jesteśmy zwolennikami powolnej, racjonalnej pracy nad kondycją włosów, a nie spektakularnych efektów, które prowadzą do pogorszenia kondycji skóry głowy. 

Przeprowadzane przez nas koloryzację wyglądają naturalnie. Widać tylko efekt pięknych lśniących włosów, nie tworzymy "sztucznych hełmów". 

W naszym salonie można zadbać o włosy kompleksowo. Zarówno wyprostować je, przedłużyć, odżywić jak i odnowić ich kolor. Do 
Państwa dyspozycji jest doświadczona specjalistka od blondów - Martyna, oraz Mistrz Fryzjerski - Oskar.

Name: Salt Sea Aesthetics
Description:
Welcome to Salt Sea Aesthetics, a premier skin revision clinic where clinical precision meets a deeply personal touch. Founded by Master Esthetician [Your Name], Salt Sea Aesthetics was born from a vision to provide a sanctuary where clients don’t just receive a treatment—they feel truly seen, heard, and validated.

The Salt Sea Difference Our name reflects a bridge between worlds: the salt of the Utah earth and the deep blue of the oceans that connect to our founder’s Swiss heritage. This "blue and white" clarity defines our space, offering a clean, professional, and results-driven environment designed for your total well-being.

Clinical Expertise You Can Trust With a professional background as a Spa Director and a Certified Clinical Medical Assistant, our founder brings a high level of clinical discipline and medical-grade safety to every service. We specialize in "Skin Revision," moving beyond basic relaxation to deliver visible, long-term changes for your skin.

Our Core Specialties:

Advanced Skin Revision: Microneedling, IPL, Chemical Peels, and LED Light Therapy.

Targeted Skin Health: Specialized Acne Protocols, Dermaplaning, and Back Facials.

Artistic Enhancements: Brow Shaping & Tinting, Laser Hair Removal, and Teeth Whitening.

Wellness & Balance: Aroma Touch and mindfulness-based care.

Consistency in Care We believe that skin health is a journey, not a one-time event. We are proud to offer exclusive Spa Memberships to help our clients maintain their results and prioritize their self-care with ease.

At Salt Sea Aesthetics, we are dedicated to helping you feel pampered while delivering the results you deserve.

Discover your transformation. Book your appointment today.

Name: Renaitre.officiel
Description:
Renaitre fabrique des aréoles mammaires en silicone au rendu naturel, faites à la main en France.
Après une mastectomie ou une reconstruction, un détail peut compter plus qu’on ne l’imagine. Ayant traversé cette épreuve, j’ai voulu un accompagnement doux, clair et confidentiel.

Ce que nous faisons :
Des aréoles réalistes et confortables, pensées pour le quotidien. Le moulage est artisanal ; relief, bord et grain sont travaillés avec soin. Les pigments sont posés en couches et la teinte est accordée à votre carnation (lumière neutre) pour un rendu crédible et harmonieux. Rendu mat/satiné, réutilisable, entretien simple, emballage discret.

Deux chemins, un même but : se reconnaître
- Collection “Donneuses” : vous choisissez un modèle (nos tailles officielles) et nous accordons la teinte à votre peau → naturel et direct.
- Sur-mesure (empreintes) : à partir de vos empreintes, nous calibrons diamètre, relief, bord et grain, puis envoyons un trio d’aréoles présentant trois dégradés de teintes. Vous essayez chez vous et choisissez celle qui vous ressemble le plus.

Comment cela se passe :
Écoute & questions → choix du parcours → fabrication à la main → envoi de votre aréole personnalisée → conseil si besoin pour le choix final — à votre rythme.

Notre engagement :
Respect, confidentialité, bienveillance. Vous n’êtes pas seule : présence avant, pendant et après pour répondre et rassurer.

Description:
היי, נעים להכיר :)
אני מני קריספי, מומחה להתפתחות אישית והכוונה מקצועית בשיטת NLP.
אני מגיע מעולמות הגיוס וההשמה ומלווה א.נשים במציאת עבודה ושינוי בקריירה התעסוקתית.
המסע האישי שלי הוביל אותי להפוך למנטור עבור א.נשים שנמצאים בצומת דרכים בקריירה ורוצים לעשות שינוי אבל לא יודעים איך.

 Change within, succeed outside- 
יש בידי אוסף עוצמתי של כלים וטכניקות שמטרתן לשנות דפוסי חשיבה והתנהגות במטרה לעשות סדר ב"עולם הפנימי" שלנו כדי לייצר ההצלחה וביטחון עצמי לצאת לדרך חדשה.. 

 איך NLP יכול לשדרג את הקריירה שלך?
 לחשוף את החוזקות והפוטנציאל האמיתי שטמון בך.
 לשחרר אמונות מגבילות ולהפוך אותן לגישות חיובית ומניעות.
 לרכוש כלים להתמודדות עם לחצים ומכשולים בדרך.
 לבנות ביטחון עצמי ולשמור על מיקוד במטרות שלך.

 דמיינ/י לעצמך:
בוקר חדש מלא באנרגיה ובהתלהבות, עם ידיעה ברורה לאן את.ה שואפ.ת ואיך להגיע לשם. זה לא חלום – זה אפשרי, וזה הרבה יותר קל ממה שזה נראה.

 בוא.י נצא למסע יחד וניצור שינוי אמיתי:
 פגישות ייעוץ אישיות המותאמות בדיוק לצרכים שלך.
 זיהוי והגדרת מטרות קריירה מדויקות וברורות.
 חשיפה וניצול החוזקות שלך, לצד שיחה עם הפחדים והתמודדות עם חרדות.
 בניית תוכנית פעולה ממוקדת ויעילה למציאת העבודה המתאימה לך ביותר.
 הכנה מעמיקה לראיונות עבודה והצגת קורות חיים בצורה שתתפוס את העין.

 ואני כאן כדי לעזור לך להפוך את זה למציאות. ניתן לפנות אלי ואשמח שנצא לדרך.

Our supplies store offers a wide range of high-quality products, ensuring that lash professionals have access to the best tools and resources.

Lash Envy Melbourne is honored to be recognized as Melbourne’s top destination for lashes by The Urban List and Time Out. Our achievements include features on Channel 9’s A Current Affair and raising over $100,000 through our support of brain and breast cancer awareness events. Additionally, we are proud finalists for the Client Service Awards and have received two nominations at the Beauty Business Awards as part of the AusMumpreneur Awards 2024.

Our philosophy is centered on delivering a ‘royal’ experience to every client and fostering a supportive, rewarding environment for our team. We believe that our clients and staff are the heart of our success, and we are dedicated to providing exceptional service and opportunities for growth.

Connect with us to learn more about our services, training programs, or to explore partnership opportunities.

Name: Oak Care Home (Supported & Semi-Independent Accommodations
Description:
About Oak Care Home: Nurturing Young Lives

In the heart of every community, there exists a responsibility to support and nurture its most vulnerable members. At Oak Care Home, we embrace this responsibility with dedication and compassion, providing a sanctuary where young people can flourish as they transition into adulthood. Our mission is clear: to create a safe, nurturing, and empowering environment for young individuals, equipping them with the skills and confidence needed to thrive independently.

 Our Services: Tailored to Young People’s Needs

At Oak Care Home, we understand that the journey from adolescence to adulthood is fraught with challenges and opportunities. To address the diverse needs of young people, we offer a range of specialized accommodations and services designed to support their development and well-being.

Supported Living Accommodations

For young people aged 16-17, our six supported living accommodations offer a stable and nurturing environment. These homes provide around-the-clock supervision and guidance, ensuring that each resident receives the support they need. Our dedicated staff is available 24 hours a day, offering assistance with daily activities, emotional support, and mentorship.

Each supported living accommodation is designed to foster independence while providing the necessary safety net. The homes are equipped with modern amenities and are located in safe, accessible neighbourhoods, allowing residents to engage with their community and build essential life skills.

 Step-Down Semi-Independent Living

As young people transition from supported living to full independence, our step-down semi-independent living accommodations provide the perfect bridge. Designed for individuals aged 18 and above, these two homes offer a structured yet flexible environment that encourages autonomy while still providing support when needed.

Name: Vimi Joshi Beauty
Description:
Our Values 

Community & Belonging
We are more than makeup, we are a family. Vimi Joshi Beauty creates a space where everyone feels seen, heard, and part of something bigger. From our team to makeup artists to beauty enthusiasts, we celebrate voices, share stories, and foster true belonging.

Artistry & Education
At the heart of Vimi Joshi Beauty is artistry: experimental, simple, and accessible. As a makeup artist–led brand, our purpose is to make artistry available to everyone, from those who want to play and push boundaries to those who prefer clear, step-by-step guidance. With tutorials, tips, and creative direction from Vimi, we empower our community to explore beauty on their own terms. We don’t dictate what’s glamorous; we give the tools and inspiration to define it for yourself.

Empowerment
We believe beauty is freedom. Vimi Joshi Beauty empowers every individual to feel confident, glamorous, and authentically themselves. Our role is to support, not impose, enabling each person to shine in their own way.

Intentional
Every shade is created with vision, care, and intention. Designed with warm, rich undertones in mind, too often overlooked, yet crafted to flatter all skin tones. From custom pigments with bold payoff and radiant finish to formulas refined backstage at global fashion weeks, Vimi Joshi Beauty is born from purpose, artistry, and lived experience, never by chance.

Heritage Redefined
Rooted in heritage and guided by intention, Vimi Joshi Beauty celebrates the richness of South Asian traditions — the colours, rituals, and stories that have long defined beauty, reimagined for today. We carry timeless artistry forward, blending heritage with modern expression to create a beauty culture that celebrates colour, honours tradition, and is crafted with purpose.

Description:
EVERKIND is a service that provides compassionate friendship for the elderly. We pair experienced, dedicated, and caring companions with seniors to foster a sense of purpose and to prolong cognitive function through engaging friendships.

That’s why we offer friendly weekly visits from our trained and vetted companions, who share common interests and hobbies with our clients. Our companions can also assist with light errands, transportation, and medication reminders.

Our mission is to enrich the lives of seniors and their families by offering personalized and affordable companionship services. We serve the areas of North Vancouver, White Rock Delta, and West Vancouver. If your parent could benefit from our service, inquire today. Spots fill up quickly.

Contact us at (913)585-5574 or visit our website to learn more.

Name: Cosystems
Description:
Cosystems embodies innovation in its most meaningful sense.

We partner with organizations to explore new physiological pathways and biomarkers, transforming scientific insight into impactful, value-driven solutions. From the design and development of novel active ingredients to the intelligent repurposing of existing ones, we unlock new opportunities across product portfolios.

Cosystems supports every stage of product innovation, from ingredient selection and formulation strategy to regulatory navigation, claims substantiation, and testing. We also design tailor-made preclinical and clinical programs aligned with each project’s scientific ambition and business objectives.

Beyond development, we empower teams through targeted scientific education and provide rigorous feasibility assessments to determine whether an R&D program truly merits investment. By optimizing time, talent, resources, and effort, we help ensure that promising ideas evolve into credible, differentiated, and high-value outcomes.

We finally offer independent scientific and technical due-diligence services, enabling investors to assess the true feasibility, risk profile, and value-creation potential of life sciences projects before committing capital.

Looking forward to hear from you!

As a pioneering social enterprise in Hong Kong, we are dedicated to promoting social inclusion and enhancing employment opportunities for the hearing impaired.

Our mission goes beyond providing exceptional hair care services; we strive to create an inclusive environment where diverse talents are recognized and celebrated. Through our hair and scalp treatments, we bring awareness to the capabilities of the deaf community, fostering acceptance and understanding within the broader society.

With a passionate team of skilled professionals, including trained deaf individuals, we are committed to delivering top-tier hair care while championing empowerment and inclusion. Together, we can reshape perceptions, creating pathways for meaningful employment and encouraging everyone to embrace their unique talents.

Name: Bodé Spa for Men
Description:
At Bodé, we believe that men deserve a sanctuary in the world of spas – a place where they can unwind and rejuvenate without feeling out of place. We've crafted the perfect space tailored exclusively for you.

Privacy is Paramount:
We understand the importance of privacy, especially during personal grooming sessions. That's why we prioritize individual treatment rooms, ensuring you receive personalized attention from your dedicated therapist. Relaxation begins with privacy, and we're committed to providing you with a tranquil environment where you can freely ask questions and indulge in self-care.

Tailored Comfort:
From the moment you step through our doors, you'll notice that Bodé is designed with your comfort in mind. Our inviting décor, spa amenities, and well-fitting robes and sandals cater to every man's needs. Say goodbye to uncomfortably narrow massage tables and chairs – our spacious facilities are exclusively yours to enjoy.

Services Catered to Men:
Men's bodies have unique needs, and our services are tailored to address them effectively. Whether it's combating fungal nail infections or managing thicker, coarser hair and excess oil, our treatments are designed to deliver optimal results. We pride ourselves on our deep understanding of the male body, ensuring that every service is customized to meet your specific requirements.

Expertise Beyond Compare:
At Bodé, we set the standard for excellence in male grooming by investing in specialized training for our staff. Our therapists undergo comprehensive 6-8 week courses and ongoing training to ensure they're equipped with the knowledge and skills to serve you best. Additionally, we've developed exclusive products formulated specifically for men's needs, enhancing your spa experience even further.

Empowering Education:
We're dedicated to bridging the knowledge gap in men's skincare and grooming.

Description:

Allier beauté et santé avec des produits naturel dans une ambiance chaleureuse et relaxante au ton des tropiques.

Le naturel est le cœur de ce concept ! La nature nous offre depuis toujours tous ce dont nous avons besoin pour notre bien-être c’est pourquoi il est important l’utiliser comme il se doit ; c’est également la raison pour laquelle Layone Beauty Hair choisi des partenaires produits de confiance, éthique et de qualité.

Trois points important seront étudiés à travers un diagnostic bien élaboré :
-	LE CHEVEUX / LA PEAU
-	LA SANTE
-	L’ALIMENTATION 

Des valeurs humaines dans l'accompagnement. Prendre le temps de vous écouter et de comprendre vos préoccupations capillaires car le but est de vous aider à retrouver des cheveux et/ou une peau saine et à vous redonner une confiance en vous durable.

Name: Unique Care
Description: At Unique Care, we believe care is more than a service-it's a relationship built on trust, compassion and time. Founded by Monique Gaby, Unique Care was created to challenge "time-poor" culture in traditional agencies. After seeing clients rushed through visits with little dignity or connection, Monique set out to offer something different: quality time and truly personal support. We offer a minimum of 3 hours per visit, giving space to build real relationships and deliver meaningful care. Our approach is fully integrated - working closely with clients and families to create structured person-led care plans. We listen, support and empower our clients to make informed choices and live healthier, more independent lives, with time we truly make a difference. Every carer at Unique Care is carefully selected through a rigorous process of checks, references and verification of qualifications and experience. Our in-house training ensures each team member embodies our core values:compassion, care, kindness, trustworthiness, and dedication. Together we make a difference - one person, on family, one community at a time with HEART we stand OUT.

Name: Ambulanter Pflegedienst Holzhäuser
Description:
Seit über 30 Jahren sind wir in Naunhof und der umliegenden Region Ihr verlässlicher Partner in allen Belangen der Pflege. Unser erfahrenes Team aus mehr als 85 engagierten Mitarbeitenden bietet Ihnen eine individuell abgestimmte Betreuung, die stets auf Ihre persönlichen Bedürfnisse eingeht. Egal ob medizinische Versorgung, Unterstützung im Alltag oder Beratung – wir stehen Ihnen mit Fachwissen und Einfühlungsvermögen zur Seite.

„Pflege mit Herz“ ist nicht nur unser Slogan, sondern unser täglicher Anspruch. Neben qualifizierten Pflegefachkräften besteht unser Team aus einer Vielzahl weiterer Experten, darunter Wundexperten, Betreuungskräfte, Hauswirtschaftskräfte und Verwaltungsmitarbeitende. Gemeinsam sorgen wir dafür, dass Sie und Ihre Angehörigen in Naunhof und der Umgebung sich bestens versorgt und in guten Händen fühlen.

Unsere Leistungen sind vielseitig und umfassen medizinische Betreuung, pflegerische Unterstützung im Alltag sowie umfangreiche Beratungs- und Entlastungsangebote. Dabei legen wir großen Wert auf eine enge Zusammenarbeit mit Ärzten, Therapeuten und Angehörigen, um für jeden Patienten die optimale Versorgung zu gewährleisten.

Wir freuen uns darauf, Ihnen in jeder Lebenslage mit Rat und Tat zur Seite zu stehen – mit Herz und Kompetenz, direkt hier in Ihrer Region.

Name: Rizos Pro
Description:
¿Quién soy?
Quién soy – Mi historia con el cabello rizado
Hola, soy Roy Rizan!

Padre de 2 cachorrosirenas con pelazo, y fanático del cine, la tele y todo lo que implique buenas historias. Me llaman el rebelde de la melena al viento, el inconformista del rizo, el revolucionario de los moños apretados… porque llevo más de una década ayudando a miles de personas con cabello rizado, ondulado y afro a lucirlo con orgullo y personalidad.

Mi aventura empezó en 2012, cuando fundé junto a mi santísima esposa, una de las primeras tiendas online de productos para cabello rizado y afro en España. Fueron años de aprendizaje, emprendimiento, y de un ir y venir conociendo gente maravillosa.

En 2021, tras pandemia, Brexit, inflación y otros desastres, tuve que vender la tienda. Dolió como despedir a un amigo. Pero decidí transformar la tristeza en energía y creé Rizos.pro, un blog MARABULOSO donde comparto consejos, trucos y reseñas para que tu pelo esté sano, bonito y feliz.

Si tienes el cabello ondulado, rizado o afro, aquí encontrarás información clara, divertida y útil para cuidarlo y presumirlo. Y si no sabes por dónde empezar, te recomiendo mi asesoría gratuita: en 2 minutos tendrás un plan a medida para tu pelo.

Seguimos hablando en breve.

Roy.

Name: Nova Therapeutic Massage
Description:
Arlington, VA- NOVA Therapeutic Massage, Northern Virginia’s premier local massage service provider, is opening its third location in the Courthouse Plaza. Courthouse Therapeutic Massage (CTM) opened on April 22, 2017 to expand access to an exceptional massage experience for Northern Virginia community residents, visitors, and guests. CTM is located at 2250 Clarendon Blvd, Store K, a short walk from the Courthouse Metro Station on the Orange and Silver lines and near two hotels, Arlington Courthouse and county government offices, numerous business offices, and residential properties in the Arlington Courthouse area. CTM is NOVA Therapeutic Massage’s third location in Northern Virginia, which also maintains studios in Ballston and Springfield.
Designed by locally renowned architect and interior designer Pongsak Pattana, Courthouse Therapeutic Massage is designed to offer clients with a high-end peaceful, refreshing, and reinvigorating massage experience in the heart of Arlington. “Our goal for this new location,” noted Store Manager, Olivia Davison, “was to take all the lessons we have learned in successfully running two premier Northern Virginia massage locations in order to create a massage studio that is tailored to the unique needs of our Arlington community and that delivers exceptional therapeutic services at affordable prices.” To achieve this goal, CTM offers both exceptionally-appointed private therapy rooms and a couple’s room. Ms. Davison explained, “We’ve listened to our Arlington customers who say they have greatly valued the personalized private room design, as opposed to the curtains and less personalized designs common in some of the national chains. We want to adapt to the needs of Arlingtonians, not require Arlington residents to adapt to some generic national business model.”
Northern VA residents and guests seek therapeutic massage for a variety of reasons. CTM offers massage therapies to address certain types of health concerns; ........

Name: Grožio Inovacijų Centras
Description:
Grožio Inovacijų Centras – tai klasika ir inovacijos nuo 1994!

Esame įsikūrę pačiame Vilniaus centre. Interjeras ir emocinė atmosfera – vieni svarbiausių faktorių, padedančių klientams pasijausti laukiamiems, atsipalaiduoti po dienos rūpesčių, atgauti jėgas ir vidinę pusiausvyrą, todėl įrenginėdami centrą siekėme sukurti nepaaiškinamą jaukumo dvasią.


Atsižvelgdami į rinkoje esančias grožio metodikas bei technologijas, siekėme sukurti tokius sprendimus, kurie išties būtų efektyvūs. Pasitelkdami medicinines žinias, darbo praktiką, naujausių tyrimų rezultatus bei gerąsias pasaulio praktikas grožio srityje, sukūrėme kompleksinius sprendimus, kurie visiškai pateisino mūsų ir klientų lūkesčius. Mūsų sėkmės paslaptis – klasikinės laiko patikrintos metodikos derinamos su naujausiais technologiniais sprendimais.

Mūsų pagrindinis tikslas – kompleksinių sprendimų bei nuoširdaus rūpesčio klientu dėka EFEKTYVIAI PASIRŪPINTI VEIDO IR KŪNO GROŽIU BEI GERA SAVIJAUTA.

Grožio Inovacijų Centro vadovė Daina Urbonienė – klasikinės ir aparatūrinės kosmetologijos specialistė, diplomuota CIDESCO ir INFA sertifikatais, dirbanti jau 12 metų, rodanti, kad Grožio Inovacijų Centre taikomi kompleksiniai sprendimai yra išties efektyvūs. „Mes visada tikėjome, kad nuoširdus noras ir pastangos padėti žmogui išspręsti problemą, padės sukurti centrą, darantį proveržį grožio srityje ir leidžiantį didžiuotis pasiektais rezultatais“.

Description:

At The JHON-JHON Institute, we offer a comprehensive range of training courses, equipping aspiring professionals with the skills and expertise needed to excel in the field of cosmetic enhancement. Description:
Wir sind ein ambulanter Pflegedienst. Wir pflegen und betreuen pflegebedürftige Menschen in ihrem häuslichen Umfeld im Großraum Stuttgart. Unser Angebot erstreckt sich von der Grund- und Behandlungspflege, über die Pflegeberatung bis hin zur Unterstützung im Haushalt. Unser Ziel ist jederzeit, unseren Patient:innen zu einem selbstbestimmten Leben zu verhelfen.

Die Grundpflege meint konkret unterstützende Maßnahme in punkto Körperhygiene, Nahrungsaufnahme und das Be- und Entkleiden. 
Bei der Behandlungspflege arbeiten wir eng mit Hausärzten und Fachärzten zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass die medizinischen Bedürfnisse der Patient:innen professionell versorgt werden. Unser spezialisiertes Team führt notwendige medizinische Maßnahmen durch, um Ihre Gesundheit bestmöglich zu unterstützen.
Die Pflegeberatung geht über das Übliche hinaus. Wir bieten umfassende Anleitungen und Schulungen an, um Patient:innen und ihren Angehörigen die bestmögliche Pflege zu ermöglichen.
Außerdem übernehmen wir auch nicht-pflegerische Aufgaben, die unseren Patient:innen aufgrund ihrer Eingeschränktheit schwerer fallen können, wie das Erledigen von Besorgungen oder die Reinigung des Wohnraums und das Zubereiten von Speisen.
In Notfällen, wenn die Betreuungsperson ausfällt, springen wir im Zuge der Kurzzeitpflege ein.

Description:
Official distributor for Albania, Kosovo and North Macedonia

Overview

The Davines Group begins its journey in Parma in 1983, with the Bollati family’s idea of establishing a laboratory for the production of high end hair products.

After a decade of research and improvement the company decides to focus on its own brands by launching from scratch Davines and [comfort zone] brands, the first one dedicated to the professional hairdressing, the other one to the skin care spas and treatments market.

Today the Davines Group is present in 95 countries and employs a multicultural team spanning 34 different nationalities and in 2016 had become a member of the group of so-called B Corps, whose purpose, in addition to profit, is maximizing their positive impact by providing innovative solutions to environmental and social issues whilst respecting the highest standards of performance, transparency and accountability.

Besides the Parma headquarters, we have branches in New York, Paris, London, Mexico, Netherland, Hong Kong, Shanghai and Düsseldorf.

Davines Group is now a recognized leader in the formulation and manufacturing of high end skin and hair care products.

Davines style is a reflection of curiosity and openness to the world and of the Italian heritage of history, art, design and good taste.

Promoting and transforming an holistic, healthy and sustainable lifestyle concept into a beautiful reality is our mission. Creating beauty from the inside out is our passion.

Our purpose:

Name: Pura Vida Laser Clinic
Description:
Pura Vida Laser Clinic is een laserkliniek, gespecialiseerd in permanente laserontharing. Wij zijn gevestigd in Lelystad.

Wat is laserontharing?
Laserontharing is een cosmetische behandeling, waarbij een laserapparaat gebruikt wordt om lichtstralen naar de haarzakjes te sturen met als doel de haarzakjes te vernietigen. De laser richt zich op het pigment in de haar. De lichtstralen zetten zich om in warmte en bij voldoende verhitting van het haarzakje wordt het haarzakje vernietigd, waardoor haargroei uit het vernietigde haarzakje niet meer mogelijk is. Permanente ontharing is het gevolg.

Over Pura Vida Laser Clinic
Professionaliteit, vakkennis en hygiëne staan bij ons hoog in de vaandel. Wij hechten belang aan persoonlijke adviezen en streven ernaar de behandeling zo veel mogelijk op jouw wensen te laten aansluiten. 

Soprano ICE Platinum
Bij Pura Vida Laser Clinic maken we gebruik van de Soprano ICE Platinum van Alma Lasers. Één van de meest innovatieve, veilige en effectieve behandelmethoden op het gebied van permanente ontharing die vandaag de dag beschikbaar is voor alle huid- en haartypes. Ontharing met de Soprano ICE laser is de beste en veiligste optie om permanent van je ongewenste haargroei af te komen. 
Indien je je ongewenste haargroei permanent wenst aan te pakken ben je bij ons aan het juiste adres!

Unsere Schwerpunkte liegen in der Grundpflege, Behandlungspflege, Betreuung im Alltag sowie der Verhinderungspflege. Besonderen Wert legen wir dabei auf individuelle Pflegeplanung, feste Bezugspersonen und eine enge Kommunikation mit Ärzten, Angehörigen und anderen Versorgern.

Was PflegeVita24 besonders macht:

Ein kleines, engagiertes Team mit großer Fachkompetenz
Sehr gute Bewertungen und eine hohe Weiterempfehlungsrate
Verlässliche Einsatzplanung und pünktliche Versorgung
Transparente Kommunikation und echte Beratung auf Augenhöhe
Flexible Unterstützung – vom ersten Gespräch bis zur langfristigen Begleitung
Pflege ist für uns mehr als ein Beruf – sie ist eine Verantwortung, der wir mit Respekt, Würde und Fachwissen begegnen. Wir möchten, dass Menschen möglichst lange selbstbestimmt und sicher in ihrem Zuhause leben können. Deshalb investieren wir nicht nur in Pflegequalität, sondern auch in digitale Prozesse, Entlastungsangebote und Mitarbeiterschulungen.

Name: 7M Car Care Pro shine
Description:
Paint protection film (PPF), also known as clear bra, is a clear polyurethane film that is applied to the exterior painted surfaces of a vehicle to protect it from various types of damage. It is typically used on high-end and luxury cars, but it is also available for all types of vehicles.

PPF is an ultra-thin and transparent film that is designed to absorb impacts and resist scratches, stone chips, and other forms of physical damage that can harm the vehicle's paintwork. It can also protect against environmental factors such as UV rays, pollution, and bird droppings.

The film is applied to the vehicle's body panels, including the hood, front bumper, fenders, and mirrors, as these areas are most prone to damage. It can be custom-cut to fit the specific make and model of the vehicle, ensuring a perfect fit and complete coverage of the protected areas.

PPF is self-healing, which means that minor scratches and abrasions will disappear over time as the film's molecular structure reverts to its original form. It also has a high-gloss finish that enhances the vehicle's appearance, making it look newer for longer.

Overall, #paint protection film is an effective way to keep a vehicle looking new by providing durable, long-lasting protection against common forms of damage.

1.) Protection From Damage:
One of the main benefits of using car paint protection film is that it provides a layer of protection to the vehicle's paint, helping to prevent damage from rocks, gravel, road debris, and other types of abrasions. This can help to keep the car looking new and preserve its resale value.

2.) Easy Maintenance:
Car paint protection film is easy to maintain and clean. It can be washed and waxed like any other part of the vehicle and does not require any special products or equipment. 

3.) Long-Lasting:
High-quality car paint protection film can last for several years, providing durable protection for the vehicle's paint.

Majd ezt ötletes kiegészítőkkel, de intelligensen varázsoljuk izgalmassá. Ne legyen se túl sok, se túl kevés, legyen eredeti, mert ugyanúgy fontos, hogy megragadjuk a figyelmet.

De üzleti sminkek terén is otthonosan mozgok szakemberként. 

Az évek során dolgoztam már kis- nagy és multinacionális vállalatoknak ilyen téren, valamint sminkeltem több reklámkampányhoz is ügynökségek csapatait erősítve. Épp ezért tudom, a jó smink titka ilyenkor az arányokban van: egy picivel hangsúlyosabb, mert a fotó levesz az erősségből, de ez mindig alkalmazkodik az üzleti elvárásokhoz. Name: Xsara do my hair
Description:
Xsara Do My Hair is your go-to one-stop-shop for all curly hair essentials: from cuts and styling to knowledge, maintenance and the right products: we have everything your hair needs. Based on the vision of treating every different curl in its own way, to preserve health and boost your confidence.
 
Our story starts in a small salon in The Netherlands, where a fourteen year old purple-haired girl called Romy Xsara, accidentally fell in love with the craft of doing hair. Feeling disappointed by the racism in the industry and in the knowledge provided in hairdressing school, Romy went on a quest of self-education. Growing up around many different cultures and people with different hair textures, resulted in an immense awareness of the troubles many people faced in accepting their natural hair. Feeling unable to grow in the salons, Romy decided it was time to create her own space in the hair industry. At the age of eighteen, she founded Xsara Do My Hair, where her friends walked to her small attic to take place as her first customers. By listening to the experiences of her curly haired friends and gaining experience by doing their hair, Romy quickly started to make a name for herself.
 
‘Whenever I would post my friends’ hair on social media, people would contact me about doing curly hair. It worked out so well I went from washing people’s hair in the sink next to my toilet, to renting a space in Amsterdam’. - Romy Xsara  
 
After all, it was fun working backstage at Fashion Week and learning how to style European textures, but what did that bring our CEO if she couldn’t even do her friends’ hair? It was essential for Romy to gain knowledge on different textures, curls and Black hair in particular. By trial and error she perfected her craft and soon began to understand that there is no such thing as one technique or method for working with curly and coily hair.

Domiciliary Care Services and Community Support Services

Airthrie Homes is proud to announce its Domiciliary Care and Community support Services, we have branched out to Domiciliary Care and community support, providing a regulated and personalised service to our clients. Airthrie staff are fully vetted, DBS checked and trained carers.

The ethos of Airthrie Homes is to enable our clients to live the life that they chose in the comfort of their own homes, respecting equality and diversity and ensuring their needs are met with the highest standard of care, and also provide support with accessing their local community.

Grazie alla profonda conoscenza della cute affinata negli anni tramite corsi specifici e pratica nel nostro salone, siamo in grado di aiutare nella prevenzione della caduta dei capelli. 

Agire per tempo è importante, anche se non sempre è possibile, ed in entrambi i casi sapremo trovare la soluzione giusta per te, per tornare a sorridere insieme. 

Nel nostro negozio offriamo una prima consulenza sempre gratuita per aiutarti nella valutazione della tua situazione e capire insieme come possiamo risolvere. 

I nostri prodotti sono tutti marchiati CE, traspiranti e di altissima qualità per garantirti tutta la sicurezza di cui hai bisogno. 

La nostra specialità è il contatto umano, grazie al quale instauriamo un rapporto di fiducia e rispetto con i nostri clienti, aspetto fondamentale per chi sta passando un periodo impegnativo della propria vita e decide di non mollare.

Description:
“Dobre mani jak dobre maniery, warto je mieć!” 

Otwórz drzwi do sukcesu z naszą franczyzą salonu Bahama Mama Nails!

Marzysz o własnym biznesie w branży beauty?  Jesteś stylistką paznokci, albo masz aspirację do tego, aby nią zostać? Chcesz prowadzić dochodowy biznes, który będzie przynosił Ci satysfakcję?

Dlaczego warto wybrać naszą franczyzę?

1. Profesjonalne szkolenia i wsparcie: Niezależnie od Twojego doświadczenia, oferujemy kompleksowe szkolenia obejmujące techniki stylizacji paznokci, obsługę klienta i zarządzanie biznesem. Zyskasz pewność siebie i fachową wiedzę, która zwróci się w szybkim wzroście Twojego salonu.

2. Znana marka: Dołączając do naszej franczyzy, korzystasz z uznanej marki, która przyciąga klientów poprzez swoje zaufanie i reputację. To szansa na szybkie budowanie bazy lojalnych klientek.
3. Skuteczny marketing i reklama: Odpowiedzialność za marketing i reklamę to nasza mocna strona. Nie musisz tracić czasu na prowadzenie mediów społecznościowych, zrobimy to za Ciebie.

4. Wsparcie operacyjne: Oferujemy wsparcie operacyjne, dzięki któremu zarządzanie salonem stanie się łatwiejsze, a Twój biznes bardziej dochodowy.

5. Standardy jakości: Utrzymuj wysokie standardy jakości, a Twoje klientki będą wracać. Dzięki naszym wytycznym, zachowasz spójność usług i produktów, co przekłada się na satysfakcję klientek.

6. Rozpoznawalność lokalna: Dołączając do naszej franczyzy, korzystasz z już istniejącej lokalnej rozpoznawalności marki. To oznacza szybszy start na rynku i zaufanie klientek od pierwszych dni.

7. Zespół wykwalifikowanych stylistek: Dołącz do społeczności, gdzie dzielisz doświadczenia z innymi właścicielkami salonów. Wspólnie rozwijamy się i wspieramy, tworząc silną sieć biznesową.


Odkryj, dlaczego nasza franczyza to klucz do sukcesu w świecie stylizacji paznokci. Nie czekaj - zainwestuj w swoją przyszłość już dziś! Skontaktuj się z nami i otwórz salon, który przyciągnie uwagę i zdobędzie serca klientek.

Description:

Our specialty is massage therapy in all its forms, with a wide range of treatments tailored to every need — from relaxation to therapeutic, sports, and prenatal massage, as well as Lomi Lomi, aromatherapy, hot oil, lymphatic drainage, reflexology, maderotherapy, and more.
Each session is designed as a ritual of reconnection, where presence, technique, and softness meet.

Aria is also a space for energetic and emotional renewal, offering naturopathy, family constellations, energy healing, and vibrational rituals.
We believe true well-being arises from harmony between body, heart, and mind — and that gentleness itself can be profoundly therapeutic.

 Our commitment: to create an authentic, nurturing, and transformative experience where each visit becomes a meeting with yourself.
At Aria, time slows down, the body breathes, and the soul finds peace.

Slow down. Feel. Shine.

Name: Puria
Description:
All of us have heard it so many times, Life’s a journey. It’s not a singular journey though. Every person has a different experience, a different destination, and itineraries to check off. Every phase of life has benefits. We know firsthand to value the journey, wherever we are in life.

Welcome to Puria! We designed Puria for the sole purpose to help you feel empowered to take care of your whole health and well-being. At Puria, we focus on tools and resources supporting Whole Person Health. 

Why is Whole Person Health so important?
Health and disease are not separate, disconnected states but instead occur on a path that can move in two different directions, either toward health or toward disease. Lifespan vs Healthspan.

On this path, many factors, including one’s biological makeup; some unhealthy behaviors, such as poor diet, sedentary lifestyle, chronic stress, and poor sleep; as well as social aspects of life—the conditions in which people are born, grow, live, work, and age—can lead to chronic diseases of more than one organ system. On the other hand, self-care, lifestyle, and behavioral interventions may help with the return to health.

While transportation services get a patient to the curb, our Aides meet them at their door, accompany them in their preferred transport (NEMT, ride-share, etc.), and provide full advocacy and support.

Our services include:
•	Door-to-Door Personal Assistance
•	Patient Advocacy & Support During Appointments
•	Detailed, Confidential Note-Taking
•	Post-Visit Reporting to Families & Facility Staff

Who We Serve: We are a trusted partner for:
•	Healthcare Facilities & Senior Living: Helping you ensure patient safety, improve outcomes, and provide a premium service.
•	Families: Providing peace of mind that your loved one is safe and understood, even when you can't be there.

Pilot Program: RydeAide is currently partnering with select facilities in Georgia for our 2026 pilot program. Contact us to learn more.

Name: All Care Plus
Description:
Our Mission: Care You Can Trust from People Who Understand

At All Care Plus, we recognize the importance of choice, collaboration, and trust—because we’ve lived it. Our mission is to empower participants by fostering inclusion and supporting individual choices, providing care that enables participants to thrive within their communities. We strive to help participants lead meaningful, independent lives while giving families the reassurance that their loved ones are in capable and compassionate hands.

What Sets All Care Plus Apart?

1. Reliability and Accessibility
We are committed to being there whenever our participants need us. Our team is responsive and always available because accessibility is the cornerstone of quality care.

2. Experienced, Compassionate Staff
At All Care Plus, we prioritize hiring staff who embody our mission of empowerment. We seek professionals who not only bring expertise but also share our core values. Our staff are more than just employees—they are partners in every participant’s journey.

3. Teamwork and Collaboration
We believe the best outcomes emerge from strong collaboration between participants, families, and support teams. We cultivate meaningful relationships within the community, ensuring every voice is valued and heard.

4. Quality over Quantity
As a values-driven provider, we focus on delivering high-quality care, not maximizing profits. Every decision is made with the participants' best interests at heart, helping them achieve their goals and unlock their full potential.

Personalized Support for Every Stage of Life

Our services evolve with participants’ changing needs. We listen attentively to participants and their families, creating care plans that align with individual goals and aspirations. Our mission is to ensure participants feel empowered at every step of their journey.

If our story resonates with you, we would love the opportunity to support you. Whether you need assistance today or in the future, we’ll be here!

Name: Easy Waxing Studio Kosmetyczne
Description:
O depilacji wiemy wszystko. To nasza główna specjalizacja, ale mamy też doświadczenie w wykonywaniu innych usług kosmetycznych: paznokciach, brwiach i rzęsach, zabiegach na twarz etc. 

 Działamy i rozwijamy się na rynku kosmetycznym w Polsce od 2010r. Możemy pochwalić się więc, sporym doświadczeniem w obsłudze klienta. 

Naszym priorytetem jest to, aby każdy klient czuł się u nas bezpiecznie, swobodnie, a przede wszystkim był zadowolony z wykonanej usługi. Możemy pochwalić się pozytywnymi ocenami naszych klientów na Booksy (4,9/5) i Google (4,7/5)

 Nasz personel to zgrany zespół specjalistów kosmetologów, techników usług kosmetycznych, oraz manicurzystek z wieloletnim doświadczeniem. 

 Przykładamy ogromną wagę do szkoleń pracowników. Określamy długoterminowo i indywidualnie ścieżkę szkoleniową każdej nowo przyjętej osoby 

 Dbamy o zdrowie i bezpieczeństwo naszych klientów : narzędzia sterylizujemy w autoklawie medycznym, używamy jednorazowej bielizny, ręczników, pilników, polerek etc.

 Depilujemy metodą "one deep" oznacza to, że szpatułkę którą nakładamy wosk na skórę, zanurzamy w nim tylko raz, po czym wyrzucamy do kosza. 

 Dbamy o komfort pracy naszych zespołów: pracujemy na bezpiecznych i wygodnych w użytkowaniu sprzętach. 

 Dbamy o jakość produktów, których używamy do zabiegów. Współpracujemy z najlepszymi markami kosmetycznymi m.in: Arkana, Rhonda Allison, Gehwol, Swederm, SPN, Shellac

 Do depilacji używamy wosków i pasty cukrowej własnej produkcji, z bardzo prostym i hipoalergicznym składem

 Produkty, które stosujemy nie są testowane na zwierzętach

Name: Ambulanter Pflegedienst Respekt GmbH
Description:
Die Umsetzung unseres Grundsatzes “Ambulant vor Stationär” hat nicht nur für unseren Pflegedienst höchste Priorität, sondern ist auch gesamtgesellschaftlich von signifikanter Bedeutung und gehört bereits heute zu den größten Herausforderungen hierzulande.

Um diese anspruchsvolle Aufgabe zu meistern, setzen wir auf unser fundiertes Praxiswissen aus über 25 Jahren Berufserfahrung. Während dieser Zeit haben wir uns nicht zuletzt auf die Behandlung, Betreuung und Pflege älterer, kranker und pflegebedürftiger Menschen spezialisiert, deren komplexe Lebenssituationen zusätzlich durch chronische Leiden wie u.a. Parkinson, Multiple Sklerose, Demenz, Inkontinenz, Diabetes mellitus, Wundheilungsstörungen, oder Psychische Erkrankungen wie Alkoholabusus, Doppeldiagnostische Persönlichkeitsstörung, erschwert wurden. Im Umgang mit diesen Krankheiten und Erscheinungsbildern können wir somit auf exklusive Erfahrungswerte zurückgreifen.

Name: Ingrid Nails Factory
Description:
Mon histoire

Formée à l'onglerie en 1992, j'ai appris le métier de prothésiste ongulaire. 
j'ai travaillé à l'onglerie d'Arpajon durant 8 ans, puis j'ai pris la responsabilité de l'Onglerie Paris Victor Hugo 16éme  pendant 4 ans. 
J'ai eu la chance de créer mon entreprise Aux Paradis des Ongles à Montgeron (91) durant 7 ans.
J'ai  réuni toutes mes connaissances acquises toutes au long de ces années.
Après 13 ans de reconversion dans le BTP en tant que responsable travaux.  
j'ai décidé de faire un perfectionnement en technique Gel pour reconquérir le milieu de la beauté. j'ai créé Ingrid Nails Factory le 1er avril 2023 à Chalou Moulineux dans le 91. 
Dans secteur de la beauté, le métier de prothésiste ongulaire est l’un de ceux qui fait le plus appel au sens artistique et à la créativité.
Réaliser la pose de faux ongles demande la parfaite maîtrise d’un savoir-faire technique. La prothésiste ongulaire est aussi une professionnelle du stylisme : en fonction du profil de sa cliente, elle saura imaginer et proposer les vernis, les décorations ou les motifs les mieux adaptés.

Whether you want to reduce fine lines, restore facial volume, rejuvenate your skin, or enhance your features, we have advanced treatments to help you achieve your goals.

Our anti-wrinkle injections smooth and eliminate fine lines, leaving you with a refreshed and youthful appearance. Dermal fillers using hyaluronic acid gels restore volume and augment your natural features, creating harmony.

Experience a revitalized complexion with Platelet Rich Plasma (PRP) treatments that stimulate natural healing, resulting in tighter, radiant skin. Mesotherapy offers overall skin rejuvenation, improving firmness, elasticity, and complexion for a youthful glow.

Say goodbye to imperfections with microdermabrasion, gently exfoliating and revitalizing your skin. It addresses sun damage, wrinkles, acne scarring, and age spots, revealing a smoother complexion.

Our FDA-approved PDO Threads lift and tighten your skin, promoting cellular renewal for a naturally rejuvenated appearance. The innovative Bio Filler treatment uses your own processed plasma cells to volumize, treat wrinkles, and rejuvenate your face, neck, and hands.

Enhance overall well-being with Vitamin B12 injections, supporting DNA synthesis, energy production, and neurological functions.

We will guide you through your aesthetic journey, ensuring you feel informed and confident every step of the way.

Schedule a consultation today for an empowering and confident experience!

Whether you’re looking for a mommy and me mani-pedi or a relaxing colour and cut, we strive to provide a comfortable and patient environment.  Located in the heart of downtown Milton, our staff are second to none, offering an array of services for Moms, Dads, Grandparents, Kids & Teens.

Name: Narciso Rosso | Hair Boutique
Description:
Un taglio di capelli e un colore Narciso Rosso sono distintivi e personalizzati.

I colori Goldwell si fondono perfettamente per adulare il cliente e dare nuova vita al taglio e alle forme. Il nostro personale, altamente specializzato, consiglia sempre il look adatto al tuo stile di vita, esaltandone la personalità.

Oggi più di ieri è fondamentale quindi, scegliere un Hair Salon che rispecchi il tuo stile, garantendo un servizio personalizzato e soddisfacente.

Il tutto è coordinato dal patron di casa Narciso, Emanuele Toscano, giovane ma già esperto architetto dei capelli. La sua formazione attraversa, Compagnia della Bellezza, la scuola di Aldo Coppola, i corsi a Singapore e le specializzazioni tecniche e stilistiche di Goldwell.

Con un rigoroso sistema di formazione, il marchio Narciso Rosso continua a ricercare il meglio dal mondo estetico.

L’obiettivo costante è creare un team all’avanguardia nelle tendenze capace di offrire un servizio su misura, caratterizzato dalla continua ricerca di tecniche e prodotti di alta qualità.

All’interno del salone potrete scegliere tra una vasta gamma di servizi per capelli, viso e corpo, concedendovi un’esperienza di bellezza a 360°. Sperimentate trattamenti e servizi personalizzati grazie alla consulenza di esperti. Prova anche i nostri servizi Beuty.

 Jako wizażystka z 10-letnim doświadczeniem wykonuję również profesjonalne makijaże okolicznościowe oraz prowadzę naukę samodzielnego wykonywania makijażu, dzieląc się przy tym doświadczeniem, umiejętnościami oraz wiedzą dotyczącą wizażu, jaką zdobyłam pracując dla największej światowej marki CHANEL.
