Name: Watercolor Salon & Shoppe
Description: In efforts to elevate the quality of hair care in the area, Todd and Christa Freeman opened Watercolor Salon. With a handful of courageous team members and a dream, the salon quickly earned a reputation for itself appearing in Mississippi Magazine as soon as 2012. As our clientele grew, it became obvious that expansion was inevitable. In 2014, the salon acquired the space occupied by Brock's Salon & Gifts established in 1949. After a year of renovations, the new location was revealed to the public. Since then, we have been able to better accommodate our unrivaled clientele and team. Just recently, we've opened a third location in Madison with an all new Shoppe.

With a little over a year of experience in the beauty industry, Yolanda has found her niche as a lip blush artist and prides herself in her detailed work and artistry. Description: La bellezza e la serenità dei nostri clienti sono la cosa più importante. Se vuoi ringiovanire la tua pelle, modellarti, eliminare i peli in eccesso e dimagrire venire a trovarci, sarai più bella e soddisfatta! L’innovativa tecnologia SkinMedic nasce dall’esperienza ventennale maturata nel settore dello sviluppo e della produzione di apparecchiature medico estetiche per la cura e la bellezza della persona e ora è a tua disposizione anche a Pinerolo. La tecnologia SkinMedic è a tua disposizione per la foto epilazione laser, oltre che per i trattamenti per la pelle del viso e del corpo, i trattamenti per il dimagrimento, la tonificazione, il rimodellamento, le soluzioni per la cellulite, il drenaggio e lo snellimento, che vengono svolti con l’ausilio di apparecchiature ad alto contenuto tecnologico.

Name: The Style Squad
Description:
The Style Squad Community is for creative female entrepreneurs who want to establish deep connections, build a confident mindset, and develop a signature look showing off who they are & what they value. 

It's a community of women dedicated to learning how to use their Style as a personal development tool to uncover their best-kept secrets.

Name: MASA.KANAI
Description:
Located in the tranquil neighborhood of Manhattan's Upper West Side, MASA.KANAI offers a high-end yet serene beauty experience with a unique Japanese flair. With the belief that hair is a form of art and craftsmanship, MASA.KANAI strives to provide the highest level of hospitality and service while continuously raising the bar for the definition of “perfection.”

Founder Tommy Masanori’s passion for hair started at a young age. After spending nearly two decades climbing the ranks working as a top stylist at multiple prestigious salons in Osaka, Tokyo, and America, Tommy decided to open MASA.KANAI in January of 2018 to share his vision with the beauty capital that is New York City. Tommy brings his expertise in both Japanese and American styles that will captivate clientele from all backgrounds. With a team of artists that share Tommy’s passion and pursuit for unending self-growth, we believe a style that reflects a person’s personality makes all the difference. Our goal at MASA.KANAI is to provide the busy families of New York with a fresh look to inspire confidence in their everyday lives.

Let us help you find happiness by awakening your inner beauty.

We are your reliable, 24/7 solution for all your pest control needs. Our dedicated team of highly skilled professionals offers top-notch pest control services alongside comprehensive disinfection & sanitation solutions, covering every corner of Bahrain.

At Excite Pest Control, we pride ourselves on being cost-effective, environmentally conscious, & committed to delivering eco-friendly solutions. With our 24/7 service availability, you can count on us anytime, day or night, to address your pest control & sanitation concerns promptly & efficiently.

With a 99–100% satisfaction rate, our fully certified barbers deliver a reliable, time-efficient experience that helps teams feel confident, valued, and well-looked after. We partner with leading construction companies to enhance wellness, boost morale, and give workers back valuable time, all through a seamless booking system and onsite delivery.

Take Action
Show your people you value their time, and help them look and feel their best on the job!

Zorg voor je personeel
In de huidige tijd lijkt alles nog sneller dan voorheen te gaan. Vele soorten arbeid vragen een hoge prestatiedrang. Dat kan gepaard gaan met te hoge fysieke werkdruk. Spiersystemen raken uitgeput evenzo het individu. Dat is voor zowel werkgever als werknemers onprettig. De balans in belastbaarheid is weg.

De oplossing
De ultieme oplossing is er niet, maar wij denken wel een interessante bijdrage voor dit probleem te bieden.

Hoe doen we dat?
Heel simpel door regelmatige massages van vastzittende spiergroepen blijft ieder mens veel meer vitaal.

Description:

We are close to local bus routes and have free street parking available outside and within a short distance of the salon.

We believe in treating everyone with compassion and kindness, and are proud to say we are LGBTQ+ community friendly. All products used are vegan friendly, and we are a wheelchair accessible salon.

We have toilet access within the salon, and we are happy to cater to individuals with neurodiversity which would like a silent appointment (we just ask for clients to put this in the appointment notes section on the booking so we can be aware prior to the appointment time).

We provide free consultations with Hannah for all treatments to ensure they are the best choice for our customers needs.

Name: NEFEG
Description:
Fundado em 1997, o NEFEG - Núcleo de Estudos e Serviços em Fonoaudiologia Elizabeth Gonçalves LTDA é um centro de referência em diagnóstico e terapia dos distúrbios da comunicação humana, especializado em fonoaudiologia neurofuncional. Oferecemos assistência especializada para sequelas neurológicas e distúrbios de comunicação oral, com avaliações completas e laudos detalhados. Na clínica, desenvolvemos trabalho de assistência fonoaudiológica na área de fonoaudiologia geral, abrangendo aprendizagem, deglutição, voz e linguagem, desde a infância até a terceira idade, com uma equipe qualificada em cada área.

Além disso, promovemos a capacitação de profissionais e estudantes por meio de cursos e treinamentos em fonoaudiologia geral e neurofuncional, e oferecemos consultoria para empresas e hospitais. Nosso atendimento inclui serviços de home-care e treinamento prático em fonoaudiologia hospitalar. Desenvolvemos pesquisas avançadas em comunicação humana e técnicas inovadoras, como o método PCS para pacientes disfágicos. Através do nosso centro de estudos, oferecemos cursos para profissionais, estudantes, familiares e cuidadores ao longo do ano. Confira a agenda de cursos e mais informações em nosso site.

Our elite, licensed therapists are among the best in Georgia, delivering world-class care with precision, passion, and presence. Every session is a sanctuary, whether you seek deep therapeutic work, high-performance recovery, or complete restoration of mind and body.

Why Leaders, Athletes, and High-Performers Choose Us
We serve executives, entrepreneurs, athletes, and discerning clients who demand more than convenience. They demand excellence. Our approach prioritizes:

Intention over speed

Alignment over availability

Excellence over volume

Our clients do not just feel better. They feel transformed.

The Royal Standard
Your wellness is sacred, and we treat it that way. With The Royal Touch, you are not paying for a service. You are investing in elevated healing, peak performance, and sustainable well-being.

Name: Gaubsteins Family Foundation
Description:
"Racionāla Rīcība" will always play a big and special role in my life - it will always remain one of my favorite projects. "RR" is about mental and general health, and so far we have done good, noble work together, attracting several thousand to those who needed it the most. But I want to raise this activity to a new level and develop charity on a completely different scale!

GFF - "Gaubsteins Family Foundation" will be about everything and for everyone. My varied life experience has thrown various twists and turns and I have seen what it is like when there is no education, when you do not know love, do not know what care is, humanity is not shown and there is none who believe in you or gives you hope. I have received a lot in this life and higher powers have put me in very unenviable situations. I don't take it for granted or as a lottery ticket that just fell into my hands.

I want to support students who are talented, but come from families who cannot afford to study, while at the same time the university or the state does not provide budget places or provides them, but very limited. I want to build infrastructures and communities, develop existing structures and create new ones. Believe in humanity and give opportunities. The ability to prove yourself, to show.
I want to create a new movement and leave a legacy that my future children will be able to continue to develop and raise even higher even when I am no longer walking this world. To teach and show how vital it is to help and share, because naked we come into this world and naked we will leave. And no other way!
Once someone told me: "don't bring it, but show it, take action!". 
So here I am. Delusional optimist who believes that can change this world for a better place! 

26/11/2024

Unser spezialisiertes Team vernetzt alle relevanten Akteure – von Ärztinnen und Ärzte über Pflegedienste bis hin zu Therapeutinnen und Therapeuten – und stellt sicher, dass Ihre Klientinnen und Klienten bis zum letzten Moment mit Würde und größtmöglicher Selbstbestimmung versorgt werden.
Mit unserer umfassenden Erfahrung und einem 24/7-Bereitschaftsdienst bieten wir Ihnen und Ihrem Team Entlastung, indem wir Notfallpläne erstellen, die Medikation abstimmen und die Versorgung optimal koordinieren.

Unser Credo: Lebensqualität ist mehr als Medizin. Gemeinsam mit Ihnen schaffen wir eine Versorgung, die Menschlichkeit, medizinische Expertise und Verlässlichkeit miteinander verbindet.

Name: Crewe Hair and Skin Clinic
Description:
This clinic  helps people who are experiencing hair loss and want to do something about it. The earlier action is taken, the greater the chance of success.

This is an alternative to the usual options of hair transplant which may not always be suitable, sustainable, safe or regulated.  Aftercare and follow up is key.

The foundation of  the approach is creating comprehensive and bespoke solutions for the individual. The approach includes accurately identifying what is driving the hair loss. This is followed by a bespoke action plan which includes lifestyle advice, tailored medical treatments based on genetic profile as well as access to Regenera Activa technology if suitable.  Regenera Activa is a method of hair stimulation which is  under used in the UK at the moment, and is being used by hair loss doctor’s worldwide.  It is best used as a once yearly treatment combined with medications.  It is also being used as part of the hair transplant procedure in some hair transplant clinics.   There is increasing evidence that if done 6 months before a transplant,, it can improve the circulation to the scalp and theoretically improve the chances of a more successful transplant outcome.  It involves implanting healthy cells into the scalp to trigger tissue regeneration which in turn has a remarkable effect on hair growth.

The clinic also provides a range of non-surgical aesthetic services including electrolysis for permanent hair removal and blemish removal, skin care programmes, injectable and light based treatments

Name: Apparently: Resources for Women Managing Aging Parents
Description:
As women, we do more heavy lifting when it comes to aging parents. According to AARP, 34 MILLION ADULTS in the US provide unpaid care for an adult age 50 or older. Of these caregivers, 72% are WOMEN. We are more likely to provide care for MULTIPLE family members and we experience higher levels of stress as a result. Sounds like your life, right?

I created APPARENTLY for you and all you are charged with knowing. Curious about establishing a Power of Attorney? I’ll teach you what it is and isn’t. Wondering what the symptoms of dementia are? I’ve got you. Struggling with the myriad of decisions to consider for a parent or two or three? I can help you keep it all straight.

I've been in this season of life for almost a decade, doing things for and with my parents I never thought I would. I've learned way too much to not apply what I've learned to other women in the same boat.

Name: Body Fluent Massage
Description:
Body Fluent Massage is a Mobile Massage Service in Sacramento, CA that seeks to make Professional Massage Services more practical and accessible by bringing the services to you at any location. You choose the appointment time, service location, and service type --  we bring the equipment and the Massage Therapist!

My name is Eric Gibson and I am the owner and sole massage therapist at Body Fluent Massage. In short, my life experiences as well as my educational background make me uniquely qualified to be your next massage therapist. At age 19, I made the decision to drop out of college at UC Davis due to the perception that a degree wouldn't improve my job prospects. From age 19-25, I performed intense manual labor in a metal plating facility and then at a local moving company and finally mixing ingredients for a local Keurig Dr. Pepper facility. At each of these jobs, I pushed my body past its limits for the sake of productivity. I was experiencing pain that was keeping me awake at night and I was having a hard time finding a doctor to take my pain seriously. In other words, I definitely learned the hard way that self-care is essential for anyone who performs repetitive actions over a long period of time.

Near the end of my time at Keurig Dr. Pepper, I saw an ad for a massage school -- "set your own schedule and have work you love". Initially, I signed up for the program in search of a flexible schedule that would allow me to get back to finishing my education at UC Davis, but after starting the program I began to realize that the holistic approach that I was learning there was actually resolving pain points in my body that I previously thought would never get better.

Since finishing Massage School, I have worked in Spas and Chiropractic Clinics while also completing an Advanced Neuromuscular Massage program -- shortly after this time, I set my mind to working for myself, and Body Fluent Massage was born!

(See my website for more in-depth about me and my story.)

Tratamientos corporales: Ofrecemos una amplia variedad de tratamientos corporales que te ayudarán a mejorar tu aspecto físico y a sentirte mejor contigo mismo. Entre ellos se encuentran la presoterapia, la electroestimulación muscular, la crioterapia, el drenaje linfático y la radiofrecuencia.
Tratamientos faciales: También contamos con una amplia variedad de tratamientos faciales personalizados para cuidar tu piel y mejorar tu apariencia. Nuestros tratamientos faciales incluyen limpiezas faciales profundas, peelings químicos, microdermoabrasiones, mesoterapia facial y tratamientos de ácido hialurónico.
Medicina estética: En el Centro Médico Estético Carmen Palacios ofrecemos tratamientos de medicina estética personalizados para mejorar tu apariencia física y corregir problemas estéticos que afectan tu bienestar emocional. Entre nuestros tratamientos de medicina estética se encuentran la aplicación de bótox, rellenos faciales, hilos tensores, mesoterapia y lipólisis.
Depilación láser: Contamos con un sistema de depilación láser de última generación que te ayudará a eliminar el vello no deseado de forma efectiva y duradera. Utilizamos tecnología de diodo, que es una de las más avanzadas y efectivas en el mercado.

Name: Pflegedienst Feelege in Hamm
Description:
Bei Feelege verbinden wir Fürsorge und Magie, um eine einzigartige Pflegeerfahrung zu schaffen. Unsere Pflegekräfte bieten nicht nur fachliche Kompetenz, sondern auch die liebevolle Zuwendung, die man von einer „Fee“ erwarten würde. Mit unserer breiten Palette an Leistungen – von der Grundpflege über Behandlungspflege bis hin zur Palliativpflege – stehen wir unseren Patienten mit Herz und Verstand zur Seite. Wir legen großen Wert darauf, dass unsere Patienten von den gleichen Pflegekräften betreut werden, um Vertrauen und Kontinuität zu fördern.

Unser Ziel ist es, Menschen in ihrem Zuhause zu unterstützen und ihnen ein würdevolles, selbstbestimmtes Leben zu ermöglichen. Dabei arbeiten wir eng mit Angehörigen zusammen, um die bestmögliche Pflege sicherzustellen. Feelege steht für Qualität, Zuverlässigkeit und Herzlichkeit – Pflege, die sich anfühlt wie ein magischer Schutz, der Sie oder Ihre Liebsten durch den Alltag trägt.

At ACAP Kansas City, we offer free educational programs each month specifically designed to meet the needs of caregivers like you. Each session is carefully crafted to address the diverse topics and concerns that arise during the caregiving journey. From emotional well-being to financial management, our programs provide the knowledge, confidence and support you need to effectively care for your loved ones.

Come titolare di Soloio Bellezza & Benessere, ho creato un ambiente accogliente dove ogni cliente può ritrovare armonia, relax e fiducia in sé stessa.
Dai trattamenti viso e corpo alla cura delle mani e dei piedi, dai massaggi rilassanti all’epilazione, ogni servizio è pensato per offrire un’esperienza di benessere completa e autentica.
Credo nell’ascolto, nella formazione continua e nella qualità dei prodotti che utilizzo, perché prendersi cura delle persone è una responsabilità che richiede dedizione e amore per il proprio lavoro.
La mia missione è far sentire ogni persona più bella, rilassata e in armonia con sé stessa.

Name: Camelot Life Coach
Description:
Hi, I'm Barry Cervantes, founder of Camelot Life Coaching — where real conversations lead to real change.

Feeling stuck, burned out, or unsure what’s next? You’re not alone — and you don’t have to figure it out on your own.

I help professionals and purpose-driven people get clear, build confidence, and move forward with focus and intention. Coaching isn’t about giving advice or hype — it’s about creating space to think, feel, and grow with support and accountability.

Clients come to me for help with:
 Clarity + direction
 Confidence + decision-making
 Boundaries + burnout recovery
 Productivity + purpose

Whether you're pivoting careers, rediscovering who you are, or just tired of spinning your wheels, coaching can help you reconnect with what matters most — and take action toward it.

My approach is compassionate, thoughtful, and results-driven (with a bit of humor along the way).

 Curious about coaching? Let’s talk — no pressure, just an open conversation.

 Learn more at www.camelotlifecoach.com

The Schneeberger-Oser Funeral Home started in 1935 When R. Clark Schneeberger, and his wife Mabel opened their first location at 12th and Market in Canton Ohio to help families in the area in their time of need. Louis Schneeberger and his wife, Emily were the second generation to take the reins and moved to our current location in 1968, which was billed as one of the most modern funeral homes in the area. In 1990 L. J. Schneeberger took the lead, and has taken us to today, believing in the core values of honesty, and fair value that have stood as our cornerstone since the beginning.

For over 85 years the Schneeberger-Oser Funeral Home has also been bringing you quality and assurance that the final wishes of your loved ones are implemented with compassion and accuracy. We have a very large selection of caskets, and vaults from all the major American manufacturers, as well as cremation urns, and keepsake jewelry.

Name: Journease End-of-Life Services
Description:
At Journease, we support individuals and families through the final chapter of life with compassion, clarity, and care. As an end-of-life doula service, we provide practical guidance, emotional presence, and a sense of sacredness around dying, death, and grief.

We specialize in:
 End-of-life planning & companionship
 Home vigils and natural death care
 Support for family-led and home funerals
 Family and child-inclusive rituals
 Navigating conversations around death, dying, and what it means to live meaningfully

Our approach is rooted in the belief that death is not a medical event — it’s a human experience. Through gentle guidance and grounded knowledge, we help you reclaim connection, choice, and dignity in this most personal of journeys.

Whether you're caring for someone in their final days, exploring holistic funeral options, or simply wanting to talk about what dying well means, Journease is here to walk with you — with empathy, respect, and ease.

Name: Narquise PMU & Beauty
Description:
Bij Narquise PMU & Beauty draait alles om het versterken van natuurlijke schoonheid en het vergroten van zelfvertrouwen, voor klanten én professionals.

Wat biedt Narquise PMU & Beauty?
✦ Academy. Gerichte opleidingen en masterclasses voor professionals op het gebied van PMU en Wimperextensions. Of je nu net je diploma hebt behaald of al ervaring hebt, wij helpen je met praktische vaardigheden en zelfvertrouwen om je carrière te versnellen. 
✦ PMU-behandelingen. Permanente make-up die jouw natuurlijke uitstraling benadrukt, van wenkbrauwen tot eyeliners. Iedere dag natuurlijke schoonheid zonder gedoe. 
✦ Wimperextensions. Wij bieden wimperextension-behandelingen met verschillende technieken: One by One, 2D of 6D Extra Volume. Natuurlijk, mooi en glamorous. 
✦ Medisch herstel. Medische PMU-behandelingen zoals littekencorrecties, schisis en tepelhof pigmentaties, waarmee we vrouwen helpen hun zelfvertrouwen te hervinden.
✦ Huidverbetering. Aanvullende gezichtsbehandelingen voor een stralende huid. 
✦ Visagie. Professionele visagie voor speciale gelegenheden. Wij zorgen ervoor dat je er stralend uitziet op je belangrijkste momenten. 

Natuurlijke resultaten | Zachte accenten | Persoonlijke aandacht | Maatwerk & Precisie | Expertise | Innovatie | Hygiëne | Veiligheid | Vertrouwen. Dé combinatie die wij dagelijks inzetten.

Waarom kiezen voor Narquise PMU & Beauty?
Bij Narquise krijg je meer dan een behandeling; je krijgt persoonlijke aandacht, deskundig advies en een ervaring die jouw schoonheid en zelfvertrouwen versterkt. Met GGD-vergunningen en een focus op hygiëne en veiligheid zorgen wij voor hoogwaardige behandelingen in een professionele en ontspannen omgeving. Daarnaast ondersteunen we beauty-professionals die willen groeien in hun carrière met opleidingen en persoonlijke begeleiding, zodat zij met zelfvertrouwen hun dromen kunnen najagen.

Ben jij klaar om te stralen? Of wil je jouw beauty-carrière naar een hoger niveau tillen? Wij helpen je graag verder!

Name: Fris. Cityspa
Description:

Samen met ons geweldige team delen we onze passie voor beauty, huidverzorging, massages en haarstyling – allemaal onder één gezellig dak in het hart van Dronten.

Van Kleine Start tot Groeisucces
Bijna 10 jaar geleden begonnen we Fris. bovenin een klein kantoorpand aan de Rede. Al snel groeiden we en verhuisden we in 2018 naar een groter pand op de begane grond. Sinds 2019 zitten we op onze huidige toplocatie aan het Meerpaalplein, waar we met trots onze klanten verwelkomen.

Natuurlijke Schoonheid & Duurzame Producten
Bij Fris. geloven we in het omarmen van natuurlijke schoonheid. We werken zoveel mogelijk met veilige, natuurlijke producten die huid, haar en lichaam laten stralen zonder concessies.

Voor Iedereen
Fris. is er voor alle leeftijden. Of je nu 18 bent of 100, schoonheid is tijdloos en toegankelijk voor iedereen.

Behandelingen op Maat
Van huidverbetering en ontspannende massages tot haarkleuring en styling – ons team biedt behandelingen die passen bij jouw wensen en haartype. In onze haarsalon werken we met hoogwaardige producten en technieken voor het beste resultaat.

Meer dan een Behandeling
We bieden geen losse behandelingen, maar een totaalbeleving. Bij Fris. draait het om jouw moment van ontspanning en zelfzorg.

Ons Team: Passie & Persoonlijke Aandacht
Bij Fris. werken we met liefde en passie. We blijven op de hoogte van de nieuwste trends en zetten altijd de klant centraal. Bij ons voel je je welkom, gehoord en gewaardeerd.

Name: Acqua delle Langhe
Description:
Original Fragrances from Langhe

Chi siamo
Acqua delle Langhe nasce nel 2012 dall'idea di racchiudere in una sola boccetta tutte le sfaccettature del carattere e dell’anima olfattiva del Piemonte.

Un territorio straordinario che è diventato negli anni iconico per gli Italiani e non solo: Patrimonio Unesco dal 2014, oggi rappresenta il Piemonte per eccellenza. 

I profumi per ambiente e per la persona di Acqua delle Langhe sono un viaggio sensoriale tutto piemontese. 

Le fragranze si ispirano ai sentori minerali delle vicine montagne, i colori caldi dei tramonti estivi, la dolcezza delle colline sinuose e il tepore avvolgente dell’imperdibile autunno.

La nostra Filosofia 
Profumi d’ispirazione antica, realizzati con cura moderna
Un tempo chiamata Alba Pompeia, la capitale delle Langhe era già nell’antichità sinonimo di eleganza e cultura.

Oggi, con le nostre essenze per ambiente e per persona, in Acqua delle Langhe portiamo avanti quella stessa tradizione attraverso fragranze artigianali che raccontano l’identità profonda del Piemonte.

Arte profumiera Made in Piemonte
In ogni creazione cerchiamo l’armonia perfetta tra le note di testa, cuore e fondo.

Name: Street Smart Beauty, Inc
Description:
Meeting You At The Corner Of Healthy Skin And Mindful Living

I help professionals navigate two common sources of overwhelm: the confusing world of skincare and the constant pressure of a wired-and-tired life.

For over 15 years, I’ve been guiding clients through:

Skincare Coaching: I cut through the noise of social media trends and product overload. Using professional analysis and proven products (Lira Clinical, Hale & Hush), I create customized, step-by-step routines for anti-aging, hyperpigmentation, and sensitive skin. It's not magic—it's science and know-how with a plan.

Soulful Restoration: Beyond the skin, I offer a genuine pause. Through restorative yoga, meditation, and Clarity & Reflection sessions, I provide supportive spaces for stress relief, mental clarity, and purposeful decision-making. It’s not about doing more; it’s about remembering you already carry what you need.

My approach is built on professional certifications (Esthetics, Yoga, Aromatherapy) and a personal understanding of what it means to move from "doing self-care" to truly knowing how to care for yourself.

I offer:

1:1 & Group Skincare Programs

Restorative Yoga & Meditation Sessions (Mobile & Virtual)

Clarity & Reflection Sessions for personal and business direction

Corporate & Group Wellness Experiences

Let's connect if you're ready to get off the skincare struggle bus or find your calm again.

Based in La Plata and Gaithersburg, MD, I look forward to supporting your skincare and self-care goals. Visit www.streetsmartbeauty.com to learn more!

Name: San Romero Style
Description:
San Romero Style is a personal styling and image consulting service built on one core value: authenticity.

Confidence doesn’t come from trends or fashion rules, it comes from looking in the mirror and feeling like oneself.

San Romero Style supports professionals, expats, entrepreneurs, and individuals who are ready to elevate their style without losing their identity in the process. Whether navigating a new role, adapting to a life transition, or simply looking to refine their personal or professional image, clients are guided to make small, intentional changes that reflect their real life, personality, and goals.

This process is about working side by side to understand each client’s lifestyle, habits, and individuality, and then building an image and wardrobe that aligns with all of it.

Through a mix of colour analysis, signature style development, wardrobe revamps, and personal shopping, San Romero Style helps clients show up as their most confident, intentional selves. Both in daily life and in professional spaces. 

Tailored workshops and corporate sessions are also available for teams and leaders looking to strengthen their presence and style impact at work.

Because the truth is: when someone’s image aligns with who they truly are, everything else flows more naturally. How they show up, how they’re perceived, and most importantly, how they feel.

It’s not about changing people, it’s about helping them show up as more of themselves.

Description:
Wise Care is a semi-independent residential care company that works with Looked After Children (LAC) and ‘Eligible and ‘Relevant’ young people who are entitled to leaving care services provided by the local authority under the provisions of the Children (Leaving Care) Act 2000.

We aim to help young people to reach their fullest potential by offering a caring home environment that provides them with structure, stability and bespoke packages of support to address their individual needs. 

We works with young people who have had disrupted childhoods and often experience emotional behavioural difficulties, those not in education, training, employment or training (NEET), and young people with attachment difficulties making it difficult for them to trust adults.

We promote a culture that is inclusive and embraces diversity. Our environment is one where we help young people to effectively problem-solve, with some scope for making mistakes, but where they are guided to learn from their mistakes. We aim to equip young people with life skills and interpersonal skills to help them transition successfully into adulthood and independence within the community as effective members of society.

Begleiten Sie uns auf unserem Weg, die ambulante Pflege in Deutschland nachhaltig zu verbessern.

Die Pflege älterer und pflegebedürftiger Menschen erfordert Zeit, Aufwand und Engagement. Sie benötigen Unterstützung? Das Team vom Pflegedienst MeckCura steht an Ihrer Seite!

Mit unserer Unterstützung ermöglichen wir den Menschen, die wir pflegen und betreuen, ein weitgehend selbstbestimmtes und selbstständiges Leben – in ihrer gewohnten Häuslichkeit, durch den Besuch unserer Tagespflege oder in einer unserer Wohngemeinschaften.

Unsere Leistungen umfassen Beratung zu allen Themen rund um die Pflege, die häusliche Grund- und Behandlungspflege, Betreuung und Hauswirtschaft.

Sicherheit. Vertrauen. Freundlichkeit. Es sind Werte wie diese, mit denen wir Menschen seit 1995 überzeugen.

Whether you’re targeting specific skin concerns, enhancing your natural glow, or simply indulging in well-deserved “me time,” we’re here to help you every step of the way.

Expertise You Can Trust: Led by a licensed esthetician passionate about skin health and overall wellness.

Client-Centered Care: Every treatment is tailored to your skin’s unique needs.

Holistic Wellness: We prioritize a connection between skincare and self-care, offering an experience that nurtures both.

Results-Driven Treatments: Combining innovative techniques and premium products for glowing, healthy skin.

Community Focus: A welcoming space that encourages confidence and self-love for all.

At Glow Skinetics, we’re redefining beauty, inside out. Step into our space and discover what it means to truly glow—both inside and out.

Name: LOREN NAIL ART BOUTIQUE
Description:
LOREN NAIL ART BOUTIQUE is proud to present our recent innovative project, to large, and small companies, and the high-tech ecosystem.
What we do:
We provide manicure&pedicure services to the company's employees- all the way to the office! 
My name is Loren, and I started my journey about nine years ago in my private clinic.

Recently we joined high-tech and startup companies, where I would do full, pre-arranged care days. We experienced the employee's busy schedules, meetings, and frequent flights. During the treatments, many employees talked about their issue of lack of time. Because of their super busy schedule and long hours, they don't have enough time to handle their grooming routine. 

Luckily, their companies realized that taking care of the employees' needs contributes to their performance at work. 
So, I came to make a revolution! 

WHY LOREN NAIL ART BOUTIQUE? 
Warm and personal treatment to each customer. 
The best professional manicurists in the field. 
service at your doorstep - we're coming to your office. (We can send more than one manicurist per demand). 
And most importantly - we bring all of the equipment with us!  
Prerequisites:
Available room with a table (preferably square) and one office chair. 
Minimum of 7 treatments per day 
Let's make employees smile during the workday!

Name: Hairvolution Nederland

Name: United Support Services
Description:
We are a Supported Living organisation for adults with learning disabilities, dedicated to making a meaningful difference in people's lives. With a focus on care, empowerment, and inclusivity, United Support Services has recently been registered with the Care Quality Commission.

Our Mission

Our mission is clear: to provide a safe, nurturing, and supportive environment where individuals with learning disabilities can flourish, grow, and lead fulfilling lives with dignity and independence.

What Sets Us Apart

At United Support Services, we're not just caregivers; we're family. Our values of respect, empathy, and person-centred care guide everything we do.

What We Offer

Personalised Care: Tailored care plans that focus on strengths, needs, and aspirations.
Expert Support: Dedicated support workers passionate about helping individuals achieve their goals.
Community Engagement: Encouragement of social connections and expanding horizons.
Empowerment: Building skills, confidence, and choices for independent living.

Our Impact

We advocate for inclusivity and equal opportunities, actively engaging with local organisations and families to promote awareness and positive change.

Join Us in Making a Difference

Passionate about making a positive impact? Join us, whether as part of our dedicated team or to learn more about our services.

Connect with Us

To discover how United Support Services can support you or your loved one, reach out today. We're here to listen, support, and guide you on the journey to empowerment, independence, and a brighter future for all. Together, we celebrate and realise everyone's potential.

Name: Senior Life Planner
Description: Our Vision is to redefine and simplify the process of planning for aging seniors and to empower their caregivers to make the best decisions possible for the whole family.  Senior Life Planner understands that each situation is unique and requires a customized plan in order to meet your needs. While working in leadership at some of the largest senior care companies in America, we learned the factors that lead to successful care planning processes for aging seniors and their families. We specialize in helping aging seniors and their families thrive in otherwise stressful situations. We would love to help you and your aging loved one today!

Name: La Maison de Beauté Lyon
Description:
Idéalement située dans le carré d’or de Lyon, place des Jacobins, notre maison de beauté vous ouvre ses portes en tant que temple de beauté, où l’histoire de la beauté se mêle à celle de nos clients.
L’objectif de La Maison est d’offrir une beauté sur mesure et inclusive, répondant au mérite de nos clients. Nous nous efforçons d’aller au-delà des attentes en faisant, de chaque instant passé à La Maison de Beauté, un moment de détente et de plaisir, où la beauté de chacun se révèle.

Depuis 1999 nous vous accompagnerons en vous conseillant au mieux dans votre diagnostic de peau et de cheveux, tout en vous faisant passer un moment de détente. Franchir les portes de La Maison de Beauté, c’est entrer dans un oasis de 180m² de tranquillité dédié à la beauté. Nos coiffeurs, sont formés aux dernières tendances, tout en honorant les techniques classiques, ils manient les ciseaux avec une précision artistique. Chaque coupe, chaque couleur est une œuvre d’art unique, créée pour vous sublimer. Au fil des années, nous avons évolué, restant toujours à la pointe des tendances et des techniques, mais surtout de nos engagements envers la satisfaction de nos clients. Chaque membre de notre équipe met son expertise au service de votre bien-être, car c’est ce que vous méritez de mieux.

Aujourd’hui, en 2024, La Maison de Beauté continue d’écrire son histoire, toujours guidée par la même vision qu’à ses débuts.
Chaque coupe, chaque soin est une célébration de la beauté individuelle, une déclaration d’amour à la confiance en soi. Et tandis que le monde évolue, La Maison de Beauté demeure un refuge intemporel, où l’art de la beauté rencontre l’art de vivre.

Name: Męski Salon Fryzjerski Finezja
Description:
FINEZJA to prawdziwie oldschoolowy męski BARBER SHOP dla dżentelmenów – mężczyzn i dzieci. To jeden z pierwszych męskich salonów we Wrocławiu, zachowujący długoletnią tradycję świadczonych usług fryzjerskich, sięgającą 1958 roku. Dawniej mieścił przy ul. Rynek 4, a od 1996 roku znajduje się przy urokliwej ulicy Świętego Antoniego 31. Oldscholoowy klimat i styl vintage gwarantują dobre samopoczucie w naszym salonie. Chcemy, abyś poczuł się wyjątkowo. Czas spędzony u barbera jest chwilą, na którą zasługujesz.

W naszym salonie:
 Oferujemy klasyczne strzyżenie i stylizację włosów. 
 Wykonujemy wszystkie rodzaje strzyżeń włosów krótkich (fade, crop, modern, mullet…), długich, kręconych, samymi nożyczkami, nożyczkami i maszynkami, trymerem. 
 Proponujemy cięcie odpowiadające osobistym preferencjom i najnowszym trendom fryzjerskim.
 Dobieramy fryzurę do osobowości człowieka. Potrafimy słuchać.
 Specjalizujemy się w strzyżeniu włosów, pielęgnacji brody i wąsów – używając najlepszych, dostępnych na rynku kosmetyków dedykowanych mężczyznom.
 Golimy brodę i głowę brzytwą z użyciem gorących ręczników i pachnących olejków eterycznych – SPA MĘŻCZYZNY.
 Jako pierwszy wrocławski salon fryzjerski dla mężczyzn, od 2015 roku proponujemy odsiwianie/ repigmentację włosów.


Już od 2017 roku organizujemy kursy i szkolimy wg AUTORSKIEGO PROGRAMU SZKOLEŃ Z ZAKRESU FRYZJERSTWA MĘSKIEGO/ BARBERINGU EWY WOLANIUK-KLOC  , dzieląc się długoletnim doświadczeniem z osobami zajmującymi się zawodowo męskim fryzjerstwem/ barberingiem lub rozpoczynającymi swój rozwój w tych zawodach. Szkolimy też nauczycieli i instruktorów fryzjerstwa. Jakość i profesjonalizm naszych kursów potwierdza Standard Usług Szkoleniowo-Rozwojowych SUS 2.0, przyznany przez DEKRA Certification – niezależną jednostkę certyfikującą. Jesteśmy też członkiem Polskiej Izby Firm Szkoleniowych oraz posiadamy wpis do Rejestru Instytucji Szkoleniowych RiS.

Name: LAK Boetiek
Description:
Welkom bij LAK Boetiek! 

Ik ben gepassioneerd door alles wat met nagels te maken heeft en bied een verschillende. Bij LAK Boetiek kunnen klanten terecht voor BIAB (Builder in a Bottle), gellak en nailart. Of iemand nu kiest voor een natuurlijke look met BIAB, de kleurrijke en langdurige gellak, of juist wilt uitpakken met nailart op de nagels, alles is mogelijk.

Wat LAK Boetiek uniek maakt, is de gezellige en ontspannen sfeer die ik creëer bij mijn salon aan huis. Ik vind het belangrijk dat iedereen zich op hun gemak voelt tijdens de behandeling, om deze reden bied ik ook de zogeheten Silent Treatment aan. Gezelligheid staat voorop, want ik geloof dat een goede ervaring meer is dan alleen het resultaat. 

Ik streef naar perfectie in elke behandeling en ben er trots op dat mijn klanten altijd tevreden de deur uitgaan. Bij LAK Boetiek draait alles om kwaliteit, persoonlijke aandacht en een fijne en bovenal gezellige ervaring.

Name: Philos Cuidadores
Description:
Trazendo Cuidado com Amor e Compromisso

Na Philos Cuidadores de Idosos, nosso compromisso é em primeiro lugar proporcionar a dignidade e o bem-estar dos nossos idosos. Com uma equipe de cuidadores dedicados e apaixonados, estamos aqui para apoiar as necessidades físicas, emocionais e sociais dos nossos queridos idosos.

O Que Nos Diferencia:

 Cuidado Personalizado: Entendemos que cada pessoa é única, e é por isso que adaptamos nossos serviços para atender às necessidades individuais de cada idoso.

 Amor e Companhia: Não somos apenas cuidadores, somos companheiros. Estamos aqui para ouvir histórias, compartilhar risadas e criar memórias especiais.

 Confiança e Compromisso: Construímos relacionamentos sólidos com nossos idosos e suas famílias, baseados na confiança, integridade e respeito mútuo.

 Qualidade de Vida: Nosso objetivo é melhorar a qualidade de vida dos nossos idosos, promovendo uma vida ativa e significativa.

 Experiência e Técnica: Há anos cuidamos de idosos com as mais diversas complicações, como Alzheimer, Parkinson, demência, diabetes, baixa mobilidade, entre outras. Estamos preparados para enfrentar essas condições e nossos cuidadores recebem treinamento específico para cada uma delas.


Nossos Serviços:

 Cuidados em Domicílio
 Assistência Diurna
 Cuidados Pós-Operatórios
 Companhia e Atividades Sociais
 Gerenciamento de Medicamentos
 Planejamento de Refeições Saudáveis

Na Philos, acreditamos que todos merecem envelhecer com dignidade, carinho e alegria. Deixe-nos fazer parte da jornada de cuidado do seu ente querido. Juntos, vamos criar momentos especiais e proporcionar o cuidado que eles merecem.

Entre em contato conosco hoje para saber como podemos cuidar dos seus entes queridos como se fossem da nossa própria família. Philos Cuidadores de Idosos - Cuidando com Amor, Respeito e Dedicação.

Name: Institut L'Instant
Description:
L’Instant, car à cet instant le voyage ne fait que commencer. En quête de détente, de revitalisation, d’équilibre intérieur, vous offrez votre visage aux mains savantes de Céline Marengo. 

S’ouvre alors un chemin de sensations et de correspondances, une trajectoire expérientielle au rythme de dix doigts inspirés.

L’Instant, car à cet instant se mesure la force et la vérité du geste, ce mouvement mille fois réinventé au contact de la peau, comme se perçoit l’écho d’une mémoire intime, résonnance de nos vies si compliquées.

L’Instant de la sérénité, de l’apaisement, de l’harmonie. Du renouveau. L’audace d’un voyage composé à la manière d’une expérience de la rencontre : vos traits, ces yeux, ce nez, ce front, ce cou, sont-ce les éléments d’un masque social ?  En vous approchant de l’univers du rituel kobido, votre visage accepte enfin la lumière de l’âme, il vient à la source énergétique, alignée, ancienne, tellement nouvelle. 

Praticienne du soin bio-esthétique depuis plus de trente ans, experte formée auprès des maîtres du bien-être, Céline Marengo a fait sien le trait sincère et radical de Gabrielle Chanel : « La beauté commence au moment où vous décidez d’être vous-même ».
Ce moment, c’est L’Instant.

#kobido #skincare

Semblance Medspa is a medical spa in Albany, New York that offers a variety of state-of-the-art, results-driven aesthetic treatments. Our team of experienced and licensed professionals is passionate about helping our clients achieve their aesthetic goals. We offer a wide range of treatments, including:

Non-surgical fat reduction treatment: that uses cold temperatures to freeze fat cells, which are then eliminated by the body over time.

Laser treatment: that can be used to improve the appearance of wrinkles, age spots, and other signs of aging.

A minimally invasive procedure that can be used to remove unwanted fat and add volume to other areas of the body.

Treatment that uses electromagnetic energy to stimulate muscle contractions can help build muscle and reduce body fat.

We also offer a variety of other aesthetic treatments, including facials, micro needling, and injections. We believe that everyone deserves to feel confident and beautiful, and we are committed to providing our clients with the highest quality care and results.

To learn more about our services or to schedule a consultation, please visit our website at semblancemedspa.com.

Name: Miracle Hair Salon
Description:
Καλώς ήρθατε στο κομμωτήριο μας, όπου προσφέρουμε κορυφαίες υπηρεσίες τόσο για άνδρες όσο και για γυναίκες. Το κομμωτήριό μας είναι ένας μοντέρνος και καλαίσθητος χώρος που έχει σχεδιαστεί για να παρέχει ένα χαλαρωτικό και άνετο περιβάλλον για όλους τους πελάτες μας.

Η ομάδα των ειδικών στυλιστών μας είναι εξαιρετικά εξειδικευμένη σε μια ποικιλία τεχνικών και στυλ, διασφαλίζοντας ότι μπορούμε να ανταποκριθούμε στις μοναδικές ανάγκες και προτιμήσεις κάθε πελάτη. Είτε ψάχνετε για ένα κλασικό κούρεμα, ένα μοντέρνο νέο στυλ ή μια ειδική περίσταση, σας καλύψαμε.

Για τους άνδρες, προσφέρουμε μια σειρά υπηρεσιών, όπως κούρεμα, κούρεμα γενειάδας και ξύρισμα. Οι στυλίστες μας γνωρίζουν τις τελευταίες τάσεις και μπορούν να σας βοηθήσουν να πετύχετε την τέλεια εμφάνιση που ταιριάζει στο προσωπικό σας στυλ.

Για τις γυναίκες, προσφέρουμε μια ποικιλία υπηρεσιών, όπως κοψίματα, βαφές, ανταύγειες και χτενίσματα. Είτε θέλετε να βελτιώσετε την εμφάνισή σας είτε να δοκιμάσετε κάτι εντελώς νέο, οι στυλίστες μας θα συνεργαστούν μαζί σας για να δημιουργήσουν μια προσαρμοσμένη εμφάνιση που είναι ταυτόχρονα κολακευτική και εύκολη στη συντήρηση.

Στο κομμωτήριό μας, χρησιμοποιούμε μόνο προϊόντα και εργαλεία υψηλής ποιότητας για να διασφαλίσουμε ότι τα μαλλιά σας δείχνουν και αισθάνονται καλύτερα. Δεσμευόμαστε να παρέχουμε άριστη εξυπηρέτηση πελατών και θα πάμε πάνω και πέρα για να βεβαιωθούμε ότι είστε απόλυτα ικανοποιημένοι με την εμπειρία σας.

Είτε είστε τακτικός είτε επισκέπτης για πρώτη φορά, σας καλωσορίζουμε στο κομμωτήριό μας και ανυπομονούμε να σας βοηθήσουμε να πετύχετε τα τέλεια μαλλιά που πάντα θέλατε.

Name: Institut The Woman
Description:
Bienvenue à l'Institut The Woman ! 
Un lieu pensé par des femmes, pour les femmes.

Forte de plus de 25 ans d'expertise en coiffure, notre équipe vous accueille dans un espace chic, chaleureux et entièrement dédié à votre bien-être. Ici, tout a été conçu pour que vous puissiez prendre soin de vous dans un seul et même endroit, en toute sérénité.

L'univers coiffure, reconnu bien au-delà de notre région, est spécialisé dans les ombré hair, les soins capillaires profonds, les lissages, les extensions, la colorimétrie sur-mesure et le visagisme. Un espace shampoing séparé et dédié à la détente vous permet de vivre un moment de lâcher-prise total.

L'univers esthétique vous propose une approche haut de gamme mais accessible : soins visage et corps, technologies avancées pour le rajeunissement, raffermissement, épilation, l'incontournable head spa, spa pédicure et bien plus encore. Nos cabines intègrent les dernières innovations comme le hydrojet, l'infrarouge, la douche hammam, et bien sûr un confort absolu.

Chez The Woman, nous croyons en l'excellence, la bienveillance, la bonne humeur et surtout la personnalisation de chaque prestation. Vous trouverez un institut où votre temps est valorisé : tout peut s'y faire sans courir, avec même un espace repas et working, et un parking sécurisé de plus de 20 places.

Avec ou sans rendez-vous, offrez-vous le meilleur des soins dans un lieu pensé pour vous.

The Woman : plus qu'un institut, une expérience à vivre
